name: WOW! WOW! WOW! [FFR]
subject: a stunning declaration from Senator Bernie Sanders

body:
He’s sounding the alarm about Citizens United...

---
| **Friend, Bernie Sanders REFUSES to back down:** | [$10,000 GOAL: CHIP IN $10 TO HELP US HIT OUR $10,000 GOAL TO END DARK MONEY »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58607?t=7&akid=22741%2E4449941%2ECOOeZW)
---
**We can’t let billionaires buy our elections** – we live in a DEMOCRACY and we should decide our elections with our votes!

**The only way to prevent billionaires from wielding that kind of _UNDEMOCRATIC_ power is to stop Dark Money once and for all!**

**↓ HERE’S HOW YOU CAN HELP ↓**
[**We’re raising $10,000 toward our End _Citizens United_ Goal to fight back against the horrific influence of Dark Money. Chip in $7 now »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58607?t=8&akid=22741%2E4449941%2ECOOeZW)

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused

---
# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---
| | [Join the Sun Now →](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=055522f4115940aa8c9e9f227951e4f9&_e=BfO4KBRHcbF0rxHolKGUGll_vVcrxg7UZcXmU7YuSZ94qKgmguBZ9Dwm65tq-Akqz11G2d5wf-NooV7LFDVv_HFMjcEIx6oJKYlkmzRovRkd_oS9_PZY8YzZpa0vXlccpD2R5qgZg8tfrYdTaSRkm6Ip09vOTOaNj-6nWAHh9Wb3rlDXImB2mhffHDwtIjtZcJ4niqoYhZE9pkpM_716yZZO_GeLNCIJOx3nY8isKfYKXvMp9NzGbUTWpLDyAGJc-K8ChacrfTBEg09TQmkcQNEGo3rwNNHaE3fvPIR5wzkKxRe5SDTZcPwQ8JE1Vhfi_vdm5zf2CS0DLoH_1WaVmzbyW_1qcyFOFjdQt5y0wAgsP66DvfT-jogPweerXQ5al4IuGXsoGwHzdzEME4fOdQ%3D%3D)

name: The America First Movement
subject: Our worst fears have now become our reality.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa McClain for Congress
body:
It’s all come down to this

| |
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b4fde7ae574d484f949b590414a24af4&_e=cYin3rMAqV5zjIel6FeAT3voPrFI3BXAeVq6-2hVP76Uzq4qY-hcIIyXrQ8ByRvh7JXXXFXjHPjb4u8UjfxD-aBJ-V9wNg5sPyDdEq3vtfvDV5j-9dAKzonvTRJCtdPLxQ_sJzg2HgAv7EvWZp6AhAcN7rR-DakjiSqC0CYahoyQlVv4XaYLqmjt4Fmb_CMC7kuBu-wVlWLC-wRPiLzN-x66zRNbmZzTSe-P1RWNL_kn0q5CTAYGJqeKw8qEAW9X88MA_f8JDHMTCWOnA77bME4tgGgvCSyEashxm_Hcga3bihQInafKqT86MbehzueWp_IIDkovqQtlqWTg_95TBezVnjUMRvN87LEep7bngPSQK2dN5C3e63o5utsFGSEKr8ix-r-lxCuAfzZus2_PFLHePx2hEMIXd7pneKZgyheu6SG-Ww3dUbqZ4mxIICPCqyQ1z_CKyU4X_6mXj2mJJ4jC1s-CnH_j1lMEw8DGb_RGLGzzRVsoRxEuiz8FgZJQHzm_wm9lutZaAesjlQc71Q%3D%3D)

_**HELP NEEDED
FINAL CHANCE TO STAND AGAINST PRESIDENT TRUMP'S CRIMINAL SENTENCING**_
| Peter, our worst fears have now become our reality.

Even after countless attempts to fight off the Left's lawfare against President Trump, we still came up short.

And now, just days out from President Trump's inauguration, all that work seems to be for nothing.

The corrupt New York judge, **JUAN MERCHAN** , has now just CRIMINALLY SENTENCED President Trump for **NOTHING.**

They're still using every tool at their disposal to humiliate President Trump and sabotage his second term before it even gets started.

We can't stand by and let the radical left ruin our movement at such a pivotal moment in our history.

We can't let them win.

Please, stand with us and demand that all charges against President Trump be DROPPED:

body:

My name is Jimmy Patronis. **I 'm Trump's guy running in the Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat in Congress.**

Early voting is about to begin here so I won't beat around the bush with you:

Republicans control the House of Representatives by a RAZOR-THIN margin. I'm the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I can't fill Matt Gaetz's seat without some more help.

The timeline here is tight. Governor Ron DeSantis immediately called this Special Election so we could quickly fill this seat with an America First Conservative.

It's a perfect plan to help ensure we deliver on President Trump's agenda ASAP.

**But that means EVERY SECOND counts between now and the Primary in a few short weeks.**

Steve Scalise and I are partnering up today so Republicans are perfectly positioned to win this seat for President Trump. If that's what you want too, I believe I'm the right man for the job.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo5ulbnhp7marrfd891cos3j3vjo9mp7t848g07g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm4ob2clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhkfo5cpr05h8pt4i7phteeu1g3mpcor6k3hvdmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm4ob2clh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl3qucmfa9okgg2lo4pprp2jnskvfu6f29tg5uu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm4ob2clh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu1g2u6b9urlm0pve7s6td18i9oep4fijom2vvk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm4ob2clh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlr0t98cr5qtnfuvavg3j5ug09kriveg5vbuai20_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm4ob2clh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztbebfoie644igr0o5v5o57c7nd8del65r925qn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm4ob2clh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Republican Senators
subject: Friend, we just met with President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
And our message is simple

Friend, we just met with President Trump and our message is simple.

Our party is united. Our Majority is united.

We're ready to secure our border, cut your taxes, lower your costs, and create jobs for working Americans.

We're ready to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.

**[Will you continue standing with President Trump and us?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z04sdbgbtd0r1ppcg8arfbumacl467t74tv9301o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm4ob2c1h2bs)**

name: Leader Scalise
subject: Political AMBUSH Against President Trump’sCabinet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I knew the Democrats would want revenge after getting CRUSHED at the ballot box...

| |
---
| | | _I knew the Democrats would want revenge after getting CRUSHED at the ballot box...

I knew they'd come for MAGA Republicans hard and fast...

And I knew President Trump's Cabinet would be a prime target for their revenge campaign..._

But this surprised even me. The Democrat Machine just unleashed a coordinated hatchet job against President Trump's top appointments.

_**[It's a sweeping political ambush and I need to fill you in immediately.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zue8vt34nhe1oejlm7rh7n0e3ko0r5k3cp82m5dg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o30clh2bs "It’s a sweeping political ambush and I need to fill you in immediately. ")**_
- Elizabeth Warren fired off a propaganda letter calling **PETE HEGSETH** a potential 'insider threat' because of his Christian tattoo
- Adam Schiff went on ABC to attack **KASH PATEL'S** nomination to run the FBI
- Axios confirmed that Senate Democrats declined an expedited confirmation process for **TULSI GABBARD** for political purposes
- Blue state governors announced they'll defy Trump Border Czar **TOM HOMAN 'S** mass deportation plan of violent criminals
- Democrat Gov. Josh Green is jetting to DC in order to help torpedo the confirmation of **ROBERT F. KENNEDY JR.**
- Nancy Pelosi fired off a press release slamming **ELON MUSK** as being a 'puppet'
It's a national disgrace.

That's why I'm rushing to you with an urgent request:

_**[I'm respectfully asking Conservatives from ALL 50 STATES to help me support President Trump and his Administration, defend his top allies in Congress, and deliver on his mandate from the American People.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zao0ilsmf3d3e1q94t0iolijeerivnup50ilo19o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o30clh2bs "I’m respectfully asking true American Patriots from ALL 50 STATES to join me and stand with President Trump, each of his Cabinet picks, and his allies in the House at this key moment. It’ll take ALL OF US to stand up for what’s right to help see these nominations through.")**_
| | [PLEASE JOIN ME NOW](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgaf1v9h3t3ltge89qdk73hsthmnuavr921shv7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o30clh2bs "DEFEND TRUMP’S CABINET PICKS")
---

_As your House Majority Leader - and as an American - this political ambush against our duly elected 47th President infuriates me to my core._

But there's something that brings me comfort and I'll share it with you...

**The Democrats are desperate. They 're grasping at straws to do ANYTHING in their power to stay relevant and sabotage President Trump's second term. The election was certified. His historic victory is set in stone. And our mandate from the American People is ironclad. **

Now we need your help to deliver on it.

If ONE MILLION true American Patriots can join me right here and right now, we'll have the power and resources to fight back, deliver on his agenda, and support President Trump's vision for our country.

**I 'm personally asking you to step up and join me in this critical fight.**
| [PLEASE JOIN ME NOW](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsemu0pqnjrcqbvcrimgv1jc3q0t0r0psgil297o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o30clh2bs "DEFEND TRUMP’S CABINET PICKS")
---

Thanks for all you do for our movement.

- Steve Scalise

| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpgton9g6t3a56f0ivg1qpfv9hfc7a7mgtn383l8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o30clh2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg1f943dtjv4hip4k52tj9r2g3o4puaqmilpb1d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o30clh2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
---
| | | [RESPOND NOW ->](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znqi0npmnp0ril92fb3kna5fu27dvvcn6qip6v8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o30clh2bs "RESPOND NOW →")
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

name: Senator Tim Scott
subject: Your personal invite to Trump’s inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Join us in Washington D.C. on January 20th to witness history as Donald J. Trump becomes the 47th President of the United States.

Hey friend,

The countdown is on -- President Donald J. Trump is headed back to the White House, and I want YOU to be there to celebrate this monumental moment alongside me and other Republican leaders.

We're giving away **[two tickets](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z69m53h78la52h3pcajv4th5sdlq10b9nukvdhfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs)** to the **[inauguration of the 47th President of the United States,](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb5iaeqk8nnadsjm6cjpgmonq3uvd9jhc0po9qeg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs)** plus **[hotel accommodations in Washington D.C.!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z07l84rcrdlp70n22525c9sth9t5ftthh88r20pg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs)**

And here's the best part: you're just a few clicks away from entering.

**[All you need to do is chip in ANY amount before 11:59 PM on Tuesday, January 14th -whether it's $5 or $50, your support gets you a shot at an unforgettable day.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z65bl71hmqnbrgmk1d2dq7j702v8he24t7qg5118_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs)**

******************************************************[>>> ENTER NOW <<<](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv45794vpucnfsq0fs147djplgks1puig7hvimog_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs)******************************************************

name: Lara Trump
subject: If you want truth to win, please open this email.
body:
You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind

| | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.
---
| |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr3t5dlrd8sa5umj7hfu7ll8vokh34rv4u5jrfk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, **[I need you to join the fight.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6rmqpi7ktfj2p6nisf4t4dredolbranmnhqvn9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs)** Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. **[**And that's why your support to Brave Books today is so critical.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za6bfiub3fmdekg86u1kbfcope9vhljour7q8jr0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs)** I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. **[**And the #1 thing you can do today is help by giving your best donation to Brave Books right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7e3e293v2hv64atl3lnngek589gcc154dbrm7t0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs)** If you've heard of **Brave Books** , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on _Fox News_ for countering the Left's horrible poison. **Brave Books** fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian **Kirk Cameron** (_Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof_) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great **Brave Books** with conservative messages such as:
---
* _The Test of Lionhood_ by **Kevin Sorbo --** Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good.
* _The Night the Snow Monster Attacked_ by **General Michael Flynn --** Shows children what it takes to be a good leader.
* _Happy No Snake Day_ by**Riley Gaines --** Encourages children to stand up for the truth.
* _Because You're My Family_ by **Missy Robertson --** Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love.

---
| | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several **Brave Books**. But my favorite is _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at **Brave Books** aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My **Brave Book** , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. **[That's why I hope you’ll support Brave Books today by giving a gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z06fn2tg9emfrg8uhm1s0agh9s2e4ibkmbm4jfk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs)** Your gift helps **Brave Books** create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.**I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your[gift of $100 or more](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zub8d816ahq16689s10r273vd49fr232kdahbn9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs), I'll send you a copy of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ as a special "Thank you" from me.** Sharing the lessons of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children,
---
| | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmlflcmdu38q6dt931djiqo8sn79mss5a5ohu778_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z67et8feutaqcer8j4n178c2f5t2uop5a3h4nf08_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs)
---
**Lara Trump** **Wife, Mother, and Author**
---
|
---
| | **P.S. If we do nothing, we're just handing America's children over to the Left.[Please help me fight by giving to Brave Books to protect our children today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi137o42hq4dvdvbdmmd76925rnuk36gkfm0f970_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs) **Thank you! - Lara
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0o2n7u3n84vr2g85eloolm35l7de5cts2j2ut68_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znonlelvarlrtpeq5p2ln2uroj2u17n78r5g0j2o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp36c3jm8or4c8gq48bi4bh28pr6cdhmeor0chge49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7d0lqes8nfgrkko8fcmpl7o29o0po708m3hi660_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs)_

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztha8bri4sut319earpst3gfmpo82nrc0lo0gqbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdp5hl70n0n7arlbbij7afkdn2dveu1e3rdhkmc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z86q7cjhj7aqubebjvtmq6ov5qncef3qsrefk8i8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdsmreo8vstn26rhg61sbsc9pbms8q7jshme9j6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvjlqtgebfq88jajivg8th793ecllem1fkc2vkg8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfm5e97gmv3srom1g7eh2kiirnqmdl4jvq9cprno_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpadpmntaafl8thmefkbhlkaup8s2dv7iepb5q80_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkcqb4tjhe6rrfdljkeqjetjnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp36c3jm8or1c8gq48bi4bh28pr6cdhmeor0chge49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zq90rfdhldsgqb9m8hqkn15lm01e4hktb5dsg9so_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6o34c3h2bs)_

Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. **[**And the #1 thing you can do today is help by giving your best donation to Brave Books right now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zde4nhdjjgp8soh5ssaru3sgb2sd92948trqn9h8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6p74c5h2bs)** If you've heard of **Brave Books** , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on _Fox News_ for countering the Left's horrible poison. **Brave Books** fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian **Kirk Cameron** (_Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof_) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great **Brave Books** with conservative messages such as:
---
* _The Test of Lionhood_ by **Kevin Sorbo --** Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good.
* _The Night the Snow Monster Attacked_ by **General Michael Flynn --** Shows children what it takes to be a good leader.
* _Happy No Snake Day_ by**Riley Gaines --** Encourages children to stand up for the truth.
* _Because You're My Family_ by **Missy Robertson --** Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love.

---
| | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several **Brave Books**. But my favorite is _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at **Brave Books** aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My **Brave Book** , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. **[That's why I hope you’ll support Brave Books today by giving a gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuv56o6b3tc2fb3fo1ckgef2sk9lkeglumfma2ng_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6p74c5h2bs)** Your gift helps **Brave Books** create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.**I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your[gift of $100 or more](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zku2lghegsoscee0vr4mgnuu6mkk890d8j7dt7t8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6p74c5h2bs), I'll send you a copy of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ as a special "Thank you" from me.** Sharing the lessons of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children,
---
| | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: C.S. Lewis Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Great American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6at3sbk925sgqqt10evd6ehhadmmjejblfp1tjo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6p74c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zs9thpo7usepe3947ofcmcjjgl2ogipnjqrma1k8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6p74c9h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqlebsbsgquh4qhmcqhabudkmurm3csjsag0l5a8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6p74c9h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zf84ubgv8d84e64fp9gbhnf2jclahd92cu9vqhvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6p74c9h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcc25bd49k168h5qd62nbj3k3vun81frpkhmsjt0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6p74c9h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfo9cvqoij7g9hlh4ieglkv85vmuarbg4genvico_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm6p74c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: Trump, Elon, & The Bee
body:
Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics.

| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z8lvo82gf8f82ndck827018r0ngledc33diov278_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjmeo74cth2bs)
---
|
---
Friend, Voters have made their voices heard.Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics. For years, the left has used the liberal "news" media to spread their woke agenda, but it was largely behind closed doors. **That all changed when Twitter silenced The Babylon Bee for telling a joke.** The absurdity of a tech giant deplatforming a satirical site woke a sleeping giant.**_Enter Elon Musk._** Elon purchased Twitter and joined The Babylon Bee in starting a revolution that catapulted free speech to the election's frontlines.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zhkvsaopn0hj1h53lbmak7n9edu6dchsi62ufigg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjmeo74cth2bs)
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z7imm811kh84onpuj69jskncseduqlgf7jmujvdo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjmeo74cth2bs)
---
_But, before millions gave censorship the middle finger at the polls,**it was our subscribers who stood strong against the left 's suppression of thought.**_**Without our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH wouldn 't have become such a major issue this election.** **[If you appreciate humor, I hope you'll subscribe to The Babylon Bee and join this growing revolution for truth, debate, and the free exchange of ideas.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z2bn6p5cq2r576d5gc7hi6a48uellugd9q3m7b9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjmeo74cth2bs)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zhg92e1r8om499mkad8jfeso2gql1kripl38e5p8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjmeo74cth2bs)
---
The left ignorantly believes that our subscribers -- Americans who like to laugh at the absurdity of our world -- are _" fringe."_ President Trump's landslide victory proves that there are **MILLIONS of people just like our subscribers** -- including unlikely Republican voters like Elon Musk and Joe Rogan -- who believe that free speech is a critical pillar of our democracy. [**While liberals have mental breakdowns and sob on TikTok, I hope you 'll become a Babylon Bee subscriber and support what Elon Musk calls, **"**a future where comedy is legal. "**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zjls5uuus3b97hstrjulk3lsjbctfguffsrsp6hg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjmeo74cth2bs)I'll leave you with this, a photo of two handsome men who love humor, the First Amendment, and America.
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z9ut65ltsnfsk71i4i54vljn0b760j0o5s7hl2do_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjmeo74cth2bs)
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2znsla4rnd9s55quhs8t0a4r3543vrvgkq3srabeo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjmeo74cth2bs)
---
Thanks for supporting free speech. **We 'll never give up the fight.**Seth Dillon
CEO, The Babylon Bee

clean_body: C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, “” has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching “,” we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of “” on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
House Democrats’ TOP Super PAC just released their target list of 29 vulnerable, GOP-held seats in battleground districts.

| |
---
| | | **- URGENT HOUSE MAJORITY COMMUNICATION -**
_From House GOP_
Election Day was just weeks ago and the Democrat Machine is already laying the groundwork to destroy our Conservative Majority.

The top House Democrat Super PAC just released their list of 29 vulnerable, GOP-held seats in battleground districts. This is the same dark money-funded Liberal group that unloaded a QUARTER-BILLION DOLLARS against our Conservative candidates.

And on top of that, House Republicans have a MAJOR fundraising deadline before President Trump takes control and we're falling dangerously behind our goal.

These races won't just determine who controls the U.S. House of Representatives. It could determine the future of President Trump's entire legislative agenda. That's why the Democrat Machine is mobilizing earlier than it EVER has before.

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Invitation to Trump’s Inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Join me for President Trump’s historic Inauguration

|
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9fp65s9nibk79s5usdf5empnj0gg800qkmnd8jo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm9or2cjh2bs)
Friend,

America just suffered a jihadist attack, dozens are dead and injured, and a “pro-Palestinian” protest blocked 6th Ave in NYC the next day, rallying behind the murderers.

This perverse, upside-down world only ends when we stop importing cultures that hate us and deport those already here who reject our values and embrace a backward culture of terrorism and death.

_January 20th can’t come soon enough! _

I’m looking forward to having leadership that possesses the moral clarity to stop fighting useless foreign wars and instead preserve our way of life. And to celebrate the change in leadership, I want to send a lucky Turning Point PAC supporter to President Trump’s inauguration.

**Donate today for your chance to enter our giveaway of two tickets to an exclusive and UNFORGETTABLE inauguration weekend experience, complete with...**
* Round-trip flights for two to and from Washington, DC.
* Luxury hotel accommodations (one room) in DC from Friday, January 17, to Tuesday, January 21.
* Access for two to a rally with President Trump on the afternoon of Sunday, January 19, at the Capital One Arena.
* A VIP invitation for two to the exclusive Turning Point Ball on the evening of Sunday, January 19, at the Salamander Hotel in DC.
* Reserved seating for two at the Presidential inauguration on Monday, January 20.

[Enter Today >>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z82lludd96d1gsbu6fh7qnqff30tkv6qbabqma78_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm9or2cjh2bs)
The Golden Age of America is coming.

Justice is coming.

Instead of having an FBI wrecked by DEI-like policies, President Trump will fight against the corruption in the FBI, strengthen our law enforcement agencies, and bring law and order back to our country.

That all begins on January 20th.

**The deadline to enter is January 10th, so if you want to be there IN PERSON, donate __TODAY__ to enter our giveaway of two tickets to celebrate President Trump’s triumphant return to the White House with me and the rest of the Turning Point crew! **
[Donate $25](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zaqnb9t2si4o77tm5gmq20goemhigio407sdn4ro_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm9or2cjh2bs)

Charlie Kirk

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Invitation to Trump’s Inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Join me for President Trump’s historic Inauguration

|
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi5il258kesae32tdg6i7tf8e53ie69lldtct6ro_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm9or4c1h2bs)
Friend,

America just suffered a jihadist attack, dozens are dead and injured, and a “pro-Palestinian” protest blocked 6th Ave in NYC the next day, rallying behind the murderers.

This perverse, upside-down world only ends when we stop importing cultures that hate us and deport those already here who reject our values and embrace a backward culture of terrorism and death.

_January 20th can’t come soon enough! _

I’m looking forward to having leadership that possesses the moral clarity to stop fighting useless foreign wars and instead preserve our way of life. And to celebrate the change in leadership, I want to send a lucky Turning Point PAC supporter to President Trump’s inauguration.

**Donate today for your chance to enter our giveaway of two tickets to an exclusive and UNFORGETTABLE inauguration weekend experience, complete with...**
* Round-trip flights for two to and from Washington, DC.
* Luxury hotel accommodations (one room) in DC from Friday, January 17, to Tuesday, January 21.
* Access for two to a rally with President Trump on the afternoon of Sunday, January 19, at the Capital One Arena.
* A VIP invitation for two to the exclusive Turning Point Ball on the evening of Sunday, January 19, at the Salamander Hotel in DC.
* Reserved seating for two at the Presidential inauguration on Monday, January 20.

[Enter Today >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z25ursah394php6hj2bo291efm6atcrfqpulrol8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm9or4c1h2bs)
The Golden Age of America is coming.

Justice is coming.

Instead of having an FBI wrecked by DEI-like policies, President Trump will fight against the corruption in the FBI, strengthen our law enforcement agencies, and bring law and order back to our country.

That all begins on January 20th.

**The deadline to enter is January 10th, so if you want to be there IN PERSON, donate __TODAY__ to enter our giveaway of two tickets to celebrate President Trump’s triumphant return to the White House with me and the rest of the Turning Point crew! **
[Donate $25](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgkeb7rve46djm7th5ua9trssfc4uplk7lbn9m7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm9or4c1h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za4nj5f9brgn20n4rid8cppsdqu1e6s7rdfnc940_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm9or4c1h2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvk7o1619k2o02ncra84lfs5vo95vp6p4qb12qo0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm9or4c1h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv0u00fej29kemhumrahj230a7rghic5p8o1l8hg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm9or4c1h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5t4qq1glcsg2c2u7q1iaobe52637rf1upv16qdg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm9or4c1h2bs)
I hope I see you there.

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

body:
We need your help to shrink the size of the government! Complete the DOGE Survey today >>

|

| | |
Friend,

Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy have been handpicked for a monumental task: **To shrink the size of the federal government and reduce wasteful spending and excess.**

But House Republicans are on board, but we can't do it without you. **[Will you answer a few quick questions and help us get ready for 2025 today, Friend?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znud0quto6fgn9k777dq83nbalffhtvketbm2s10_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdjm9or4clh2bs "Will you answer a few quick questions and help us get ready for 2025 today, Friend?")**

name: Tim Scott
subject: Your personal invite to Trump’s inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Join us in Washington D.C. on January 20th to witness history as Donald J. Trump becomes the 47th President of the United States.

Hey friend,

The countdown is on -- President Donald J. Trump is headed back to the White House, and I want YOU to be there to celebrate this monumental moment alongside me and other Republican leaders.

We're giving away **[two tickets](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z19meph73gbrt9qtoudndcl70qe8h9ta7s3qpqvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge0pb4cjh2bs)** to the **[inauguration of the 47th President of the United States,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpjs05basqtlb9uojul13ncnjh6um95hb60hmil8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge0pb4cjh2bs)** plus **[hotel accommodations in Washington D.C.!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfupskvc2dg1667bm1l490mfhn4p53du38duujro_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge0pb4cjh2bs)**

And here's the best part: you're just a few clicks away from entering.

**[All you need to do is chip in ANY amount before 11:59 PM on Tuesday, January 14th -whether it's $5 or $50, your support gets you a shot at an unforgettable day.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5qbuulll1v2g484cfj2t6oabhh4vgcbvomhl7h0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge0pb4cjh2bs)**

******************************************************[ENTER NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhs29kmbhjubcsrkt2ppvs1ve7f6innisedqavno_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge0pb4cjh2bs)******************************************************

**[Imagine this:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zib49tqff5snvk1t5ckv6dn491k1j8g7tqpvli2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge0pb4cjh2bs)** standing on the National Mall, witnessing history unfold, being surrounded by fellow patriots celebrating this hard-fought victory, and knowing that YOU helped make it all possible.

This isn't just about tickets or a hotel stay-it's about being a part of something bigger than all of us. It's about renewing our commitment to America First values and the bright future we've worked so hard to build together.

So don't wait! The clock is ticking, and you won't want to miss out. **[Chip in any amount before 11:59 PM on Tuesday, January 14th, and you could be joining me and other Republican leaders in Washington, D.C., for a day you'll never forget!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd4foqmhcfrf0qhd0l0q722kj8557dv43vcfv810_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge0pb4cjh2bs)**

Let's make this historic day even more special-together.

See you there,
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs8tejpbr176ltfn3bvn4d7dk16qhod3d09g0j5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge0pb4cjh2bs)
**[Tim Scott](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zicroqqpg4cjjt0qdrqhbjitbvf2f95ovvbrp2c0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge0pb4cjh2bs)**
U.S. Senator, SC
Chairman, NRSC

******************************************************[CLICK HERE TO ENTER](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpdntjaie8neatbktogcmi013tbsi56f24c3l0b8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge0pb4cjh2bs)******************************************************

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

**[All you need to do is chip in ANY amount before 11:59 PM on Tuesday, January 14th -whether it's $5 or $50, your support gets you a shot at an unforgettable day.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zeinrfl0n5b4e8pv7c9likfamuba5ojqov5pnmm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge8ob2c3h2bs)**

******************************************************[>>> ENTER NOW <<<](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn4880qigbfgk0ka09h2gc1tf5p2mo1heq0ajbq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge8ob2c3h2bs)******************************************************

**[Imagine this:](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpanltb7ate9ocendqlorn63n8f0gu71ehqlfgr0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge8ob2c3h2bs)** standing on the National Mall, witnessing history unfold, being surrounded by fellow patriots celebrating this hard-fought victory, and knowing that YOU helped make it all possible.

This isn't just about tickets or a hotel stay-it's about being a part of something bigger than all of us. It's about renewing our commitment to America First values and the bright future we've worked so hard to build together.

So don't wait! The clock is ticking, and you won't want to miss out. **[Chip in any amount before 11:59 PM on Tuesday, January 14th, and you could be joining me and other Republican leaders in Washington, D.C., for a day you'll never forget!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu77qif6rs9rflmgeuf9u90215eum68hb3npbuh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge8ob2c3h2bs)**

name: Leader Scalise
subject: Political AMBUSH Against President Trump’sCabinet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I knew the Democrats would want revenge after getting CRUSHED at the ballot box...

| |
---
| | | _I knew the Democrats would want revenge after getting CRUSHED at the ballot box...

I knew they'd come for MAGA Republicans hard and fast...

And I knew President Trump's Cabinet would be a prime target for their revenge campaign..._

But this surprised even me. The Democrat Machine just unleashed a coordinated hatchet job against President Trump's top appointments.

_**[It's a sweeping political ambush and I need to fill you in immediately.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3m7kf47vuf7r8vkc8f3lj0lveuihdr94qj8lsj0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge8ob2c3h2bs "It’s a sweeping political ambush and I need to fill you in immediately. ")**_
- Elizabeth Warren fired off a propaganda letter calling **PETE HEGSETH** a potential 'insider threat' because of his Christian tattoo
- Adam Schiff went on ABC to attack **KASH PATEL'S** nomination to run the FBI
- Axios confirmed that Senate Democrats declined an expedited confirmation process for **TULSI GABBARD** for political purposes
- Blue state governors announced they'll defy Trump Border Czar **TOM HOMAN 'S** mass deportation plan of violent criminals
- Democrat Gov. Josh Green is jetting to DC in order to help torpedo the confirmation of **ROBERT F. KENNEDY JR.**
- Nancy Pelosi fired off a press release slamming **ELON MUSK** as being a 'puppet'
It's a national disgrace.

That's why I'm rushing to you with an urgent request:

_**[I'm respectfully asking Conservatives from ALL 50 STATES to help me support President Trump and his Administration, defend his top allies in Congress, and deliver on his mandate from the American People.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfdvh5qe9hmsea2vfqdk4csce2nugp9q0uk38elo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge8ob2c3h2bs "I’m respectfully asking true American Patriots from ALL 50 STATES to join me and stand with President Trump, each of his Cabinet picks, and his allies in the House at this key moment. It’ll take ALL OF US to stand up for what’s right to help see these nominations through.")**_
| | [PLEASE JOIN ME NOW](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z96vj5ebqjl17hu87gu9dj2sqhfcpq5t8ujd5klo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge8ob2c3h2bs "DEFEND TRUMP’S CABINET PICKS")
---

_As your House Majority Leader - and as an American - this political ambush against our duly elected 47th President infuriates me to my core._

But there's something that brings me comfort and I'll share it with you...

**The Democrats are desperate. They 're grasping at straws to do ANYTHING in their power to stay relevant and sabotage President Trump's second term. The election was certified. His historic victory is set in stone. And our mandate from the American People is ironclad. **

Now we need your help to deliver on it.

If ONE MILLION true American Patriots can join me right here and right now, we'll have the power and resources to fight back, deliver on his agenda, and support President Trump's vision for our country.

**I 'm personally asking you to step up and join me in this critical fight.**
| [PLEASE JOIN ME NOW](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrb9asjp1560b391gtgq9v06c9hvoecrsuo40i28_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge8ob2c3h2bs "DEFEND TRUMP’S CABINET PICKS")
---

Thanks for all you do for our movement.

- Steve Scalise

| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8pif0skr2c6cb600s2hf4njh4te7ttef4j1oe50_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge8ob2c3h2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z089hl5valge1pb4kpukb00d217e7kmuuvurl01g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge8ob2c3h2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
---
| | | [RESPOND NOW ->](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjp9sqnni5o3arouiola9l1t1jg6al6adpg5gq9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge8ob2c3h2bs "RESPOND NOW →")
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Invitation to Trump’s Inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Join me for President Trump’s historic Inauguration

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl3clb94t2v1nao7ktvu0rgrhrjia1vpldd9urug_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge4pj4clh2bs)
Friend,

America just suffered a jihadist attack, dozens are dead and injured, and a “pro-Palestinian” protest blocked 6th Ave in NYC the next day, rallying behind the murderers.

This perverse, upside-down world only ends when we stop importing cultures that hate us and deport those already here who reject our values and embrace a backward culture of terrorism and death.

_January 20th can’t come soon enough! _

I’m looking forward to having leadership that possesses the moral clarity to stop fighting useless foreign wars and instead preserve our way of life. And to celebrate the change in leadership, I want to send a lucky Turning Point PAC supporter to President Trump’s inauguration.

**Donate today for your chance to enter our giveaway of two tickets to an exclusive and UNFORGETTABLE inauguration weekend experience, complete with...**
* Round-trip flights for two to and from Washington, DC.
* Luxury hotel accommodations (one room) in DC from Friday, January 17, to Tuesday, January 21.
* Access for two to a rally with President Trump on the afternoon of Sunday, January 19, at the Capital One Arena.
* A VIP invitation for two to the exclusive Turning Point Ball on the evening of Sunday, January 19, at the Salamander Hotel in DC.
* Reserved seating for two at the Presidential inauguration on Monday, January 20.

[Enter Today >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1rc958o6vj35ed1mj5heetk9dcska5557q1g7qo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge4pj4clh2bs)
The Golden Age of America is coming.

Justice is coming.

Instead of having an FBI wrecked by DEI-like policies, President Trump will fight against the corruption in the FBI, strengthen our law enforcement agencies, and bring law and order back to our country.

That all begins on January 20th.

**The deadline to enter is January 10th, so if you want to be there IN PERSON, donate __TODAY__ to enter our giveaway of two tickets to celebrate President Trump’s triumphant return to the White House with me and the rest of the Turning Point crew! **
[Donate $25](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlm94tc1n3tv6o6otmg78dcuafqhe6lhamjsb288_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge4pj4clh2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6ski77ndtro081a5q4ut8llqvhjilu74i32ap4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge4pj4clh2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0b4ed56ka079rj9237aoqvoe0318hkfqfl6tpa8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge4pj4clh2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zngkjv2nccsvtlmsftt6bbhcp5cu0a9s117nqa7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge4pj4clh2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp7t1le6ijg81iir0o28ag2fhmkbk62mvj5i4hto_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge4pj4clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt69o7gd20c4jkp8scekktqge43kvict8ns1e9co_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge4pj4clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgjf9vnmud2kqnsqhgn5en5jjcl3aknhcpvo34m8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge4pj4clh2bs)
I hope I see you there.

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. name: The Babylon Bee
subject: Trump, Elon, & The Bee
body:
Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics.

| | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zosrshpnhdb4m2vhcrd6h9jtligd0r2tbnrfdcu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge4pj4clh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend, Voters have made their voices heard.Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics. For years, the left has used the liberal "news" media to spread their woke agenda, but it was largely behind closed doors. **That all changed when Twitter silenced The Babylon Bee for telling a joke.** The absurdity of a tech giant deplatforming a satirical site woke a sleeping giant.**_Enter Elon Musk._** Elon purchased Twitter and joined The Babylon Bee in starting a revolution that catapulted free speech to the election's frontlines.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z4u25vtb0d610gupnn67ct8ubfh4u8aukfc4rkag_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge4pj4clh2bs)
---
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2ziv0otdq54snoup0isl4q4grntlbhb9v8o0pgvf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge4pj4clh2bs)
---
_But, before millions gave censorship the middle finger at the polls,**it was our subscribers who stood strong against the left 's suppression of thought.**_**Without our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH wouldn 't have become such a major issue this election.** **[If you appreciate humor, I hope you'll subscribe to The Babylon Bee and join this growing revolution for truth, debate, and the free exchange of ideas.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zlhjiqdi8ds8vqoa4c2g0flk6tjv1bi28rhh5cqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge4pj4clh2bs)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2ztip0nvu3nhiv6iduif1jo61gqjeoc8sbe8hm640_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge4pj4clh2bs)
---
The left ignorantly believes that our subscribers -- Americans who like to laugh at the absurdity of our world -- are _" fringe."_ President Trump's landslide victory proves that there are **MILLIONS of people just like our subscribers** -- including unlikely Republican voters like Elon Musk and Joe Rogan -- who believe that free speech is a critical pillar of our democracy. [**While liberals have mental breakdowns and sob on TikTok, I hope you 'll become a Babylon Bee subscriber and support what Elon Musk calls, **"**a future where comedy is legal. "**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z13q68kdnhjiepuh43rs3q2vgajgt01t4dc9enlo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdge4pj4clh2bs)I'll leave you with this, a photo of two handsome men who love humor, the First Amendment, and America.

clean_body: Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics. | | | | Friend, Voters have made their voices heard.Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics. For years, the left has used the liberal "news" media to spread their woke agenda, but it was largely behind closed doors. That all changed when Twitter silenced The Babylon Bee for telling a joke. The absurdity of a tech giant deplatforming a satirical site woke a sleeping giant.Enter Elon Musk. Elon purchased Twitter and joined The Babylon Bee in starting a revolution that catapulted free speech to the election's frontlines. But, before millions gave censorship the middle finger at the polls,it was our subscribers who stood strong against the left 's suppression of thought.Without our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH wouldn 't have become such a major issue this election. The left ignorantly believes that our subscribers -- Americans who like to laugh at the absurdity of our world -- are " fringe." President Trump's landslide victory proves that there are MILLIONS of people just like our subscribers -- including unlikely Republican voters like Elon Musk and Joe Rogan -- who believe that free speech is a critical pillar of our democracy. leave you with this, a photo of two handsome men who love humor, the First Amendment, and America. Thanks for supporting free speech. We 'll never give up the fight.Seth Dillon CEO, The Babylon Bee Pronouns: Bee and Beeself | Copyright(C) 2023 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: The Babylon Bee, LLC PO Box 546 Jupiter, FL 33468 Update For America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Invitation to Trump’s Inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Join me for President Trump’s historic Inauguration

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn18gvqprcq3cfop82rlao199jf4ja58gqcq43g0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdgecoj2cdh2bs)
Friend,

America just suffered a jihadist attack, dozens are dead and injured, and a “pro-Palestinian” protest blocked 6th Ave in NYC the next day, rallying behind the murderers.

This perverse, upside-down world only ends when we stop importing cultures that hate us and deport those already here who reject our values and embrace a backward culture of terrorism and death.

_January 20th can’t come soon enough! _

I’m looking forward to having leadership that possesses the moral clarity to stop fighting useless foreign wars and instead preserve our way of life. And to celebrate the change in leadership, I want to send a lucky Turning Point PAC supporter to President Trump’s inauguration.

**Donate today for your chance to enter our giveaway of two tickets to an exclusive and UNFORGETTABLE inauguration weekend experience, complete with...**
* Round-trip flights for two to and from Washington, DC.
* Luxury hotel accommodations (one room) in DC from Friday, January 17, to Tuesday, January 21.
* Access for two to a rally with President Trump on the afternoon of Sunday, January 19, at the Capital One Arena.
* A VIP invitation for two to the exclusive Turning Point Ball on the evening of Sunday, January 19, at the Salamander Hotel in DC.
* Reserved seating for two at the Presidential inauguration on Monday, January 20.

[Enter Today >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6g3mhp1achbrnu5n19a7beldukoj08p8u9rod4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdgecoj2cdh2bs)
The Golden Age of America is coming.

Justice is coming.

Instead of having an FBI wrecked by DEI-like policies, President Trump will fight against the corruption in the FBI, strengthen our law enforcement agencies, and bring law and order back to our country.

That all begins on January 20th.

**The deadline to enter is January 10th, so if you want to be there IN PERSON, donate __TODAY__ to enter our giveaway of two tickets to celebrate President Trump’s triumphant return to the White House with me and the rest of the Turning Point crew! **
[Donate $25](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3vpmnc3vrkcn9v9ulisiba13edoquhjj3pa6doo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdgecoj2cdh2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z63h13t9ia5er928tv3726dtlvii2ta12ngprir8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdgecoj2cdh2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z079193md3stka98j8vd2qtafs7c36pnv903hcgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdgecoj2cdh2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z71stt986nm35fvslsuuuk9q3tu6pgvbegqqh2qo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdgecoj2cdh2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3a8uk5av99v2cedf71l2ihesacu8k3nd9l417g8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdgecoj2cdh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znqverrr1dj7imtsjg80rainimo7n5h08nhk89f8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdgecoj2cdh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1id9g4mbsn19t5sq8mqn065n0mn46d60f81fvqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cdgecoj2cdh2bs)
I hope I see you there.

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Big Trump Knife
subject: Introducing The 10" Big Trump Knife
body:
The fixed blade knife comes with a belt sheath for ease of carry...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19731/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/b2c8e11181989938726b755332b81e7fd2005baf). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.

If you believe in **“Taking America Back”** with President Donald Trump in 2024, then you need this massive statement-making fixed blade knife.

The BIG Trump Knife is [laser-etched on a stainless steel blade with a waving American Flag and a stainless steel half-guard keeps your fingers from slipping.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19731/6374453/736cf2add146fcc23614e7c22ec8e7939496ae6c/b2c8e11181989938726b755332b81e7fd2005baf)

Friend,

Three crucial House seats are headed to special elections, and we need your immediate support to defend our majority. _**These seats are the key to maintaining our America First agenda, and Democrats are already mobilizing to take them from us.**_

subject: I am personally inviting you to the inauguration

body:
Join us in Washington D.C. on January 20th to witness history as Donald J. Trump becomes the 47th President of the United States.

Hey friend,

The countdown is on -- President Donald J. Trump is headed back to the White House, and I want YOU to be there to celebrate this monumental moment alongside me and other Republican leaders.

We're giving away **[two tickets](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=444c74b2b1b340df95f4a5ed16790ea0&_e=fwcnz8R3t8BLAUZQCYAVw5Ec303_eWDuZeTw-6829YXmnBYKQXN4pqmup3Ecmyzge_yo50m7yWT34bfchIyagjx1e_0kMvmJH1__VSBGLKUMi8qO0pBLbSYXwea8AGgn4LU27wqqESGZYVFD2Iiuqwwt6S4a1kU3zrc9QDNrcOeE321-dhFtMo-COvN7xq47rfTvOzXN1a4l9bVUjsmOLnu4KlYhMwTKgBQ8hrZ93JyLjaUKZyVgmOB1Dx7lI6LFvX9lKfTrMUy3iVXxde-V3c0Xjb4bNUsN2LrHIHVCVwFEwspZH27JavcAxer4P8wm2wZDprguXLFiJ4EeVRs8EANUIRT6yNo_m-UPx7l_JGld-kxFkfrYSzlbcqTi5tg6usv9JNsnNx9ZSuMdSSKk8_DWJLnZNpVrG4K9CczeGKnxWLuhicHq-WV-W2-MRPkMUYud_EOas7QJVabIauYq3eILUHWGkmFki23DBgpCVmWKawFKt8F5dStLc84Ev_KS)** **[Imagine this:](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=444c74b2b1b340df95f4a5ed16790ea0&_e=fwcnz8R3t8BLAUZQCYAVw5Ec303_eWDuZeTw-6829YXmnBYKQXN4pqmup3Ecmyzge_yo50m7yWT34bfchIyagjx1e_0kMvmJH1__VSBGLKUMi8qO0pBLbSYXwea8AGgn4LU27wqqESGZYVFD2Iiuqwwt6S4a1kU3zrc9QDNrcOeE321-dhFtMo-COvN7xq47rfTvOzXN1a4l9bVUjsmOLnu4KlYhMwTKgBQ8hrZ93JyLjaUKZyVgmOB1Dx7lI6LFvX9lKfTrMUy3iVXxde-V3c0Xjb4bNUsN2LrHIHVCVwFEwspZH27JavcAxer4P8wm2wZDprguXLFiJ4EeVRs8EANUIRT6yNo_m-UPx7l_JGmQ4Va8EUXRPSiANkHqkaeeqSPNUd8DXdLFHlXoNqNyvgfyxLijPIyyAhjDMcreteWEMCEFcJGNEZ3Ab5-SKzq4PrSa8yDFQ5fypPadBP-jfadeacTk9-WaZea7RW7sQ1jIvLaiqt3Ym5_oiN-lRTbb)** standing on the National Mall, witnessing history unfold, being surrounded by fellow patriots celebrating this hard-fought victory, and knowing that YOU helped make it all possible.

This isn't just about tickets or a hotel stay-it's about being a part of something bigger than all of us. It's about renewing our commitment to America First values and the bright future we've worked so hard to build together.

So don't wait! The clock is ticking, and you won't want to miss out. **[Chip in any amount before 11:59 PM on Tuesday, January 14th, and you could be joining me and other Republican leaders in Washington, D.C., for a day you'll never forget!](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=444c74b2b1b340df95f4a5ed16790ea0&_e=fwcnz8R3t8BLAUZQCYAVw5Ec303_eWDuZeTw-6829YXmnBYKQXN4pqmup3Ecmyzge_yo50m7yWT34bfchIyagjx1e_0kMvmJH1__VSBGLKUMi8qO0pBLbSYXwea8AGgn4LU27wqqESGZYVFD2Iiuqwwt6S4a1kU3zrc9QDNrcOeE321-dhFtMo-COvN7xq47rfTvOzXN1a4l9bVUjsmOLnu4KlYhMwTKgBQ8hrZ93JyLjaUKZyVgmOB1Dx7lI6LFvX9lKfTrMUy3iVXxde-V3c0Xjb4bNUsN2LrHIHVCVwFEwspZH27JavcAxer4P8wm2wZDprguXLFiJ4EeVRs8EANUIRT6yNo_m-UPx7l_JGnoworxBj6FrRGcV-UsP4WRCkXknHiZxdVj_tY38d0i863FcsJRQ2j5hSBaMO4KEvGA1bvfRwOhpn1W2Tmbj-ujWNwLs521NB1iSnmGxvBFqry4ZtqJodopWxbunCuwqBFp-GSQ0npi12bHBcK0Nu8K)**

clean_body: Join us in Washington D.C. on January 20th to witness history as Donald J. Trump becomes the 47th President of the United States. Hey friend, The countdown is on -- President Donald J. Trump is headed back to the White House, and I want YOU to be there to celebrate this monumental moment alongside me and other Republican leaders. We're giving away to the plus And here's the best part: you're just a few clicks away from entering. ****************************************************-************************************************** standing on the National Mall, witnessing history unfold, being surrounded by fellow patriots celebrating this hard-fought victory, and knowing that YOU helped make it all possible. This isn't just about tickets or a hotel stay-it's about being a part of something bigger than all of us. It's about renewing our commitment to America First values and the bright future we've worked so hard to build together. So don't wait! The clock is ticking, and you won't want to miss out. Let's make this historic day even more special-together. See you there, U.S. Senator, SC Chairman, NRSC ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: JUST RELEASED -------------------- From Team Marsha
subject: Donald Trump’s Official Criminal Sentence in the SHAM New York Case -
body:
View immediately:

| |
---
| | | | | |
_**[Just Released: Donald J. Trump’s Official Criminal Sentence in the SHAM New York Case](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NYv/?__vbtrk=MjY5NDYwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5NDYwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "Just Released: Donald J. Trump’s Official Criminal Sentence in the SHAM New York Case")**_
---
| | | | | [VIEW IMMEDIATELY](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NYv/?__vbtrk=MjY5NDYwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5NDYwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "VIEW IMMEDIATELY")
---
* * *

_In a New York courtroom, Crooked Judge Juan Merchan just took the FINAL step in making Donald J. Trump a convicted felon._

**Yes, you read that right...**

**Just _DAYS_ before his Inauguration, our 45th and soon-to-be 47th President was just sentenced as a _CONVICTED FELON! _**

President Trump has faced legal warfare, baseless charges, and bogus cases. He was forced to take a mugshot like a common criminal, politically prosecuted in the most SHAM trial this country has ever seen, and found GUILTY. The odds were stacked against him from the start, yet he has never wavered in his fight to defend himself and our country from crazed political radicals.

The liberal mob behind this witch hunt has not held anything back. They will stop at nothing to defeat Donald Trump.

**This should concern EVERY freedom-loving conservative nationwide. If they can weaponize our justice system against a former and soon-to-be SITTING President, imagine what they can do to YOU.**

Despite the trials and tribulations he has been forced to face through the ENDLESS political witch hunt, _President Trump has never given up his fight to protect us, our Constitution, and our country. And he isn’t giving up that fight now!_

Now, we need to fight for him! Donald Trump did NOTHING wrong. We know it, but we need to make sure the world knows it too by joining the call to CLEAR President Trump’s good name.

_**So, here’s what we need to do now:**_

_**[In the next few hours, we must collect 5,000,000 signatures from America's most loyal, conservative MAGA patriots. Together, we will demand this unlawful conviction is APPEALED AND OVERTURNED immediately to clear President Trump’s name ONCE AND FOR ALL!](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NYv/?__vbtrk=MjY5NDYwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5NDYwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "In the next few hours, we must collect 5,000,000 signatures from America's most loyal, conservative MAGA patriots. Together, we will demand this unlawful conviction is APPEALED AND OVERTURNED immediately to clear President Trump’s name ONCE AND FOR ALL!conservative MAGA patriots. Together, we will demand this unlawful conviction is APPEALED AND OVERTURNED immediately to clear President Trump’s name ONCE AND FOR ALL!")**_

---

OFFICIAL EMERGENCY TEAM MARSHA PETITION:
**JOIN OUR CALLS TO CLEAR PRESIDENT TRUMP’S NAME**

**Goal: 5,000,000 Signatures
Your Signature: MISSING
[Deadline: ASAP](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NYv/?__vbtrk=MjY5NDYwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5NDYwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "Deadline: ASAP")**

**[SIGN NOW: X__________](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NYv/?__vbtrk=MjY5NDYwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5NDYwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "SIGN NOW: X__________")**

---

**This battle is FAR from over.**

President Trump will need to know who is on his side and who he can count on in the days to come.

_So, we’ll be on the lookout for your signature. Team Marsha will flag the names of everyone who steps up in the next HOUR directly to Donald Trump’s team so they can see your support first-hand._

\- Team Marsha
