name: The Babylon Bee
subject: What Americans love more than bacon
body:
Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=450cd1d471444846a8d3b89b50c6a495&_e=pYinehb6Vt6HXk4J1YlvyPTJS3H6pxzHBdpUfpNnS6s42t54YnxmFgoXPT7GwQfndyGZy-7Ub5xA8id-g4PZMy0rOYkLqhW3R7kmCmmTFEYTrY3ryYUXLJg7wP4KnYbfJDnkREiQmLPJ0dvEJ1WNIZgz1bZE1JGK37vn_TUM_u2Uiq_RV_ASEbj4GEFUK4xWyiylvtAPDvop8fN7clG2l2IZWflF1RE0MnyJDKFlUGnM-DYP8_fpAb-ouu5ZZjVGQ4TvxKaZwykp3dusH1lXDA%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Friend, Voters have made their voices heard.Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics. For years, the left has used the liberal "news" media to spread their woke agenda, but it was largely behind closed doors. **That all changed when Twitter silenced The Babylon Bee for telling a joke.** The absurdity of a tech giant deplatforming a satirical site woke a sleeping giant.**_Enter Elon Musk._** Elon purchased Twitter and joined The Babylon Bee in starting a revolution that catapulted free speech to the election's frontlines.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=450cd1d471444846a8d3b89b50c6a495&_e=pYinehb6Vt6HXk4J1YlvyPTJS3H6pxzHBdpUfpNnS6s42t54YnxmFgoXPT7GwQfndyGZy-7Ub5xA8id-g4PZMy0rOYkLqhW3R7kmCmmTFEYTrY3ryYUXLJg7wP4KnYbfUTaz_d235mwaMPmiyDbHsjUycm6IwCh0un5lnUX2sU77aoivD1YECXQ6mfOlgqcqA8c_jK9C_em9lojBTD-iUibTQo-OHjIy4g2moNvezXik-TJvVEm5n0UZRvPMQrt_QJGlBx5txZyjLB_hsfTf1w%3D%3D)
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=450cd1d471444846a8d3b89b50c6a495&_e=pYinehb6Vt6HXk4J1YlvyPTJS3H6pxzHBdpUfpNnS6s42t54YnxmFgoXPT7GwQfndyGZy-7Ub5xA8id-g4PZMy0rOYkLqhW3R7kmCmmTFEYTrY3ryYUXLJg7wP4KnYbf3bXkf6NJt4JRbO1BoctJ8naFa6wqExvXNXJDUGVQrKEtzvuWdv7QH17n0DCElVT8ywBp7xmwFt9gfi2eYTdA93FVL8-g2EfRkzmfe8QVZ1BJt1mHtMFcXEpVcgnJxpAbTyDLktPwPWsVillBfl_VAw%3D%3D)
---
_But, before millions gave censorship the middle finger at the polls,**it was our subscribers who stood strong against the left 's suppression of thought.**_**Without our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH wouldn 't have become such a major issue this election.** **[If you appreciate humor, I hope you'll subscribe to The Babylon Bee and join this growing revolution for truth, debate, and the free exchange of ideas.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=450cd1d471444846a8d3b89b50c6a495&_e=pYinehb6Vt6HXk4J1YlvyPTJS3H6pxzHBdpUfpNnS6s42t54YnxmFgoXPT7GwQfndyGZy-7Ub5xA8id-g4PZMy0rOYkLqhW3R7kmCmmTFEYTrY3ryYUXLJg7wP4KnYbf7QL_Yp_8KfKDKKBWdUfK51y-1kzUDToL8-7F9YRw9CPtFA0oLlbd40pVyGKZDrz26DE9HSLSKEZhYQaJOl-Rs5cPFWnADPqqSWbu6qvZ4gNXJc_RAByAHMUi6g-Q487Qb_kOqOJHOi_w1awgHGD9yw%3D%3D)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=450cd1d471444846a8d3b89b50c6a495&_e=pYinehb6Vt6HXk4J1YlvyPTJS3H6pxzHBdpUfpNnS6s42t54YnxmFgoXPT7GwQfndyGZy-7Ub5xA8id-g4PZMy0rOYkLqhW3R7kmCmmTFEYTrY3ryYUXLJg7wP4KnYbfFXAl4xLCxVMBpqVYFjTKTzb5ceyJVFYPgKOsaykNV3fBu7Th22yFAaEYXODZaVLRmz4OQ5LJlTFQM9UIrbJm12sy_gieZ6OUq7rkoDy1x5Ut8a0URuzE6PdKJjlHBPmEu91APmwf7mJ1noTKkcVN_w%3D%3D)
---
The left ignorantly believes that our subscribers -- Americans who like to laugh at the absurdity of our world -- are _" fringe."_ President Trump's landslide victory proves that there are **MILLIONS of people just like our subscribers** -- including unlikely Republican voters like Elon Musk and Joe Rogan -- who believe that free speech is a critical pillar of our democracy. [**While liberals have mental breakdowns and sob on TikTok, I hope you 'll become a Babylon Bee subscriber and support what Elon Musk calls, **"**a future where comedy is legal. "**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=450cd1d471444846a8d3b89b50c6a495&_e=pYinehb6Vt6HXk4J1YlvyPTJS3H6pxzHBdpUfpNnS6s42t54YnxmFgoXPT7GwQfndyGZy-7Ub5xA8id-g4PZMy0rOYkLqhW3R7kmCmmTFEYTrY3ryYUXLJg7wP4KnYbf8shqjnMxAz8xhQrJ-8IgqpiNSIiEoVEA_LXS7RDY3jqWkdYPO_kLyygKOIzOHXsFMMIFyEt5J-o_Oss8OuQHESG2Q8ivI2gqi25A5k_OVteq0H-dRmK4dgWVAcRUcVOPWhNzoBcTX47YolO1Yxof9w%3D%3D)I'll leave you with this, a photo of two handsome men who love humor, the First Amendment, and America.
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=450cd1d471444846a8d3b89b50c6a495&_e=pYinehb6Vt6HXk4J1YlvyPTJS3H6pxzHBdpUfpNnS6s42t54YnxmFgoXPT7GwQfndyGZy-7Ub5xA8id-g4PZMy0rOYkLqhW3R7kmCmmTFEYTrY3ryYUXLJg7wP4KnYbffgcFJTuWXRyDzph2kwGhtAR2SeqZT_PGmzjab3N7QBHkSowbVu-mdjjJH5OcU_72nzX8Cldiyefo66h8gYLhZld3Bx3vjrfE6jAGE2PKc3G86Io3wfzGQ6cfkLnbinUkLyx_y2UmnTnV8P83PKsZHA%3D%3D)
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=450cd1d471444846a8d3b89b50c6a495&_e=pYinehb6Vt6HXk4J1YlvyPTJS3H6pxzHBdpUfpNnS6s42t54YnxmFgoXPT7GwQfndyGZy-7Ub5xA8id-g4PZMy0rOYkLqhW3R7kmCmmTFEYTrY3ryYUXLJg7wP4KnYbfFJX2-1vAY3K5dPvBAkGcbO4yrC_B4UqKCn4x3InTI4yyJ0k0soLtwPsp_YW48n2-yCziez71nOkQzK-OLXMorIQ1fmVNWPcFEkvjfZB25UuUBKLkINZyGFOG8hCqr66KCoEeqhq1qgMHQD6wCuv4Ww%3D%3D)
---
Thanks for supporting free speech. **We 'll never give up the fight.**Seth Dillon
CEO, The Babylon Bee

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

subject: If you want truth to win, please open this email.
body:
You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind

| | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=343d920851684f1e9557274f0da6cc38&_e=Y1kWDGnWbNnPdCW_TWVyxEswYrqz5ky--ja-uB4wQbpI8AZJKBCAGcTNqSbtT0wPX66-LFFRs2EyBVO2JQHCUKnveuuULujdRC0GbtOxGdO2fDLE2DiViXWNKWDnFDZZO0CXbe6Zf9maa7nolbXnEoYBfzQxyP5fBJ2lNoYdA9V_-BaXxF62kozsGzKLZn9DRj89lsVUCJcI2B9ex9KpqiQLijWc-iGYGqOR6-KNiJ89ukjVjLxDCbJGtvOLkPa_XqS5_Aa1j9df1lcruwS3m1g8NO4uwvgFK-uzMojtdNqjNWk9Q3PIiCbfk-6jrUZdEdFPdfMD4vUtvvJsTjPzTHJ_PxcOf06UO-g2R0iG-tgcwAif5Z18cpOaQlvjf5WyaebXuIkDDYBt-8QmrLTUWA%3D%3D)

Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, **[I need you to join the fight.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=343d920851684f1e9557274f0da6cc38&_e=Y1kWDGnWbNnPdCW_TWVyxEswYrqz5ky--ja-uB4wQbpI8AZJKBCAGcTNqSbtT0wPX66-LFFRs2EyBVO2JQHCUKnveuuULujdRC0GbtOxGdO2fDLE2DiViXWNKWDnFDZZO0CXbe6Zf9maa7nolbXnEoYBfzQxyP5fBJ2lNoYdA9V_-BaXxF62kozsGzKLZn9DRj89lsVUCJcI2B9ex9KpqiQLijWc-iGYGqOR6-KNiJ89ukjVjLxDCbJGtvOLkPa_vBBnE98QzLSF5097IiVDmPeoD7t0pau4Ja8thbhjW_h2ab3imESyAFvq_ckqRAXNj5kmypmsSY_cuztrTnQY3TXznic8dOlKX7fqHHFbC1pkG9mM3TIlpE6REUiQkIo2WqiOW5m0B29ZPV58W49ZgA%3D%3D)** Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. **[**And that's why your support to Brave Books today is so critical.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=343d920851684f1e9557274f0da6cc38&_e=Y1kWDGnWbNnPdCW_TWVyxEswYrqz5ky--ja-uB4wQbpI8AZJKBCAGcTNqSbtT0wPX66-LFFRs2EyBVO2JQHCUKnveuuULujdRC0GbtOxGdO2fDLE2DiViXWNKWDnFDZZO0CXbe6Zf9maa7nolbXnEoYBfzQxyP5fBJ2lNoYdA9V_-BaXxF62kozsGzKLZn9DRj89lsVUCJcI2B9ex9KpqiQLijWc-iGYGqOR6-KNiJ89ukjVjLxDCbJGtvOLkPa_ftnhdcBl7OaGxAw_jKtYXRlcC6BCzYrcxJ5tqS683kuHLKhJlAtnyyRu5-GjL8AuZBf-QOPQpgkdLeKXSQfR3Wk1oFctP7IU7Hy5YgeM8re8FQHhne8hJNsvM0DI_MYEoa50nVAmeD48KTXH0kkYyQ%3D%3D)** I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. **[**And the #1 thing you can do today is help by giving your best donation to Brave Books right now.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=343d920851684f1e9557274f0da6cc38&_e=Y1kWDGnWbNnPdCW_TWVyxEswYrqz5ky--ja-uB4wQbpI8AZJKBCAGcTNqSbtT0wPX66-LFFRs2EyBVO2JQHCUKnveuuULujdRC0GbtOxGdO2fDLE2DiViXWNKWDnFDZZO0CXbe6Zf9maa7nolbXnEoYBfzQxyP5fBJ2lNoYdA9V_-BaXxF62kozsGzKLZn9DRj89lsVUCJcI2B9ex9KpqiQLijWc-iGYGqOR6-KNiJ89ukjVjLxDCbJGtvOLkPa_E6RXWgWrvfP7jcpBfqfJXOaadKKZ1y-k6NHVlHP7RhNP4xCAhyAQxU6tcWiLhUCgDBK8ntihr-O9vOchJmqTw3w6tVDcplkpve3RCRFfhfv2E1BD7VPzFwj2c5WC3NW-jp8f7T1_HBcvKvEHMj4T7Q%3D%3D)** If you've heard of **Brave Books** , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on _Fox News_ for countering the Left's horrible poison. **Brave Books** fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian **Kirk Cameron** (_Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof_) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great **Brave Books** with conservative messages such as:
---
* _The Test of Lionhood_ by **Kevin Sorbo --** Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good.
* _The Night the Snow Monster Attacked_ by **General Michael Flynn --** Shows children what it takes to be a good leader.
* _Happy No Snake Day_ by**Riley Gaines --** Encourages children to stand up for the truth.
* _Because You're My Family_ by **Missy Robertson --** Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love.

---
| | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several **Brave Books**. But my favorite is _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at **Brave Books** aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My **Brave Book** , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. **[That's why I hope you’ll support Brave Books today by giving a gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=343d920851684f1e9557274f0da6cc38&_e=Y1kWDGnWbNnPdCW_TWVyxEswYrqz5ky--ja-uB4wQbpI8AZJKBCAGcTNqSbtT0wPX66-LFFRs2EyBVO2JQHCUKnveuuULujdRC0GbtOxGdO2fDLE2DiViXWNKWDnFDZZO0CXbe6Zf9maa7nolbXnEoYBfzQxyP5fBJ2lNoYdA9V_-BaXxF62kozsGzKLZn9DRj89lsVUCJcI2B9ex9KpqiQLijWc-iGYGqOR6-KNiJ89ukjVjLxDCbJGtvOLkPa_kPFkwHEoFXsqhggADMrWCqJaIaMFJ9MeESOEiZ6DSwJw5PpVysqmOOdDJOUGgTg9lx4Vmm04DDxo6EJm1Qi1GBZqGc33Ech8PvarkS2KZVdiqNoM-E5xDeU2T6bYS6NusDyhIrZi8iEYkz4YTLnRKg%3D%3D)** Your gift helps **Brave Books** create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.**I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your[gift of $100 or more](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=343d920851684f1e9557274f0da6cc38&_e=Y1kWDGnWbNnPdCW_TWVyxEswYrqz5ky--ja-uB4wQbpI8AZJKBCAGcTNqSbtT0wPX66-LFFRs2EyBVO2JQHCUKnveuuULujdRC0GbtOxGdO2fDLE2DiViXWNKWDnFDZZO0CXbe6Zf9maa7nolbXnEoYBfzQxyP5fBJ2lNoYdA9V_-BaXxF62kozsGzKLZn9DRj89lsVUCJcI2B9ex9KpqiQLijWc-iGYGqOR6-KNiJ89ukjVjLxDCbJGtvOLkPa_DnQRTPe6bCaGPmBoRnd8ca--2CIQkXK1pbWQrZBoimxIfpgtn3vaf0IBZ8VEoY-aeexepifLdcdZQdNO8T1dJXzWzZiHZ0c9xtWxGMpDwzZLuqDyMYsED6UQC_MP9vZZeienVX0NFSwU1FP-fw8PGQ%3D%3D), I'll send you a copy of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ as a special "Thank you" from me.** Sharing the lessons of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children,

clean_body: You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind | | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology. | | | | Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. If you've heard of Brave Books , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on Fox News for countering the Left's horrible poison. Brave Books fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian Kirk Cameron (Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great Brave Books with conservative messages such as: The Test of Lionhood by Kevin Sorbo -- Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good. The Night the Snow Monster Attacked by General Michael Flynn -- Shows children what it takes to be a good leader. Happy No Snake Day byRiley Gaines -- Encourages children to stand up for the truth. Because You're My Family by Missy Robertson -- Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love. | | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several Brave Books. But my favorite is Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at Brave Books aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My Brave Book , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled The Never-Give-Up Pup and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In The Never-Give-Up Pup , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. Your gift helps Brave Books create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your, I'll send you a copy of The Never-Give-Up Pup as a special "Thank you" from me. Sharing the lessons of The Never-Give-Up Pup with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children, | | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author | | | Lara Trump Wife, Mother, and Author | | | P.S. If we do nothing, we're just handing America's children over to the Left. Thank you! - Lara | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Troy Downing
subject: I want you to know my story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I’d be honored to have your support

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._Q)
---
Peter, it's Troy Downing. I’ve spent my entire life fighting for America - from overseas in Afghanistan to at home as Montana State Auditor and now a Congressman.

I’ve always had a strong sense of public service, which led me to join the Air Force after 9/11 and inspired me to run for office. _**But being in Congress will be a new challenge I can’t take on alone. **_

[**Peter, will you take a moment to read my story and chip in to help me in my first months in Congress?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-Mj6fh4kIdyQMBAId-sg)
---
[ READ TROY'S STORY](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[ CHIP IN NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-bGS6tQ89Ikt6PTQ)
---
Thank you for your support,
---

---
Troy Downing

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=400db7b7ee8644b789cd5129833fba9e&_e=6LTPiBGbyTrkm0C_Y-1yyyZnbrMkYnqh-IsD71iRiDeYrD7L0RW0--vE1LwJWP3yQFVdXCIIJUJLetINiwo_0TQ2uO3HJjEmt_qSvNtPuwUBguEFPq9xBz1U8f6NrVnm7DeXh21sT9u8P5f9zJa5RZfnbWI7zY9yn92jFaNqCADPoXjTdlZAnpjeRaAQLbNtHvXG4oHKmR4kotMhfZZHq7WY7Ls8kGBJWSwqA8Z9gFw_HRX1t8JyKcZ7vjwAYDdWJ-oXpZtcKzPiwiC2fB9OKp7hCy3QAH6KYywjqQO5ZtLi9ulEB1EZqgm2q9pJiiSoy-vHIeMINTBClk1p-B8LglT8gYrOrcaYyLDiFgT_kWbOWkfhRsavL0X779joU7f0Yp_nljOxpjKTN1GE9MvbY7UFPLB9IBLve7QuoYg4xn-pcStvxmbr1-JRUDnlalVe) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=400db7b7ee8644b789cd5129833fba9e&_e=6LTPiBGbyTrkm0C_Y-1yyyZnbrMkYnqh-IsD71iRiDeYrD7L0RW0--vE1LwJWP3yQFVdXCIIJUJLetINiwo_0TQ2uO3HJjEmt_qSvNtPuwUBguEFPq9xBz1U8f6NrVnm7DeXh21sT9u8P5f9zJa5RZfnbWI7zY9yn92jFaNqCADPoXjTdlZAnpjeRaAQLbNtHvXG4oHKmR4kotMhfZZHq7WY7Ls8kGBJWSwqA8Z9gFw_HRX1t8JyKcZ7vjwAYDdWJ-oXpZtcKzPiwiC2fB9OKp7hCy3QAH6KYywjqQO5ZtJ6hqsIMCbwiJIyDk8U9tA7LnlC34RmXn7nL9lq1B-fPVEy2QNcXKidzDmEkqZAlh2dpL37Btk8OPYLSYnF4CfIQ_E9tej9UV7afqYmz0dTDSxsVU06e-KeVv2QFM6S9AMVFF4-uvl33VdoZQ8SO4mO)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=400db7b7ee8644b789cd5129833fba9e&_e=6LTPiBGbyTrkm0C_Y-1yyyZnbrMkYnqh-IsD71iRiDeYrD7L0RW0--vE1LwJWP3yQFVdXCIIJUJLetINiwo_0TQ2uO3HJjEmt_qSvNtPuwUBguEFPq9xBz1U8f6NrVnm7DeXh21sT9u8P5f9zJa5RZfnbWI7zY9yn92jFaNqCADPoXjTdlZAnpjeRaAQLbNtHvXG4oHKmR4kotMhfZZHq7WY7Ls8kGBJWSwqA8Z9gFw_HRX1t8JyKcZ7vjwAYDdWJ-oXpZtcKzPiwiC2fB9OKp7hCy3QAH6KYywjqQO5ZtKYloTufie2fxm2TCnAYOyRbO9eq1w_UetuuS9xw5GRVXb_1r0EWkpVtj8b0DX1hQ6GGKXFf-L6wyYlwL9m7Ea0GUlfZ7LiINmocyhlKOh3G09Vb5e_xiTfqIVa0Z_MdKszI32uNm5IwDr4BU-ODsM0),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=400db7b7ee8644b789cd5129833fba9e&_e=6LTPiBGbyTrkm0C_Y-1yyyZnbrMkYnqh-IsD71iRiDeYrD7L0RW0--vE1LwJWP3yQFVdXCIIJUJLetINiwo_0TQ2uO3HJjEmt_qSvNtPuwUBguEFPq9xBz1U8f6NrVnm7DeXh21sT9u8P5f9zJa5RZfnbWI7zY9yn92jFaNqCADPoXjTdlZAnpjeRaAQLbNtHvXG4oHKmR4kotMhfZZHq7WY7Ls8kGBJWSwqA8Z9gFw_HRX1t8JyKcZ7vjwAYDdWJ-oXpZtcKzPiwiC2fB9OKp7hCy3QAH6KYywjqQO5ZtK1m-pinnjRZjsMKN1MX5OoFq_WvYsF6xhhnEf-N-jdvyhp091qXNlkO3slfaQ8Q15Jfd6sn5F7TZvg3USEB9byrH1i1ByQ8MoR1CNTXlQgK2PvCGKcoHWO2rtb_dNcfP-IhJRaSrL6JBV-ydCN73k1)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=400db7b7ee8644b789cd5129833fba9e&_e=6LTPiBGbyTrkm0C_Y-1yyyZnbrMkYnqh-IsD71iRiDeYrD7L0RW0--vE1LwJWP3yQFVdXCIIJUJLetINiwo_0TQ2uO3HJjEmt_qSvNtPuwUBguEFPq9xBz1U8f6NrVnm7DeXh21sT9u8P5f9zJa5RZfnbWI7zY9yn92jFaNqCADPoXjTdlZAnpjeRaAQLbNtHvXG4oHKmR4kotMhfZZHq7WY7Ls8kGBJWSwqA8Z9gFw_HRX1t8JyKcZ7vjwAYDdWJ-oXpZtcKzPiwiC2fB9OKp7hCy3QAH6KYywjqQO5ZtLt-fjUkR3jOpzvUSGQDDLJg0nAyzsxKR6vR7_3Mq2vhb95ZYW4e6h5pQpsn0Ir_X8Qc1vHEYlGFx4Hjho1mXXemG2ukFnrszdO5_UtBG3oFASvM8I0Qq65ldt62SS-ateBKLuhGWan0qMw0Mth3CRX) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

| Did you hear, FirstName or ‘folks’? The 119th Congress, led by a razor-thin House majority, is officially in charge on Capitol Hill. That’s the bad news, but we have some good news: Because of MAGA Republicans Elise Stefanik, Matt Gaetz, and Mike Waltz leaving the House, Democrats have ONE MORE CHANCE to FLIP THE HOUSE. With the GOP unable to lose any votes from passing extremist legislation, we need to take advantage and make a Democratic House majority the firewall to stop Trump and Project 2025. [So to help Democrats build momentum, we set a 24-HOUR goal of $60,000 to support Democrats in these three House races. Will you chip in $5, $10, or anything you can spare, to help us reach this critical goal?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf4058862-0f7a-48f2-a001-104eac7fd43e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b142e35dde2345ddad2935d858281dd9&_e=8WBBm2CeIY7DAs_nJ4uTvh6Cwu7nbcQh-LlcirZ9T_BWoYq5HDId_pKhTPbM1_LkumDIHPAdcq8CWk0k915Gz4QYMo6Gr2S-gNi0g4vOPsvbt4xWB6aleh2sesKLEZrZlUVrUkWNseiLDP91AkqhQtvXH1_wBKHQJmcIau9VktLbxvdPHVMdTadJXxOQbpAQ4Pv5Ozs_GQU7IPnJyeX9Qf-bHmlbIpYrGoaN4U68AmK80k401EM4GFoJ7FJYi92IMChvT3QvK3rle4bEunMtk0uL09-Jc9N0QInT0PEOHNPdI-99fv_ZtAEvFz2bOejPw1HtAh4ezd8SLr6xI_wQXlEhqFW9emWrnlf6r13hGsXakPMYfzDDl60as_pdQ2pr_R8PzBD6oF-KxTtXK5JF8dvm38rpHRLBcg8HnU4A0H8q3Z_pUdi3iwi2f9g6TMuZ)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b142e35dde2345ddad2935d858281dd9&_e=8WBBm2CeIY7DAs_nJ4uTvh6Cwu7nbcQh-LlcirZ9T_BWoYq5HDId_pKhTPbM1_LkumDIHPAdcq8CWk0k915Gz4QYMo6Gr2S-gNi0g4vOPsvbt4xWB6aleh2sesKLEZrZlUVrUkWNseiLDP91AkqhQtvXH1_wBKHQJmcIau9VktLbxvdPHVMdTadJXxOQbpAQ4Pv5Ozs_GQU7IPnJyeX9Qf-bHmlbIpYrGoaN4U68AmK80k401EM4GFoJ7FJYi92IMChvT3QvK3rle4bEunMtk0uL09-Jc9N0QInT0PEOHNO9rBYKfqo-8NsZHtRa7LeDAXaMYbFba3rv1SGSLubVOCeKjU_fa0GfGHsyE2p0AtYZqM638wNdWfZ1sI6pIxn7DUIvw1rsy4CPBe5iA6Rf_-ITJQ39ZhtUeWAjZcl9KuFKr7BZfJ8urjZ_gidLTzTa) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. body:
Join me for President Trump’s historic Inauguration

|
---
| | [](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyU0MFugzAQBNCvMTfQem1wLj5Uiril1x6tBTbEkjGWWdLfr5KqH9DzjEZP83ULN4op5vWTNvZSJdQj7EWClEJzG_MzCrcx07kGBOxb0K3GYJrFW4eLGRr22plhuFitoXl4BwQzLkTaojYMjnvuwTHd2VI_uCb61w5ojRp6ANuBJdMP9mLu02T5MikLlLjK0cmDK5dzSnGmLExbN-9bk_xDpBzKfCgcFY4Hz2fljjIvu7waCse3XuFY6Nd-VpK4Z2XGU7Yw01YorlmZ659F4fBO9iycRZmrVGmqX8p3TCkeg1MW1o1iehPkP089Pf4EAAD__5Szc4A)
Friend,

America just suffered a jihadist attack, dozens are dead and injured, and a “pro-Palestinian” protest blocked 6th Ave in NYC the next day, rallying behind the murderers.

This perverse, upside-down world only ends when we stop importing cultures that hate us and deport those already here who reject our values and embrace a backward culture of terrorism and death.

_January 20th can’t come soon enough! _

I’m looking forward to having leadership that possesses the moral clarity to stop fighting useless foreign wars and instead preserve our way of life. And to celebrate the change in leadership, I want to send a lucky Turning Point PAC supporter to President Trump’s inauguration.

**Donate today for your chance to enter our giveaway of two tickets to an exclusive and UNFORGETTABLE inauguration weekend experience, complete with...**
* Round-trip flights for two to and from Washington, DC.
* Luxury hotel accommodations (one room) in DC from Friday, January 17, to Tuesday, January 21.
* Access for two to a rally with President Trump on the afternoon of Sunday, January 19, at the Capital One Arena.
* A VIP invitation for two to the exclusive Turning Point Ball on the evening of Sunday, January 19, at the Salamander Hotel in DC.
* Reserved seating for two at the Presidential inauguration on Monday, January 20.

[Enter Today >>](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyU0MFugzAQBNCvMTfQem1wLj5Uiril1x6tBTbEkjGWWdLfr5KqH9DzjEZP83ULN4op5vWTNvZSJdQj7EWClEJzG_MzCrcx07kGBOxb0K3GYJrFW4eLGRr22plhuFitoXl4BwQzLkTaojYMjnvuwTHd2VI_uCb61w5ojRp6ANuBJdMP9mLu02T5MikLlLjK0cmDK5dzSnGmLExbN-9bk_xDpBzKfCgcFY4Hz2fljjIvu7waCse3XuFY6Nd-VpK4Z2XGU7Yw01YorlmZ659F4fBO9iycRZmrVGmqX8p3TCkeg1MW1o1iehPkP089Pf4EAAD__5Szc4A)
The Golden Age of America is coming.

Justice is coming.

Instead of having an FBI wrecked by DEI-like policies, President Trump will fight against the corruption in the FBI, strengthen our law enforcement agencies, and bring law and order back to our country.

That all begins on January 20th.

**The deadline to enter is January 10th, so if you want to be there IN PERSON, donate __TODAY__ to enter our giveaway of two tickets to celebrate President Trump’s triumphant return to the White House with me and the rest of the Turning Point crew! **

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: They Helped Trump Win AZ—Now Let’s Help Them
body:
Your donation will help send Navajos for Trump to the Inaugural Parade.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** **** Navajos for Trump worked tirelessly across the Navajo Nation--organizing door-knocking campaigns, parades, and community gatherings--to help President Trump win Arizona. Now, they've been invited to the 60th Inaugural Parade, and [**they need our support to get there.**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a8d83daa/1edb9794a8d61cba "https://secure.anedot.com/vibe-pac/navajosfortrump") Travel can be expensive--many will drive hours just to reach the nearest airport. A donation of any amount will help cover their travel costs so they can proudly represent Arizona during the inaugural celebrations. Thank you in advance for your help. Let's stand with Navajos for Trump as they celebrate their success--and ours! **** **__** **** ************

Jenny Beth**** **__** **** ************

body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xWfLLELd1PeFC7r4DCFttA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZjoUP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjUwMTEyVwNzcGNCCmd_vqGDZ-njWJxSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xWfLLELd1PeFC7r4DCFttA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZjoUP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjUwMTEyVwNzcGNCCmd_vqGDZ-njWJxSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xWfLLELd1PeFC7r4DCFttA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZjoUP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjUwMTEyVwNzcGNCCmd_vqGDZ-njWJxSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of “” on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
Meta is ending its key [diversity, equity and inclusion programs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPozAQRn-N6Yw8toFQuDjdiS5pr0SGGcKsjB3ZVlD-_Yrtt32f9PTp_b_Pd8-B4_PhD3J1S7NWupMKJOgZPYfPbBt0G5Em05CDwfT9DextbHYHxm4wLBaMRepGZe2GOCy3jtTad8Y07C6bAtAARoFtl7Hvsd8UgB07BC2sIuSacvuVONadtvBJb8rtmo4muL3WVxHmj9CT0NN5nu26lEhnuXahp4NjpJKqF3q68IWoeonE8pXTM_ujyGPFFH3AIk8fDp-r3FJGifymXLh-LrmZONaVUZh_fx93qZQE5ReEvckOXyeHwKUfhFXPw3P4eVd_q_V2-jsAAP__eExsGg), joining corporate giants Ford, McDonald's and Walmart that have pulled the plug on DEI initiatives.

## Zuckerberg's Meta to End DEI Programs
Meta is ending its key [diversity, equity, and inclusion programs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPozAQRn-N6Yw8toFQuDjdiS5pr0SGGcKsjB3ZVlD-_Yrtt32f9PTp_b_Pd8-B4_PhD3J1S7NWupMKJOgZPYfPbBt0G5Em05CDwfT9DextbHYHxm4wLBaMRepGZe2GOCy3jtTad8Y07C6bAtAARoFtl7Hvsd8UgB07BC2sIuSacvuVONadtvBJb8rtmo4muL3WVxHmj9CT0NN5nu26lEhnuXahp4NjpJKqF3q68IWoeonE8pXTM_ujyGPFFH3AIk8fDp-r3FJGifymXLh-LrmZONaVUZh_fx93qZQE5ReEvckOXyeHwKUfhFXPw3P4eVd_q_V2-jsAAP__eExsGg), joining corporate giants Ford, McDonald's and Walmart that have pulled the plug on DEI initiatives. Meta announced last week that it would stop third-party fact-checking of content on Facebook, Instagram, and other social media platforms. CEO Mark Zuckerberg, who [met with President-elect Donald Trump](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kU2TojwAhH8N3LDyAZEcOKC-iu-os-gOlHNJRQgQDQRjwI9fv-Uct2qv3dXdVf3kW7blUsmu3vFWRLbSDAEUeAB6ELGSS_VkvltGlRBIYFdEcIoJCaEfUreJuC8o8RGBQRX63Ic4DAJMw2pa-hzxKXVl9G4DECIIMYD-5EQJKUkFIPRpUELk-ECU0mozOWvZ2UZU6qlHYSaFbl0VNdb2NwfHDlo6aHm_3ydcq7fnoKU1Q9t7r6G4CHMSpvZaIazXcuMpXmvvPYEwDumksa1y8LIeikIPnRXGwQvoIFIPhWBGVMKYH40ne1AkW7J5UlziYvhGdPxGD7Vpd-PpEP6dYDdZO3gRp3Ecz06_zumjs2pGm1muqtfa5ovP1SZdbkhL-nO8AZJ1K355PXYZsCvG9aqWe1rvwdgWeQ6tuXySr3kSHGfnqTcfIYRJNv9I7fi91tc2Sf5H23WedgmDIO0X8_9gdrzr5-qDnJrwxvrf1RocgqPodywbr1XDm6_iejiyc569FnuU9Vtz6Knha-yaqOzvUil5I1PHB3XL5c-lrv0X_jFCfwIAAP__35mw0A) at Mar-a-Lago on Friday, said his company is "_going to get back to our roots and focus on reducing mistakes, simplifying our policies, and[restoring free expression](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvgzAQBeBfA5uRfTgmGTx0YUvXjsjxncNVxkbYCeXfV3Tv-ElPT0_v6z7dHUdOz0-3kK0hTyDhIqQSCiZ0HI9Jt2gDEVDfklVDb8xV6eutne0AukelnTE4EAyDIfRS-mAuPWDvsWV7tkmlQKleKt09bsagCVIpfbuggkZLQq55674zpzpTiEd-09b5vLTRzrWupek_GhgbGPd970L-ebwKJyrlzDQwrjlyZV8aGBeqTpz2h_AzUxDFHUUgeS6ck6CEAokFpfLaqAifl9WlQ8x8qs4kllyqqC5SqoRipbxGajeL684xcjFDo-VzcRz_Btb_Dntb-A0AAP__Ketwyw) on our platforms_." The company will [stop using the “Diverse Slate Approach,”](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOpDAQRL_GzhjZjW1w4OASsrn0QmTsZujbBs-CZ1b8_YrNNypVPalKqn_38R6JaXv8jSuGOpcRFNhG6UbDmCPxORqZw4wI2EoMumud67XpvVyCjVPbZW-7iyqwffLWeGVhcn12mCSFq01pDVq3Spvb5J3LblZaG2-zBmEUZqplv_0vtNUFZz7LG_dbKqvksNT6PET7R8AgYKgLLsR8MQHDszCl84oxLVvh8riMVZ031jQr1thkeuN-UD0b_HxdQlvi10Fla_bCPMX0IWCQe8jPL2Kmw3XCqMca6WdE1t8OeQf4DgAA__-Oc2Kg) a program that ensures a diverse set of candidates is considered for each open position, as well as its supplier diversity efforts, which were aimed at sourcing from diverse-owned businesses.
## Sam Moore, "Soul Man" Singer, Dies at 89
[Sam Moore](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOszAQBOCnMZ2Rd3EMLlz8DV3-9kpksutkTwZHmATl7U9cf91InzQjzdd1ukbJst7_x4XDnsqEBi_agAacKEr-TLahkJiRu4YD9J1zA9jBN48QO8Y0Dz05TzEi2d7YNFPsnU2eOt9IONsMAAJ0Bmw7e-fIJQNg_YUAlTVMspet_S6y7g9O-VPevLW3sjQ5PPb9WVX3T-GocDyOo73NdeWjnq5wPKPCscZFL6VsrKusd950La-sl7hqWfWJFN-s6VU0CVc9eIVjswV6HpKzVNcra-5LlPw7u_91wzvgTwAAAP__amRfcw), the voice of the 1960s duo Sam & Dave known for hits “Soul Man” and “Hold On, I’m Comin,’” died on Saturday at 89 due to complications while recovering from surgery. Moore, who was inducted with Dave Prater into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame in 1992, influenced musicians like Michael Jackson, Al Green, and Bruce Springsteen. “Soul Man” [hit the charts again in the late 1970s](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLvOnDAQhZ8GOiM89oIpXKSh27Qp0YAHdiJfVrZZtG8fkf7vzkU6Ovr-PJcnsud4_MZAtu5pgR4eopdCwuKQ_XfRrbM7EZBqycpRDYOR2kzty5IxtCMoUqMCVLhKcmYgfBhnNqdVy_Ze66UEKVUvdbdOw-CGvZdSTw8nodE9Oa4pd38Tx_qi3X_Th3K3pdB6-6r1XRr1q4G5gfm6ri6uW6Sr3H0D8y0bmNPK9cTMdJuCQYSUMomC8RAlnV4EjOLOHX5IuDMJx1SEmYQ7SZQzH5S_Ykvh7XnDyikWkbeI0oygoc3WvS_2nsswNro_ArL_f7D-BOxj4V8AAAD___OZbw8) when the Blues Brothers—John Belushi and Dan Aykroyd—recorded it with many of the same musicians as the original. Moore’s influence was so great that his 2006 solo album was backed by [a who’s who of music legends](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGP4yAQBeBfgzsiZkywKSiuocu1V1oTzzjmhCGySVb59ytvv_V7-vT0_t2mG6WcyuMvbRLaUic0eNUGNODElPJnsh2HRQSl7yTA0Ds3gh19twaLCDTM5Jxch3Fk7vl-h8F43zsE57sUTs0AIEBvwF7u3jl2iwGw_sqAyhrh1Op--V9Taass-VPfsl_munU5rK09D9X_URgVxvJ51qOdkcJ4wgqjAYURjMIopcneKJVNSlMYD9r0VusueqW86LroNNeSZn3UV9b8qvpsUGHN9BbNQqyp6dErjN0e-PmVck6HG5Q1j41S_tnUfvvoHfA7AAD__6vEZi0), including not only Springsteen, but Mariah Carey, Eric Clapton, Sting, Jon Bon Jovi, Steve Winwood, Wynona Judd, and Vince Gill.
## Wildfire Death Toll Climbs
The [death toll climbed to 16](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ8Gd1jsgoldUPyNu_ztlRaGJdkTMZFNgvL2p0TXXvdJMxqNvq_zcvacebv89zdyNZUFFQ5SgQRcouf8WkwXXSJC0h05OGlrRzDj1F1dDOtKKSkwwQadNPjgB6TBTEpjUmPH7r2mABBAKzD9OlkbbVIAZhoioDCKItey99-Ft3qllF_lSXsfyq3L7lrr_RD6n8BZ4Nxa67c1bNSOdy5wfqPA-XHIX8r8JLnmchE4B585lX1jLxvnmHinQ34Kj3v0lQ65h83DeEKjut3Fe-Oc-bAnYdTl5jl_TtS_pDwd_gQAAP__4R5klA) in the Southern California wildfires on Saturday, and that number is expected to rise as cadaver dogs go through leveled neighborhoods. The massive Palisades fire now stretches to more than 21,500 acres and is only 11% contained. The Eaton Fire has expanded to more than 14,100 acres with 15% containment. Winds shifted the fires on Saturday, prompting more evacuations as the Palisades fire edged toward the Brentwood neighborhood and San Fernando Valley foothills. Meanwhile, more than 50,000 Los Angeles residents are demanding [the ouster of mayor Karen Bass](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LHO4yAQBOCnwR0RrDG2C4pr6HLtlRY2S7J3GCwgifz2J6f_my12pE-j-XNf7o4ipcdvt6NpIS8gYOBCcgmLdxTPRXXeBETAvkMjx17rSapp7p4G1TZtK2iNU6_0oHEY13EOa5imeQoOOzKXJqQEKXsh1W2dtfY6CCnVPHgJTAn01HK5_c2U2hNDPPMby23LexfNs7Wjsv4XA8vApvPItV0RA3vBDKyQDKy8zqvyhJ_KwOZXK-6BnkfHC1bymFrlm4uRh1w47Tt6cg15we8zB767Mxf-zxVMfHW1ckqXxg9s1CgnBrYrxh8fipGqHpkSj91R_PZsP-32NvA_AAD__3Cmb5Y) in a new petition, ripping her “gross mismanagement” of the disaster response. Residents have begun [returning to their homes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwzAMBp_G3hyItH7sQUOXbOna0aAlKmahWIGsJsjbF-ne8cMHHA73dVkuJFn26yfd2LdUFlRoBgUD4BJJ8mvRffSJGXns2YMbrZ1AT3O_ee0UrxC045EDObKwTjSPKbkpgknUi3_TFAACjAr0aZ2tjTYpAD2bCNhpxVFaqafvInvbOOVXeXA9hXLrs99aux_d-NHhucMz3Xd-Hu_rPWqTkLnD81F-2sZ1HwJlSaXuQsNTckxS-RgyDQoxWDNNFLTDhOhWg5hStMYgWY199fH-lJzlsK7T6nojyX8G7b8iD4-_AQAA__8a5GFA), only to find debris and rubble in the densely populated, 25-mile expanse north of downtown Los Angeles. Many residents were already facing hardship after State Farm dropped close to 1,600 policies in Pacific Palisades in July, reflecting a trend among private insurers [to drop California policies](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQRn8N3rC4MyHxwNDFW7p2tLA54qswREBj5d9X7t7tk5709Ol93ee748jp8el2si3kGRVepAIJOHvH8T3rzttAhDR0ZOE6GHMDfRu7zapAfhiUAljdZfFmNAYWhTqgXnG86Y7taVMACDAo0P0yGuNNUAB6vHhAoRV5brn035lT2yjEd35R6de8d9FurT2rGD4ETgKn4zj6damJjnpygdM5BU6BC1W5usghl8ROPl3k6jxVeSK55Z3ykahUyan-FJdWkrW5RjK4ssvguMiYa6XT1hXrnwfHyNVchVaP3XH8O9T-C_Sy-BsAAP__kT1p1w) or halt underwriting.

clean_body: Meta is ending its key , joining corporate giants Ford, McDonald's and Walmart that have pulled the plug on DEI initiatives. | | | | | | Sunday, January 12, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1969, the New York Jets upset the Baltimore Colts in Super Bowl III, fulfilling quarterback Joe Namath’s guarantee that his team would win. () Jigsaw puzzles are a great Sunday activity (especially in January), and if you know the original purpose of puzzles—you're ready for today's trivia question. (Check the bottom of today's edition.) Think a market downturn is around the corner? Diversify beyond stocks with today's sponsor, . | Zuckerberg's Meta to End DEI Programs Meta is ending its key , joining corporate giants Ford, McDonald's and Walmart that have pulled the plug on DEI initiatives. Meta announced last week that it would stop third-party fact-checking of content on Facebook, Instagram, and other social media platforms. CEO Mark Zuckerberg, who at Mar-a-Lago on Friday, said his company is "going to get back to our roots and focus on reducing mistakes, simplifying our policies, and on our platforms." The company will a program that ensures a diverse set of candidates is considered for each open position, as well as its supplier diversity efforts, which were aimed at sourcing from diverse-owned businesses. Sam Moore, "Soul Man" Singer, Dies at 89 , the voice of the 1960s duo Sam & Dave known for hits “Soul Man” and “Hold On, I’m Comin,’” died on Saturday at 89 due to complications while recovering from surgery. Moore, who was inducted with Dave Prater into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame in 1992, influenced musicians like Michael Jackson, Al Green, and Bruce Springsteen. “Soul Man” when the Blues Brothers—John Belushi and Dan Aykroyd—recorded it with many of the same musicians as the original. Moore’s influence was so great that his 2006 solo album was backed by , including not only Springsteen, but Mariah Carey, Eric Clapton, Sting, Jon Bon Jovi, Steve Winwood, Wynona Judd, and Vince Gill. Wildfire Death Toll Climbs The in the Southern California wildfires on Saturday, and that number is expected to rise as cadaver dogs go through leveled neighborhoods. The massive Palisades fire now stretches to more than 21,500 acres and is only 11% contained. The Eaton Fire has expanded to more than 14,100 acres with 15% containment. Winds shifted the fires on Saturday, prompting more evacuations as the Palisades fire edged toward the Brentwood neighborhood and San Fernando Valley foothills. Meanwhile, more than 50,000 Los Angeles residents are demanding in a new petition, ripping her “gross mismanagement” of the disaster response. Residents have begun , only to find debris and rubble in the densely populated, 25-mile expanse north of downtown Los Angeles. Many residents were already facing hardship after State Farm dropped close to 1,600 policies in Pacific Palisades in July, reflecting a trend among private insurers or halt underwriting. No one’s quite sure, but the leading contender once received over 1,000 inches of snow in one season. () ➤ One of the fascinations of artificial intelligence is the fantastic imagery it can produce, such as these striking visualizations of underwater fireworks. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ Did you know that what you eat for breakfast, sets the tone for your body for the rest of the day? The common belief is the timing of when you eat in the morning is everything when it comes to maintaining a healthy weight, however, this is simply not true. | Libraries aren't only for people. name: No Dem Left Behind Executive Director, Hassan Martini
subject: The Fires Are Raging On – And So Is the Hate
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w1zly-spbjjr-kyd76rh5/)
---
# **The Fires Are Raging On – And So Is the Hate**
---
| | | | |
---
Hello friend, This is not the time to point fingers and assign blame, but let’s face it—that is all the corporate media and the billionaire oligarchs are doing. This is a catastrophic emergency caused by Mother Nature, accelerated by mankind. My heart grieves for all the victims. As I sit in my home with my family, I can’t help but think about what would have happened to us. Our homes are our most prized material possessions. It’s where we live, where we create memories, and where we spend most of our time. Our children leave their markings on our homes. For example, my kids have scratched the hardwood floors, scraped all of the baseboards, and even colored on the walls. At the time, we were obviously very upset, but as time goes by, you look at those flaws and can’t help but smile as you watch them grow. My children are still thankfully very young—9 months, 4, and 6. As we watch the destruction unfold in California, we need to remember the human emotions so many of our fellow citizens are enduring at the moment. Yes, these are only material possessions, but lives have been uprooted. Schools destroyed, places of worship, entire communities—gone. I have driven countless times on the Pacific Highway toward Malibu; it is one of the most breathtaking views you will ever see. Seeing it now fills me with sadness. Unfortunately, it always comes down to politics, and I haven’t forgotten what my job is and what we have to do now. It’s ridiculous what the right is doing—trying to somehow equate this as a Democratic fire, as if we started it and helped it spread. The only thing spreading is hate, thanks to a group that only knows how to enrage and little else. They definitely don’t know how to govern, problem-solve, or work together to find solutions. Just to be clear, I am not a Gavin Newsom cheerleader by any means, and as I’m sure you can tell by now from our previous messages, when we see fault with our party leaders, we are not afraid to call them out. Does he deserve some blame? Yes, I’m sure he does. Right now, though, let’s focus all our efforts on putting out these fires. There will be plenty of time to point fingers and play the blame game. We are counting down the days until the Trump presidency becomes a reality, and we are gearing up for what that means for everyone. California is going to need federal resources to rebuild. How is Trump going to handle that? Elon Musk has a long, hate-filled relationship with California. How is he going to affect the rebuild? These are real questions we need to ask ourselves, and it is my job to figure out ways to call attention to the unconstitutional interference of this radical right-wing oligarch in our government. We have a lot of work to do, and the challenges we are facing seem endless at the moment. But let’s not forget—we are Americans. When we come together, we can accomplish and get through anything. We are going to have to do that, and hopefully, we can have some conversations about how we got here and find holistic, organic solutions to grow and ensure we never reach this point again. I am doing this for the three little kids I mentioned, but we all have someone we are doing this for. That is the motivation we need to fight on. In Solidarity, Hassan Martini
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w1zly-spbjjs-kyd76rh6/)
---
| [Contribute Monthly to No Dem Left Behind!](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w1zly-spbjjt-kyd76rh7/)
---
Thank you for your support in this pivotal time.
---
| | | | |
---
**No Dem Left Behind PAC** P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003
---
|
---

You are subscribed to this email as dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Click here to modify your [preferences](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2w1zly--15aab-kyd76rh3&sl=4i6&t=1&ac=gpnv) or [unsubscribe](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2w1zly--15aab-kyd76rh3&sl=4i6&t=5&ac=gpnv).

subject: Access "C.S.Lewis on Christianity"
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f5383e8f2764be586d9d9713cda6a7f&_e=ZdkdmqbKlPMQCq7kQ9CdNM3IQowytPQs1aHAi-HCYvf5tE6F8rCwYVgrTgnxwspSQZI1Ai2H7CEbwPlm2NVi2boBM2QhXFPUku2QaUpQB5ZBptuO4YAT27kYqdynyQl9ZyElc8NxwdogfLhQBma6MyNbrdSd2X4x50dD6O29fK3xQXVsa02LhQwxKX6SA77BNqbkdjWIbqQro9m8miWzlgdnpaGAkI0yMG8bOQlI6RnH2Z7q3OebsUdI9Ac0X5RTQe4za3I5323YMswUtjZ8OXRr4hm45vk-usttnpjlA1DewdX6dlHNjH1vaFZBdkvDOmcbh7pxY7n3dxtbO5RPjM10gWL2or0l_F5EHpKitmXX7_RYbA-khg5KP5modfqAoVt-A32wDAEXqiYhX8jDCrTJaz9YBC2jjRH6G3l4uZRVN_7l_rC-LKAZep2CznaC) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f5383e8f2764be586d9d9713cda6a7f&_e=ZdkdmqbKlPMQCq7kQ9CdNM3IQowytPQs1aHAi-HCYvf5tE6F8rCwYVgrTgnxwspSQZI1Ai2H7CEbwPlm2NVi2boBM2QhXFPUku2QaUpQB5ZBptuO4YAT27kYqdynyQl9ZyElc8NxwdogfLhQBma6MyNbrdSd2X4x50dD6O29fK3xQXVsa02LhQwxKX6SA77BNqbkdjWIbqQro9m8miWzlgdnpaGAkI0yMG8bOQlI6RnH2Z7q3OebsUdI9Ac0X5RTQe4za3I5323YMswUtjZ8OXRr4hm45vk-usttnpjlA1B8k6X8gBbyid5xoBvXfVX5B4nmbUUhzx4oYsPHEg4y8XJAftf6va-dPYpIPxjnJZMR0folFrpi43kA_B4jO-hqFucbjzvEgUP_D8VgJVIXiVl_KNl9nDsp9VH6sBry50w1ehAuGWbqy1JixJueWj-S)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f5383e8f2764be586d9d9713cda6a7f&_e=ZdkdmqbKlPMQCq7kQ9CdNM3IQowytPQs1aHAi-HCYvf5tE6F8rCwYVgrTgnxwspSQZI1Ai2H7CEbwPlm2NVi2boBM2QhXFPUku2QaUpQB5ZBptuO4YAT27kYqdynyQl9ZyElc8NxwdogfLhQBma6MyNbrdSd2X4x50dD6O29fK3xQXVsa02LhQwxKX6SA77BNqbkdjWIbqQro9m8miWzlgdnpaGAkI0yMG8bOQlI6RnH2Z7q3OebsUdI9Ac0X5RTQe4za3I5323YMswUtjZ8OXRr4hm45vk-usttnpjlA1D_5A1jw_L5uw2S08TU57Pe_S-NbwXb9jT4byAxYAjOx_9TI3j-rG01Fu5rPfMsWbpFe94QYM_owq6DONaW0RhYo2IuNfG1LUISw4wdH1-nvsfhnosb3Il8zY8PcMq2MSqiMIJAZlUF70J6TAZTA4U_),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f5383e8f2764be586d9d9713cda6a7f&_e=ZdkdmqbKlPMQCq7kQ9CdNM3IQowytPQs1aHAi-HCYvf5tE6F8rCwYVgrTgnxwspSQZI1Ai2H7CEbwPlm2NVi2boBM2QhXFPUku2QaUpQB5ZBptuO4YAT27kYqdynyQl9ZyElc8NxwdogfLhQBma6MyNbrdSd2X4x50dD6O29fK3xQXVsa02LhQwxKX6SA77BNqbkdjWIbqQro9m8miWzlgdnpaGAkI0yMG8bOQlI6RnH2Z7q3OebsUdI9Ac0X5RTQe4za3I5323YMswUtjZ8OXRr4hm45vk-usttnpjlA1CBlXCES4DVz0JOCCwQXJZ8A5JIuu9-_z9ulzZl9VVdDXpIG6FSYd7--leGqaX6KxBlz_7kMU56vLgMYzA1p7XK22cDfb41Jg11HrvAI06xCBlVm2Utukn5Sy6ce6-bsYHd9aA0KolPrgf8odESpGw0) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f5383e8f2764be586d9d9713cda6a7f&_e=ZdkdmqbKlPMQCq7kQ9CdNM3IQowytPQs1aHAi-HCYvf5tE6F8rCwYVgrTgnxwspSQZI1Ai2H7CEbwPlm2NVi2boBM2QhXFPUku2QaUpQB5ZBptuO4YAT27kYqdynyQl9ZyElc8NxwdogfLhQBma6MyNbrdSd2X4x50dD6O29fK3xQXVsa02LhQwxKX6SA77BNqbkdjWIbqQro9m8miWzlgdnpaGAkI0yMG8bOQlI6RnH2Z7q3OebsUdI9Ac0X5RTQe4za3I5323YMswUtjZ8OXRr4hm45vk-usttnpjlA1BSgXysa19TQ_uCEtbMyQ7nvx9dzsqGFdQMAr7RAN9G_EEyJ61x1QijQ1Rmd6pw0i8-Xw_kG4pTMgaE4d-Y4u8giuLgUjgs8R7U91adYwoDpgWTl5IW879fOtgrFMq7Jnhp5VNZnAbRfN3cS7CfBbYc)”** on DVD today. body:
And I'll continue Matt Gaetz's legacy in FL-01. Early voting is about to begin here so I won't beat around the bush with you:

| |
---
| | | I love President Trump - I'm humbled to have earned his endorsement.

I love the Sunshine State - I'm honored to serve as Florida's CFO and State Fire Marshal.

My name is Jimmy Patronis. **I 'm Trump's guy running in the Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat in Congress.**

Early voting is about to begin here so I won't beat around the bush with you:

Republicans control the House of Representatives by a RAZOR-THIN margin. I'm the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I can't fill Matt Gaetz's seat without some more help.

**_[That's why I'm partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 - before my all-important Special Election - to help win key races like this.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7473f0517ba44a88a23a95d432f7f1fa&_e=neOnBlo_vHuGcjubuU0Z0aRRKvpANmDExAbzUmBG07MvTcx1HAUradji2wCd_X3njBUQJm5OrENYI7J2yJRt0whMfYSrxCwkgn8AxU2rb17nhZrNN8oPjwG1yPvRn_rERf-6Y0RMEh-SnMhf8bjFtpuyzh8KtUInzV6plHYK33RbWgzNlpjnqKQPmDuVa2ggyFkV_5f5DKCi8HeeK46_RfQmyEmThguJeAGYrpsblYiR59-GgbPdG5XTw5_4TUZjZPJfCLSALcxD2RgoJUk45f_gxf3JD4S73hfpwIh-KMgIuRu10PbVFNQU_eU7GVe6jNcvth86sXUxH5jIsGP4SNbOHLZ-4bOXRCOycrbr9CnhqJF-PmsbHtVuZc26VLDDx7sM3tqyRuxlCFVnCebAm4tntC_e_KGKiwqeZxVJAxoPHwN39om6FM4rl6NHp_IhqSc8O_T5DmR-lsHK-7ElHQ%3D%3D "That’s why I’m partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 – before my all-important Special Election – to help win key races like this.")_**

_So, if you can, I respectfully ask you to pitch in here: _
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7473f0517ba44a88a23a95d432f7f1fa&_e=neOnBlo_vHuGcjubuU0Z0aRRKvpANmDExAbzUmBG07MvTcx1HAUradji2wCd_X3njBUQJm5OrENYI7J2yJRt0whMfYSrxCwkgn8AxU2rb17nhZrNN8oPjwG1yPvRn_rERf-6Y0RMEh-SnMhf8bjFtpuyzh8KtUInzV6plHYK33RbWgzNlpjnqKQPmDuVa2ggyFkV_5f5DKCi8HeeK46_RfQmyEmThguJeAGYrpsblYiR59-GgbPdG5XTw5_4TUZjZPJfCLSALcxD2RgoJUk45f_gxf3JD4S73hfpwIh-KMiCew8bAJO9CGBQe9LcDjg1hs_WVakLDdNv6LEAr3U41jqSKzi5Mk6n-FTQTWqRZbA9CkAlekCs9As4kQrAnqzd1XDMK9ozoVzvWOkFfafMoMtNz8gHJRtmfo6G4dsHyHrcyD0IryfdwIfzcF7FVrsyeMi2F4UULY8LdZUdsMOMkg%3D%3D "PLEASE DONATE NOW")

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7473f0517ba44a88a23a95d432f7f1fa&_e=neOnBlo_vHuGcjubuU0Z0aRRKvpANmDExAbzUmBG07MvTcx1HAUradji2wCd_X3njBUQJm5OrENYI7J2yJRt0whMfYSrxCwkgn8AxU2rb17nhZrNN8oPjwG1yPvRn_rERf-6Y0RMEh-SnMhf8bjFtpuyzh8KtUInzV6plHYK33RbWgzNlpjnqKQPmDuVa2ggyFkV_5f5DKCi8HeeK46_RfQmyEmThguJeAGYrpsblYiR59-GgbPdG5XTw5_4TUZjZPJfCLSALcxD2RgoJUk45f_gxf3JD4S73hfpwIh-KMhQiE8l7Nk9SOlMKVEHW_IK510T1dKg-CqZqa15pwo-IAlRdU5OOWu4QioVP0cbkk9MPzTr-Ht0eIIVs3zhpiwVXJk2FN9vHcfj34RXsuVXeILV5UvIir4XwmkLpq-ivwXOd0IBdZrUW2n8_1wKlmb0UERdAdFuEDQoLM1S1wWj8w%3D%3D "Jimmy Patronis + Donald Trump")

Look,

The timeline here is tight. Governor Ron DeSantis immediately called this Special Election so we could quickly fill this seat with an America First Conservative.

It's a perfect plan to help ensure we deliver on President Trump's agenda ASAP.

**But that means EVERY SECOND counts between now and the Primary in a few short weeks.**

Steve Scalise and I are partnering up today so Republicans are perfectly positioned to win this seat for President Trump. If that's what you want too, I believe I'm the right man for the job.

I'd be honored to have your support right now.
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7473f0517ba44a88a23a95d432f7f1fa&_e=neOnBlo_vHuGcjubuU0Z0aRRKvpANmDExAbzUmBG07MvTcx1HAUradji2wCd_X3njBUQJm5OrENYI7J2yJRt0whMfYSrxCwkgn8AxU2rb17nhZrNN8oPjwG1yPvRn_rERf-6Y0RMEh-SnMhf8bjFtpuyzh8KtUInzV6plHYK33RbWgzNlpjnqKQPmDuVa2ggyFkV_5f5DKCi8HeeK46_RfQmyEmThguJeAGYrpsblYiR59-GgbPdG5XTw5_4TUZjZPJfCLSALcxD2RgoJUk45f_gxf3JD4S73hfpwIh-KMj_wCwjG7B-Yn87BWGy0_WjuRd8RRbT5yeu6qguB100QE4qrBZ32DmKAZLBGZQRGwqXfWeEKdOknyRDdRXwr_AGt9vtCJEA006mkp2X9DJzZv0AX15IjUZIswy_waIlrGri26konrOonn0XUr9kDh3uGBW2fMvbADaHAI3eZPW5Zw%3D%3D "PLEASE DONATE NOW")

"That’s why I’m partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 – before my all-important Special Election – to help win key races like this." So, if you can, I respectfully ask you to pitch in here: | | "PLEASE DONATE NOW" | "Jimmy Patronis + Donald Trump" Look, The timeline here is tight. Governor Ron DeSantis immediately called this Special Election so we could quickly fill this seat with an America First Conservative. It's a perfect plan to help ensure we deliver on President Trump's agenda ASAP. But that means EVERY SECOND counts between now and the Primary in a few short weeks. Steve Scalise and I are partnering up today so Republicans are perfectly positioned to win this seat for President Trump. If that's what you want too, I believe I'm the right man for the job. I'd be honored to have your support right now. | | "PLEASE DONATE NOW" To victory, - Jimmy JIMMY PATRONIS Trump-Endorsed Candidate, FL-01 Special Election | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "RESPOND NOW" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. name: Josh Weil
subject: I’m a teacher running for Congress against someone who wants to ban books.
body:
We’ve got less than 90 days to flip this seat and stop MAGA extremism in its tracks.
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fZ763MUqMDJ59lJgiX9q6w45SN8GquryFvZkwEuo7v83KtIBy5BpFsbggvtm8ycD0dNhe6_MYkdDm0-atvngvwonAzbELMwlepHLdgYTwTTMGZVdHfGLh6Jnh1oigHhacNIGBuQlBUiAjP-rJO4RpCchGatgqAD3m9g_SiL_8s21OLVxsSDsmKf8dANoJvLtQa7rkwC140ci9WnOhOb9C0oNT4oTM1IqZTIgevRDcNU=&c=VP6kxsmDRCNv1bvE0QkeXdeOpGtH8N8gNUrfUpeVKiwvmw8Gz22QHw==&ch=K4Ce7UaHLmD0kBBwzXqbBpzUffAFV4npv4wJ9hPfWT2Fq00WqCYz2Q==)
---
| | | | Team,
If you and I haven't met yet, my name is Josh Weil. I'm a public school teacher and proud Democrat running in the Special Election for Florida's 6th Congressional District--the first major election of 2025.
Here's the bottom line: I'm a proud teacher who has always encouraged my students to seek knowledge anywhere they can find it. Meanwhile, my MAGA Extremist opponent is a proponent of Florida's DISASTROUS book bans. The difference couldn't be more stark.
I've spent my career in classrooms, working with at-risk youth and fighting to give every student a chance to succeed, no matter their background. But now, I'm running for Congress to take that fight to Washington--because my opponent has built his career on taking opportunities away.
My opponent is a vocal supporter of book bans and other extreme MAGA policies designed to stifle free thought and limit opportunities for kids like the ones I've dedicated my life to teaching.
This isn't just a policy disagreement--it's about the world we're leaving for the next generation.
I'm running because I believe our democracy is worth fighting for, and because our kids deserve a future free from MAGA censorship and fear.
This is going to be an uphill battle, but recent special elections have shown that Democrats can win when we work together.
---

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Invitation to Trump’s Inauguration

body:
Join me for President Trump’s historic Inauguration

|
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HzWGRRv0RX-XXkeLT2ozlA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZkUYP0RVaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9wYS1pbmF1Z3VyYXRpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwMTEyJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvblcDc3BjQgpnf7Ssg2fq3AGQUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
Friend,

America just suffered a jihadist attack, dozens are dead and injured, and a “pro-Palestinian” protest blocked 6th Ave in NYC the next day, rallying behind the murderers.

This perverse, upside-down world only ends when we stop importing cultures that hate us and deport those already here who reject our values and embrace a backward culture of terrorism and death.

_January 20th can’t come soon enough! _

I’m looking forward to having leadership that possesses the moral clarity to stop fighting useless foreign wars and instead preserve our way of life. And to celebrate the change in leadership, I want to send a lucky Turning Point PAC supporter to President Trump’s inauguration.

**Donate today for your chance to enter our giveaway of two tickets to an exclusive and UNFORGETTABLE inauguration weekend experience, complete with...**
* Round-trip flights for two to and from Washington, DC.
* Luxury hotel accommodations (one room) in DC from Friday, January 17, to Tuesday, January 21.
* Access for two to a rally with President Trump on the afternoon of Sunday, January 19, at the Capital One Arena.
* A VIP invitation for two to the exclusive Turning Point Ball on the evening of Sunday, January 19, at the Salamander Hotel in DC.
* Reserved seating for two at the Presidential inauguration on Monday, January 20.

[Enter Today >>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HzWGRRv0RX-XXkeLT2ozlA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZkUYP0RVaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9wYS1pbmF1Z3VyYXRpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwMTEyJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvblcDc3BjQgpnf7Ssg2fq3AGQUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
The Golden Age of America is coming.

Justice is coming.

Instead of having an FBI wrecked by DEI-like policies, President Trump will fight against the corruption in the FBI, strengthen our law enforcement agencies, and bring law and order back to our country.

That all begins on January 20th.

**The deadline to enter is January 10th, so if you want to be there IN PERSON, donate __TODAY__ to enter our giveaway of two tickets to celebrate President Trump’s triumphant return to the White House with me and the rest of the Turning Point crew! **

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. name: The Babylon Bee
subject: I never imagined this would happen
body:
Voters have made their voices heard.

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EW9wYVYdhtdUZp1RcCkv4Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZkgaP0RQaHR0cHM6Ly9iYWJ5bG9uYmVlLmNvbS9wbGFucz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPUNCNjAzNjhXA3NwY0IKZ3_Pr4Nn6XoN4lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
|
---
Friend, Voters have made their voices heard.Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics. For years, the left has used the liberal "news" media to spread their woke agenda, but it was largely behind closed doors. **That all changed when Twitter silenced The Babylon Bee for telling a joke.** The absurdity of a tech giant deplatforming a satirical site woke a sleeping giant.**_Enter Elon Musk._** Elon purchased Twitter and joined The Babylon Bee in starting a revolution that catapulted free speech to the election's frontlines.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EW9wYVYdhtdUZp1RcCkv4Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZkgaP0RQaHR0cHM6Ly9iYWJ5bG9uYmVlLmNvbS9wbGFucz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPUNCNjAzNjhXA3NwY0IKZ3_Pr4Nn6XoN4lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EW9wYVYdhtdUZp1RcCkv4Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZkgaP0RQaHR0cHM6Ly9iYWJ5bG9uYmVlLmNvbS9wbGFucz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPUNCNjAzNjhXA3NwY0IKZ3_Pr4Nn6XoN4lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
_But, before millions gave censorship the middle finger at the polls,**it was our subscribers who stood strong against the left 's suppression of thought.**_**Without our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH wouldn 't have become such a major issue this election.** **[If you appreciate humor, I hope you'll subscribe to The Babylon Bee and join this growing revolution for truth, debate, and the free exchange of ideas.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EW9wYVYdhtdUZp1RcCkv4Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZkgaP0RQaHR0cHM6Ly9iYWJ5bG9uYmVlLmNvbS9wbGFucz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPUNCNjAzNjhXA3NwY0IKZ3_Pr4Nn6XoN4lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EW9wYVYdhtdUZp1RcCkv4Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZkgaP0RQaHR0cHM6Ly9iYWJ5bG9uYmVlLmNvbS9wbGFucz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPUNCNjAzNjhXA3NwY0IKZ3_Pr4Nn6XoN4lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
The left ignorantly believes that our subscribers -- Americans who like to laugh at the absurdity of our world -- are _" fringe."_ President Trump's landslide victory proves that there are **MILLIONS of people just like our subscribers** -- including unlikely Republican voters like Elon Musk and Joe Rogan -- who believe that free speech is a critical pillar of our democracy. [**While liberals have mental breakdowns and sob on TikTok, I hope you 'll become a Babylon Bee subscriber and support what Elon Musk calls, **"**a future where comedy is legal. "**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EW9wYVYdhtdUZp1RcCkv4Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZkgaP0RQaHR0cHM6Ly9iYWJ5bG9uYmVlLmNvbS9wbGFucz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPUNCNjAzNjhXA3NwY0IKZ3_Pr4Nn6XoN4lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)I'll leave you with this, a photo of two handsome men who love humor, the First Amendment, and America.

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EW9wYVYdhtdUZp1RcCkv4Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZkgaP0RQaHR0cHM6Ly9iYWJ5bG9uYmVlLmNvbS9wbGFucz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPUNCNjAzNjhXA3NwY0IKZ3_Pr4Nn6XoN4lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

name: History Facts
subject: Ulysses S. Grant's real name
body:
Ulysses S. Grant, America’s 18th president, was born Hiram Ulysses Grant on April 27, 1822, in Point Pleasant, Ohio, to Jesse and Hannah Grant. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cfbec5ow6jk53s96g4e3lff0bdtboo5d7ncnx5nldo4fidoh8ff4pxe5xj9c820chuinfe9467vot153enfkwt2fqnxuymtha53gmlk88myjg1sgyijr3lga7m0o08mbme62shxndehcqxz&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spz5pn&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Ulysses S. Grant’s first name wasn’t actually “Ulysses.”](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spz5pn&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spz5pn&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spz5pn&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| U lysses S. Grant, America’s 18th president, was [born](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spz5pn&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Hiram Ulysses Grant on April 27, 1822, in Point Pleasant, Ohio, to Jesse and Hannah Grant. Though Hannah initially wanted to name her son after American diplomat Albert Gallatin, her father suggested the name Hiram and her mother proposed Ulysses. After much discussion, Jesse announced the boy would be named Hiram Ulysses Grant in an effort to please both grandparents. The future president lived the first 17 years of his life with the first name Hiram — until there was a clerical mistake at the United States Military Academy at West Point.
---
Grant was nominated to West Point in 1839 by Ohio Congressman Thomas Hamer, who accidentally wrote Grant’s name in the application as “Ulysses S. Grant.” The confusion stemmed from the fact that Grant often went by Ulysses, rather than Hiram. To further complicate things, the application called for a middle initial, so Hamer added an “S” for Grant’s mother’s surname, Simpson. Grant made several efforts to correct the mistake, but the name stuck. Fellow cadets even referred to Grant as “Uncle Sam” because of his unintentionally patriotic initials. In an [1844 letter](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spz5pn&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to his future wife Julia Dent, Grant wrote, “You know I have an ‘S’ in my name and don’t know what it stand for.”
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spz5pn&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spz5pn&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Grant embarked on a multiyear world tour after his presidency.
In the final years of his presidency, Grant’s reputation suffered due to various scandals that plagued his administration. After leaving office, he sought to distance himself from the issues back home by embarking on a multiyear [world tour](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spz5pn&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). On May 17, 1877, Grant and his wife Julia — accompanied by _New York Herald_ reporter John Russell Young — departed Philadelphia for Liverpool, England. There they were greeted with raucous enthusiasm and treated as esteemed guests, even dining with Queen Victoria. The couple then visited Germany and met with Chancellor Otto von Bismarck. They ventured further to Italy, Greece, Russia, Egypt, India, China, Vietnam, Japan, and other nations, and were welcomed fondly by each country they visited. Young relayed reports of the trip back to America, where readers were fascinated by their former president’s travels and began to view Grant more warmly. The former president finally returned to Philadelphia on December 16, 1879.

And our message is simple

Friend, we just met with President Trump and our message is simple.

Our party is united. Our Majority is united.

We're ready to secure our border, cut your taxes, lower your costs, and create jobs for working Americans.

We're ready to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.
