name: The LaRouche Organization
subject: Weekly Newsletter
body:
A future beyond the ruins of a modern-day Ozymandias

| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250112_newsletter&n=1)
---
| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PKUOlItWVRUtDdAi0YTYG3oQ7YBfUww7j2KBwvXepl3RotgPWmtsdaSUERhokPe7Bw&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250112_newsletter&n=2 "LaRouche Show Today at 10am EST") [LaRouche Show Today at 10am EST](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PKUOlItWVRUtDdAi0YTYG3oQ7YBfUww7j2KBwvXepl3RotgPWmtsdaSUERhokPe7Bw&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250112_newsletter&n=2)
---
Friend —
The LaRouche Organization and Helga Zepp-LaRouche, founder and leader of the Schiller Institute, pinpoint, as did the late Dr Martin Luther King, Jr., whose 96th birthday we celebrate in a few days, that at the heart of the Western war-driven system sits a dying, blood-lusting murderous Anglo-American empire. What segment of the American or world citizenry understands the meaning and implications of this reality? Does the incoming U.S. President- elect Trump comprehend this?
More importantly, will you help the LaRouche movement organize a survivable way out of this decaying, collapsing economic wreckage and into the dawn of economic-technological potentialities led by the BRICS-Plus and Global South nations?
Presently, the confluence of homicidal actions can no longer be denied or shunned, as exemplified in Gaza by the systematic destruction of hospitals, jailings and "kidnappings" of medical professionals, on top of the ongoing outright slaughter of innocents. We see the ugly head of injustice reared in Syria—where the former elected government has been toppled and is now commanded by "former moderate terrorists"; generally in Southwest Asia, with the persistent march to establish by force a "greater Israel" geographically; in Ukraine with Washington's uninterrupted flooding of weapons to that battle-weary nation, which insists upon their use to strike inside of nuclear-armed Russia.
Humanity stands under assault, facing the ultimate threat of thermonuclear annihilation. These atrocities and dangers demand that we urgently act, that you and others get to work, and collaborate with us to turn the tide of this momentous mission! Inspired and encouraged by the words of Dr. King, let the forces of America and the West become "harnessed to the service of peace and human beings, not an inhumane power [unleashed] against defenseless people" (Martin Luther King, Jr, Feb. 25, 1967).
* * *
## Starting At 10am EST! Sunday LaRouche Show - The Lost Chance of 1989, Part I
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFhhbaS1slyr6_aS1EeyiQQPbvAz_H3-Ru5zq_RuzO5dn&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250112_newsletter&n=3)
Tune in this Sunday (today) at 10:00 am EST, for the first part of the LaRouche movement's "The Lost Chance of 1989" documentary from 2008.
[**Watch here**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFhhbaS1slyr6_aS1EeyiQQP9M28MC4bvJlYsenNhuEnamak-7q3oNsrgkRlNqadX7w&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250112_newsletter&n=4)
* * *
## **JOIN the ORGANIZING!**
## **On-the-Ground Organizing From****The LaRouche Organization**
[****](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMeGy_uGspnCd41OAzRQnsXfKnryktWgcRn4XrdmtPVDwXFck_UAZXU8F8ai9l9omd56d05WVG_ySmqjHl4g2RzkHz6bzN4hWNe83pd8g-baA&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250112_newsletter&n=5)
In this new special new "battle report," get up-to-date accounts of the LaRouche movement's worldwide organizing to avert the danger of global nuclear war. Learn how you also can undertake activities that educate and inspire others to join the movement for peace and progress.
The LaRouche Organization [website](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HM6Vx3bJFWn0kHCKwY0V20z&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250112_newsletter&n=6) will be providing the means to master organizing techniques and polemics, and the latest flyers, posters and banners to educate and inspire others to join the movement for peace and progress!
Send us your organizing reports and videos to circulate and discuss. Help us avert the danger of global nuclear war, end the genocide and initiate ideas to stimulate an upheaval in thinking and relations.
[**Watch here**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMeGy_uGspnCd41OAzRQnsXfKnryktWgcRn4XrdmtPVDwXFck_UAZXU8F8ai9l9omd56d05WVG_ySmqjHl4g2RzkHz6bzN4hWNe83pd8g-baA&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250112_newsletter&n=7)
* * *
## Helga Zepp-LaRouche in Dialogue with Scott Ritter, former UN Weapons Inspector
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMeGy_uGspnCd41OAzRQnsX6H2Ult5cVqA_4wjLwkuZYdx_r5R_AsOB992bcVpAVCo1YVxdJrZKyg3GPkZ_sOZQJyFbrlrHCx4HyqTrYOc8QvnMDA3T_mtfxjjEgUhyUeM&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250112_newsletter&n=8)
In this edition of her weekly dialogues with concerned American leaders, Mrs. LaRouche discusses with former UN weapons inspector and anti-war activist Scott Ritter a number of sensitive aspects of policy outlook and stated intentions of the incoming U.S. President-elect Trump. The discussion starts from the vantage point of a non-American stateswoman in the tradition of John Quincy Adams. The frank discussion brings to the fore the clash between the pro-development philosophical perspective of the "Global South" and the “Trump-style” of foreign policy.
[**Watch here**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMeGy_uGspnCd41OAzRQnsX6H2Ult5cVqA_4wjLwkuZYdx_r5R_AsOB992bcVpAVCo1YVxdJrZKyg3GPkZ_sOZQJyFbrlrHCx4HyqTrYOc8QvnMDA3T_mtfxjjEgUhyUeM&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250112_newsletter&n=9)
* * *
## "Trump Will Make You Angry, LaRouche Will Make You Smart" — Fireside Chat with Gerry Rose
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMeGy_uGspnCd41OAzRQnsXTiKeUsDoiZ5ZhXcNfVXerDY0qyUxjxoGbiDiHljv79wpdI4LB715NE8CKqOYn2KbZsgp1NQfXuox7rFYOYwC9iTdY2bI8JgItqJewFZb0Ww&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250112_newsletter&n=10)
This week's discussion, led by LaRouche movement leader Gerry Rose, was aimed at providing crucial insights into the LaRouche movement's historical relationships to new presidencies, especially the breakthrough of Ronald Reagan's adoption of the Strategic Defense Initiative (SDI), and the implied potentials for a necessary such breakthrough in the coming Trump Presidency.
[**Listen here**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMeGy_uGspnCd41OAzRQnsXTiKeUsDoiZ5ZhXcNfVXerDY0qyUxjxoGbiDiHljv79wpdI4LB715NE8CKqOYn2KbZsgp1NQfXuox7rFYOYwC9iTdY2bI8JgItqJewFZb0Ww&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250112_newsletter&n=11)
* * *
## Friday Symposium: Nationalize the Federal Reserve!
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMeGy_uGspnCd41OAzRQnsX9Tfsbae9z1NxEnlSDJTey6UdgFJ_FrO5RDynb28cEEIeD5lgnpueaRGMF7vZWxW8TkYE5Kaq3i5L2iqFL5A10w&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250112_newsletter&n=12)
There can be no real economic recovery in the United States as long as the private Federal Reserve system continues to function as an open spigot to bail out trillions upon trillions of dollars of worthless speculative paper. Since the 2007 crash, Federal Reserve policy has not only supported a decade of economic stagnation and runaway inflation but, since late-2019, has also supported the U.S. Treasury in the greatest flood of debt, deficit and general government subsidy in the history of any nation.
Rather than this, the Federal Reserve could instead become a credit institution for the nation’s capital budget which would stimulate capital goods exports for economic development.
This week's symposium features Executive Intelligence Review economics experts Paul Gallagher and Richard Freeman who will lay out precisely how this can be done, and how an actual economic renaissance can be created in the United States.

clean_body: A future beyond the ruins of a modern-day Ozymandias | | | | "LaRouche Show Today at 10am EST" Friend — The LaRouche Organization and Helga Zepp-LaRouche, founder and leader of the Schiller Institute, pinpoint, as did the late Dr Martin Luther King, Jr., whose 96th birthday we celebrate in a few days, that at the heart of the Western war-driven system sits a dying, blood-lusting murderous Anglo-American empire. What segment of the American or world citizenry understands the meaning and implications of this reality? Does the incoming U.S. President- elect Trump comprehend this? More importantly, will you help the LaRouche movement organize a survivable way out of this decaying, collapsing economic wreckage and into the dawn of economic-technological potentialities led by the BRICS-Plus and Global South nations? Presently, the confluence of homicidal actions can no longer be denied or shunned, as exemplified in Gaza by the systematic destruction of hospitals, jailings and "kidnappings" of medical professionals, on top of the ongoing outright slaughter of innocents. We see the ugly head of injustice reared in Syria—where the former elected government has been toppled and is now commanded by "former moderate terrorists"; generally in Southwest Asia, with the persistent march to establish by force a "greater Israel" geographically; in Ukraine with Washington's uninterrupted flooding of weapons to that battle-weary nation, which insists upon their use to strike inside of nuclear-armed Russia. Humanity stands under assault, facing the ultimate threat of thermonuclear annihilation. These atrocities and dangers demand that we urgently act, that you and others get to work, and collaborate with us to turn the tide of this momentous mission! Inspired and encouraged by the words of Dr. King, let the forces of America and the West become "harnessed to the service of peace and human beings, not an inhumane power [unleashed] against defenseless people" (Martin Luther King, Jr, Feb. 25, 1967). Starting At 10am EST! Sunday LaRouche Show - The Lost Chance of 1989, Part I Tune in this Sunday (today) at 10:00 am EST, for the first part of the LaRouche movement's "The Lost Chance of 1989" documentary from 2008. JOIN the ORGANIZING! On-the-Ground Organizing FromThe LaRouche Organization In this new special new "battle report," get up-to-date accounts of the LaRouche movement's worldwide organizing to avert the danger of global nuclear war. Learn how you also can undertake activities that educate and inspire others to join the movement for peace and progress. The LaRouche Organization will be providing the means to master organizing techniques and polemics, and the latest flyers, posters and banners to educate and inspire others to join the movement for peace and progress! Send us your organizing reports and videos to circulate and discuss. Help us avert the danger of global nuclear war, end the genocide and initiate ideas to stimulate an upheaval in thinking and relations. Helga Zepp-LaRouche in Dialogue with Scott Ritter, former UN Weapons Inspector In this edition of her weekly dialogues with concerned American leaders, Mrs. LaRouche discusses with former UN weapons inspector and anti-war activist Scott Ritter a number of sensitive aspects of policy outlook and stated intentions of the incoming U.S. President-elect Trump. The discussion starts from the vantage point of a non-American stateswoman in the tradition of John Quincy Adams. The frank discussion brings to the fore the clash between the pro-development philosophical perspective of the "Global South" and the “Trump-style” of foreign policy. "Trump Will Make You Angry, LaRouche Will Make You Smart" — Fireside Chat with Gerry Rose This week's discussion, led by LaRouche movement leader Gerry Rose, was aimed at providing crucial insights into the LaRouche movement's historical relationships to new presidencies, especially the breakthrough of Ronald Reagan's adoption of the Strategic Defense Initiative (SDI), and the implied potentials for a necessary such breakthrough in the coming Trump Presidency. Friday Symposium: Nationalize the Federal Reserve! There can be no real economic recovery in the United States as long as the private Federal Reserve system continues to function as an open spigot to bail out trillions upon trillions of dollars of worthless speculative paper. Since the 2007 crash, Federal Reserve policy has not only supported a decade of economic stagnation and runaway inflation but, since late-2019, has also supported the U.S. Treasury in the greatest flood of debt, deficit and general government subsidy in the history of any nation. Rather than this, the Federal Reserve could instead become a credit institution for the nation’s capital budget which would stimulate capital goods exports for economic development. This week's symposium features Executive Intelligence Review economics experts Paul Gallagher and Richard Freeman who will lay out precisely how this can be done, and how an actual economic renaissance can be created in the United States. name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: A solution for Philly's overpriced housing
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c240e22fc6&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Rooming houses could help with Philly’s overpriced housing market](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5050f7cee1&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Thom Nickels_
On Craigslist I also noticed a lot of temporary room requests, something that was common when I was a student in Baltimore and lived in a rooming house on the wrong side of town.

Across the hall from me in that house was a man who lived in a closet with a glass door labeled, Fire Escape. He had a static AM radio that played day and night. The entire house smelled like stale cinnamon buns and old tobacco. My little room included a hot plate which smelled like burning rubber whenever I turned it on. Later I lived in a boardinghouse where the landlady would sort through my mail and read the letters and the papers on my desk and then gossip about what she read to a neighbor friend of hers. One day I came home from work to find her going through my underwear drawer. What was she looking for in there?

Rooming houses in the old sense of the word don’t really exist today but there is a call for their return. In the 1970s, the Philadelphia Inquirer had daily listings of rooms for rent. Apartment buildings like the Adelphia at 13th and Chestnut had efficiency apartments — a small refrigerator, sink and stove — for $400 a month. People — students and others — coming into Center City for the first time could quickly rent a room here until they “seasoned” and were ready to upgrade.

**Why It Matters**. Philadelphia Citizen reported in 2016 that the median city rent was somewhere in the $1,200/month range, “thereby imposing an annual $14,400 cost on the median Philly household income of $41,233 — which means the average Philadelphian is spending nearly 35 percent of their annual income on rent, and rent alone. That’s less money for a lot of essential things.” Average rents in Center City in 2024 began at $1,099 (and these were humble apartments) but skyrocketed near and above the $2,000 range, depending on the neighborhood. For a furnished room in Chinatown (again, from Craigslist) you can expect to pay $750 per month.

The lack of affordable housing in Philadelphia is daunting. Way back in 2017, Curbed Philadelphia reported that, “Philly needs to build more than 38,000 apartments by 2030 to meet its rising demand, and they need to be made available at all price points.”
At all price points? Really?

For the last ten years or so a typical 25-year old cannot afford a newly constructed apartment in Center City. If Center City prices are off the charts, then the solution is to move further away from the center of the city.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c452dd0b81&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Despite federal reversal, PA continues to allow boys to compete against girls in school sports](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3a5796f758&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Beth Ann Rosica_
Last month, the Biden administration quietly abandoned its plan to force school districts to allow boys to compete against girls in sports. Before that about-face, districts across the country had been threatened with a loss of federal funding if they failed to comply with yet another revision of the Title IX regulations — further gutting the original protections for girls and women.

However, as a result of widespread criticism, the U.S. Department of [Education](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b2c0fd8933&e=b7b3eddce2) announced, “in light of the comments received and those various pending court cases, the Department has determined not to regulate on this issue at this time.”

Approximately half the states in the country have regulations or laws preventing boys from competing in girls’ sports.

**Why It Matters**. Despite the elimination of the federal mandate, the commonwealth has no intention of changing its policies.

When asked whether the state would change its stance on boys competing against girls as a result of the federal rule withdrawal, Amanda Brothman from the Pennsylvania Human Relations Commission (PHRC), doubled-down on their position.

“Regardless of what happens federally, protections on the basis of sex assigned at birth, sexual orientation, gender identity, and sex characteristics exist for students in Pennsylvania. In 2023, the Pennsylvania Human Relations Commission released new regulations more clearly explaining the definition of sex. The Pennsylvania Human Relations Act and the Pennsylvania Fair Educational Opportunities Act protects students in ‘kindergartens, primary and secondary schools, high schools, academies, colleges and universities, extension courses and all educational institutions under the supervision of this Commonwealth’ unless the schools are ‘in their nature distinctly private.’”

The PHRC does not require legislative approval to promulgate new regulations. The agency operates under eleven [commissioners appointed](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=77b45678da&e=b7b3eddce2) by the Governor and confirmed by the senate.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=56a52daf67&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|

* **[Rural schools find security in armed educators](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4040c30dec&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[David Reel: The consequences of America’s broken moral compass](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b718de375d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Michael Thomas Leibrandt: My Philly Snow Bowl bash](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b617ebad8d&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
It is hard for us on the East Coast to wrap our heads around the enormity of the destruction caused by the fires in Los Angeles. California always has fires, right? But no, this one truly is different, with a sweeping destruction that many of us thought belonged to an earlier age. London had its great fire in 1666, San Francisco in 1906, but surely such things could not happen again, here in 2025? But it has happened and continues to burn. Peter Savodnik of the _Free Press_ tells [the developing story in heartbreaking detail](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=03eacce619&e=b7b3eddce2). All of our hearts must go out to those who lost everything in an instant.********

Official Speaker’s Survey is attached.

With the 119th Congress underway, my #1 priority is implementing the will of the people that put us there.

name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: Democrats win majority-making special elections in Virginia while Republicans file extreme anti-abortion bills … and everything else you need to know in the states.

body:

clean_body: Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, January 12th, 2025. | | | | | | 1️⃣ Special Election Victory: Democrats hold control of the Virginia House and Senate 🎉 On Tuesday, DLCC Spotlight candidates JJ Singh and Del. Kannan Srinivasan won two of the first special elections of the year. Democrats overperformed in races to retain both chambers' one-seat majorities ahead of the 2025 legislative sessions. 2️⃣ Reproductive Freedom: GOP state legislators file extreme bills as legislative sessions begin As the 2025 legislative sessions begin across the country, Republican legislators are prioritizing extreme restrictions on reproductive freedom. The anti-abortion extremism laid out in Project 2025 is already progressing in state legislatures. 3️⃣ Anti-Trump Firewalls: How the states are playing a major role in 2025 and beyond In 2024, Democrats’ wins in state legislatures were a bright spot in an election where Republicans secured a federal trifecta. While we brace ourselves for the implications of a second Trump term, 📖 Did you know? Nearly Half of the New Congress Is Made up of Former State Legislators The 119th Congress includes 246 former state legislators, proving that state legislatures are a powerful pipeline of talent. In statehouses across the country, future congressional leaders are shaping the policies that most directly impact people’s day-to-day lives. 🫏 Join the fight: Become an Official DLCC Member If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. 🗳️ Upcoming elections: Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing over a dozen special elections in the coming months – including two races in Minnesota on January 28th. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc.org. name: Gay Valimont
subject: Let's Do What We Can for our Immigrants.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress
body:
| | |
---
**The right to live and work in safety should never be a political bargaining chip.** Hello, this is Gay Valimont, candidate for the first Congressional District in Florida, here to fight tirelessly to safeguard the rights of immigrants who deserve to stay here, who contribute to our communities, and who deserve the same opportunities as any other American.**_I need your help to make this a reality._**
---
---
When our country turns its back on immigrants who’ve been living here in good faith, it’s not just a betrayal of them—it’s a _betrayal of our values_. Recently, the Biden administration extended temporary deportation protections for hundreds of thousands of immigrants, giving them a chance to stay in this country they’ve worked so hard to build. _But we still have so much more to do to ensure they’re fully protected._

**[Donate now to help protect immigrant families and ensure Florida remains a place of opportunity and safety for all. $6 is all it takes to make our campaign a safe space for those who need it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100281373/522248329/181761264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc3NDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWVlZTVmZmEtZjVkMC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O_G88EWflY_9gq99vmO-VmLPcDov8SA-J8kU6TBuLoU=)**

clean_body: | | | The right to live and work in safety should never be a political bargaining chip. Hello, this is Gay Valimont, candidate for the first Congressional District in Florida, here to fight tirelessly to safeguard the rights of immigrants who deserve to stay here, who contribute to our communities, and who deserve the same opportunities as any other American.I need your help to make this a reality. When our country turns its back on immigrants who’ve been living here in good faith, it’s not just a betrayal of them—it’s a betrayal of our values. Recently, the Biden administration extended temporary deportation protections for hundreds of thousands of immigrants, giving them a chance to stay in this country they’ve worked so hard to build. | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T39cdfcc8-24f2-4577-812d-b1065e4a8ac6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter – in a minute, we’re going to [ask you to donate $3 – yes, just $3 – to invest in states like Virginia, New Jersey, and plenty of local races across the country.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te31d27b1-1b58-4742-b4bf-b3060cebba60/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
|
---
| | | | | But before we do, we want to explain why funding Democrats in these areas is the ONLY OPTION to stop Project 2025.
1. With Trump coming back into office, Americans across the country will head back to the polls to vote for statewide and local candidates – including the next governors in Virginia and New Jersey. If Democrats can win majorities at every level, they will be able to STOP PROJECT 2025.

2. There are at least THREE HOUSE SPECIAL ELECTIONS to see who will replace Matt Gaetz, Elise Stefanik, and Mike Waltz. If Democrats can flip these three seats, Hakeem Jeffries will lead the new Democratic HOUSE MAJORITY as Speaker.

3. With JD Vance and Marco Rubio going into Trump’s administration, Democrats will have an opportunity to cut the GOP Senate majority BY HALF. Democrats need to gain every inch in order to stop the Trump circus.

---
| | [STOP PROJECT 2025 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T43086725-415b-4b8e-aaef-71b9727f2eea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| You see, Peter, 2025 is a big year for Democrats to bounce back. Repeating the 2024 election is not an option. And $3 is all it takes. [So before you log off, will you be a democracy defender by investing $3 to these key races across the country?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d97f599-85ba-4d7c-a382-d64f7e40c29b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb94154e6-82e8-4bf6-88fb-2ff7e2a86907/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: All On The Line
subject: Help avoid another brutal, egregiously partisan, mid-decade gerrymander
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Without our work, anti-democracy politicians will keep pursuing map manipulation in order to win unearned power.
|
---

Peter,
In November, voters in Ohio had the chance to create a citizen-led redistricting commission and remove politicians from the redistricting process altogether.
But partisan forces did everything they could to sabotage the ballot initiative, running millions of dollars of misleading advertising — and it worked. Issue 1 was defeated at the polls. Now, Peter, we’re gearing up for a redraw of Ohio’s congressional map later this year. That’s because the current map was passed along party lines and expires before the next census cycle.
We’ve seen how shameless some Ohio politicians can be in the pursuit of power — it’s going to take everything we’ve got to stop map manipulators from stealing House seats through another partisan gerrymander.
[**Will you make a donation right now to make sure we’re prepared to defend democracy in Ohio and beyond?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100282383/522251277/358328389?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_OHMid_email_20250112-AOTL-Tier1-OHMid_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250112-AOTL-Tier1-OHMid_&utm_campaign=OHMid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI1ZWU1ZmZhLWY1ZDAtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZUbTbKxK7J9FzYWxWT7aJVX6Rka15je6R-q-Lej93N8=)

This redraw could have big implications not only for Ohio but also for the nation at large.
We've seen legislative majorities in other states use mid-decade redraws to pass egregiously gerrymandered maps that are designed to flip House seats.
Anti-democracy politicians will keep pursuing map manipulation in order to win unearned power — and without our work, they will succeed.
[**If you believe that voters should choose their representatives — and not the other way around — chip in to help protect our maps from gerrymandering and restore fairness to our democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100282399/522251315/358328389?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_OHMid_email_20250112-AOTL-Tier1-OHMid_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250112-AOTL-Tier1-OHMid_&utm_campaign=OHMid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI1ZWU1ZmZhLWY1ZDAtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZUbTbKxK7J9FzYWxWT7aJVX6Rka15je6R-q-Lej93N8=)

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: The cost of a large cup of coffee
body:
---
Good morning, Derek! [**We're writing to ask you to make a $5 donation to the Democratic National Committee.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?amount=5&refcode=em_20250112_2530_fr&refcode2=2530_22930333_aGjOzp&akid=2530%2E22930333%2EaGjOzp) Why $5? Because for the cost of a large cup of coffee, you can help Democrats take on Project 2025, protect Social Security and Medicare, and defend our democracy by ensuring we hold Trump and his administration accountable. It might not sound like $5 can do all of those things. But these donations add up. And in this moment, it will take Democrats all across the country coming together to help build the strongest possible Party. With Trump about to be inaugurated, and with a Republican Congress and billionaire-stacked Cabinet ready to do his bidding, we have to be prepared for anything. At the same time, we’ll need a huge number of resources to elect Democrats at all levels who will check Trump and his allies’ power. [**If you're able, will you please make a $5 donation (or more if you can) directly to the Democratic National Committee today? Right now, it’s not about how much you can give, but about how many people are stepping up to send a powerful message that Democrats aren’t done fighting.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?amount=5&refcode=em_20250112_2530_fr&refcode2=2530_22930333_aGjOzp&akid=2530%2E22930333%2EaGjOzp) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_20250112_2530_fr&refcode2=2530_22930333_aGjOzp&akid=2530%2E22930333%2EaGjOzp)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?refcode=em_20250112_2530_fr&refcode2=2530_22930333_aGjOzp&akid=2530%2E22930333%2EaGjOzp)**
---
****
We’re running out of time before Trump is inaugurated. We’re really counting on a strong showing of support right now.
Thank you,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Tabitha Glenn | Vice President | USO
subject: California Wildfire Alert:
body:
Help the USO support our heroes.
[](https://www.uso.org)
[RUSH A DONATION](https://links.e.uso.)
---
_**URGENT: The USO is actively supporting National Guard and service members as they respond to the devastating wildfires in California -- but we need your help.** **[Will you rush an emergency donation now to support our heroes around the world at this critical moment?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/e-LPBjy4baJx/eFBoNFl6bjB5SlZXcDBnR2tiN0JtWDVDSFhEZUJPYVNFUjdzWU5pa2lMdC8rbjJwZ0NFR0c0bUVkQnd6UVJpdFk1WHRkUUIrQXV4ZkZlVjBLTWovbDYzQmcwaXVsV1pUdEdKZk5sKzV2M2c9S0/ZU91ZUVQa1psdEwwWTBhYnJ6eXBvbXpVa3hBVHVNWTFEQW1mR2RLeGJmaGFiUTVtUG42OVA1T2YzT09IOEdEVUZWcVFRZmRNYW5IME0wVXJtTGcxOGFUVFpZbkx0dE9OS0)**_ *
---
The situation on the ground in California is still rapidly changing, but I wanted to provide a quick update. Here's what you need to know:
1. Multiple life-threatening wildfires are still raging in Los Angeles County. The death toll is climbing, over 150,000 people are under evacuation orders and many have lost everything they own.
2. California National Guard members are actively responding to this crisis. With virtually no notice, they deployed to the front lines, risking their personal safety to assist firefighters and protect civilians.
3. Thanks to generous folks like you, the USO is actively supporting them. We have two Mobile USOs deployed in the region providing food, water and other critical support. **[Will you rush $29 or more to help us keep supporting our heroes in California and around the world?](https://links.e.uso.)**

**[RUSH AN EMERGENCY DONATION NOW](https://links.e.uso.)**
---
The USO proudly goes wherever our service members are deployed, providing much-needed resources and connections to home. This crisis is no different. But as a nonprofit organization, we rely on generous people like you to help provide vital support when our heroes need it most.
**2025 has already brought unprecedented crises, and to support service members in California and around the world through whatever they face this year, we 've set an urgent $100,000 goal. ****[Please rush $29, $58 or whatever you can spare today to help ensure the USO can be there for our heroes no matter what.](https://links.e.uso.)**
**[RUSH AN EMERGENCY DONATION NOW](https://links.e.uso.)**
---
We'll continue to keep you updated on this rapidly developing situation. Thank you for all you do to support our heroes in uniform -- especially in moments of crisis.
Tabitha Glenn
Vice President, USO
*Your contribution will be joined with the contributions of others and used where it is needed most to strengthen the well-being of the people serving in America's military and their families.

* Sing in front of a large group of people (you don’t want to hear my singing voice...)
* **Fight to protect Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid from extremist politicians**
* Learn how to do a cartwheel
* **Bring down everyday costs for working folks across Florida**
* Hang out with my buddy, Rep. James Comer

clean_body: Honestly, reaching out to ask for your hard-earned cash is one of my least favorite jobs. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click | = Folks, I know reading my emails isn’t at the top of your to-do list every morning. And honestly, reaching out to ask for your hard-earned cash is one of my least favorite jobs. In fact, here’s a list of things I’d rather be doing right now instead... Sing in front of a large group of people (you don’t want to hear my singing voice...) Fight to protect Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid from extremist politicians Learn how to do a cartwheel Bring down everyday costs for working folks across Florida Hang out with my buddy, Rep. James Comer Talk to constituents directly about what issues matter to them So listen, even though the last thing I want to do today is ask for money, the reality is that we can only accomplish the important items on that list with your support. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks so much, \- Jared | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress Jared Moskowitz for Congress PO Box 8784 Coral Springs, FL 33065 United States www.jaredforflorida.com = = to receive fewer emails. | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ce5c47df42b648b48ad10ca70db32123&_e=-yt1Yw8A2NQJGK-Pu2Aj1DMRLr-MXwigpCH376DsoLAPRySYyldJ_CwXjuvrjGrys7kFtjhazD_gsahRlz8bEoR6PaRzFjNUiYGHira36uxZiVOvDYO8bFnwOY1cWpwbmKLhKLLchBW6ex1nnqgnptMv-VsxThquMV66R4Ra8kH3uk0-xo2QhTsaTrd9ziVxLnOAMDQAAi_rDmpcYIUS5oFyv7EL727egO1OynYhw9eKX77UFqReTYnw-kXkmRQE0Fw7ZWd-P6M_49sEgSQ4oPHP3caHIR_hN_VT469ZyN4o7j_iQWEQ8bqCjYIkQl9a68mfadiDb6o84ChFDRXeQkXJaPindwk4wK3C3pR5u-8nrFsjZvjbJGbcZ1YvyjcvyKbJ0Dkhb9BzjPTpNsO1cQ%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ce5c47df42b648b48ad10ca70db32123&_e=-yt1Yw8A2NQJGK-Pu2Aj1DMRLr-MXwigpCH376DsoLAPRySYyldJ_CwXjuvrjGrys7kFtjhazD_gsahRlz8bEoR6PaRzFjNUiYGHira36uxZiVOvDYO8bFnwOY1cWpwbmKLhKLLchBW6ex1nnqgnptMv-VsxThquMV66R4Ra8kH3uk0-xo2QhTsaTrd9ziVxLnOAMDQAAi_rDmpcYIUS5oFyv7EL727egO1OynYhw9eKX77UFqReTYnw-kXkmRQEp9gMPxEj-rCs7Gem9hiSxW9NH01Urg4hCtxBzuESd_DLkfblchyq8CASKEd7XGJeE-sJYHjJb1epWJIk4Kdl4Qh5cTwrGJHzyI9_TdJ9hQCPae_jZcYj9_6bGqzmn3CHxkvpYFURR2gR9L-Fok5L4A%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=42b79bf37d6e481e8431d49f0efd363e&_e=LnHDQF6ywCLsjKFEF1CfCUrMiHnMgXQIEeErr8orFtRvySUJqf70a1Cebf3NNmvx1exhDBsNqgIlFooek4TfzyVG4Oy0bHi7e6P1B1QjxAGtD1scYha__KBEGs12Z9zvIpz-TJceWK-JRmagkAqstR96bYwuKGkKSkeeMU_lfqcqlnE3KSSr8OI6f4mPZiuAwFbyDLIKEUl4S2RMxQFSZ0s0Fba-JS2YYOoOCaV22-GHElP49LedY0vUJpKuUOdBQTqOJ3nAMhFeqeWMqrGAopZbXTGgoeawF2oBED5XVVxxu_zCdQm_AE26Vq1_KPPZKfoyPJRgjP1PdeRoClmuRdCbqplw08-2Bs1MsPU2hAFLsbjwY-Zpl9CEySHvrGzbc0tU93ZwEcxTU4eVrAQh_VkCUXOFlpy8cuZvtyr-yGM%3D)

Peter,

The effort to tank Pete Hegseth's nomination is one of the most coordinated smear campaigns I've ever seen in DC.

Pete is going to get his hearing before the Senate Armed Services Committee, not a sham hearing before the American media.

**[And before he does, I'm calling on ALL PATRIOTIC AMERICANS to rush to his defense and fill up our Official Letter of Support with MILLIONS of signatures. >>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=42b79bf37d6e481e8431d49f0efd363e&_e=LnHDQF6ywCLsjKFEF1CfCUrMiHnMgXQIEeErr8orFtRvySUJqf70a1Cebf3NNmvx1exhDBsNqgIlFooek4TfzyVG4Oy0bHi7e6P1B1QjxAGtD1scYha__KBEGs12Z9zvIpz-TJceWK-JRmagkAqstR96bYwuKGkKSkeeMU_lfqcqlnE3KSSr8OI6f4mPZiuAwFbyDLIKEUl4S2RMxQFSZ0s0Fba-JS2YYOoOCaV22-GHElP49LedY0vUJpKuUOdB_9X3xhd17S6r4P81UA6fVEm-m4cwkQDDxFkFA5mWVV9QBPDwBP_FGtC5mr_u8oV6c8MvO2A-rqKyV6wJNd4l-ftSOIqL5eV0z9UehEF-B2U5FHDmDA-eI2lNF-T-_NbkdScND3-_qFia2xs9BPTvErUHpaSMQGyXgvzBS1oRmjc%3D)

**[SIGN THE LETTER](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=42b79bf37d6e481e8431d49f0efd363e&_e=LnHDQF6ywCLsjKFEF1CfCUrMiHnMgXQIEeErr8orFtRvySUJqf70a1Cebf3NNmvx1exhDBsNqgIlFooek4TfzyVG4Oy0bHi7e6P1B1QjxAGtD1scYha__KBEGs12Z9zvIpz-TJceWK-JRmagkAqstR96bYwuKGkKSkeeMU_lfqcqlnE3KSSr8OI6f4mPZiuAwFbyDLIKEUl4S2RMxQFSZ0s0Fba-JS2YYOoOCaV22-GHElP49LedY0vUJpKuUOdBmmidIBaQaAafh4gjfpdzOm83ShsX5jy_Tq2ZcmKAk5oTokgXv-tGJRyg5hquI_SD_98L6hHwB3pJnB9aoc3z62r7hF9nuLf_jFFvDz-IncKgCXNmhKIEQX5EWIjaovt3OqphzMoTp7AuMT_96q1BYIXs8uWwpgDewUT8vQUDFas%3D)**

They can't go after President Trump and me. We already beat them in a landslide!

That's why they've focused their efforts on attacking a proud veteran like Pete Hegseth.

Pete will dismantle their DEI agenda, eradicate wokeism, and build our military back into a fighting machine - _**and that TERRIFIES them.**_

**[But as a veteran, I'm PROUD to endorse Pete Hegseth as our next Secretary of Defense, and I'm hoping that you'll do the same by signing his Official Letter of Support. >>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=42b79bf37d6e481e8431d49f0efd363e&_e=LnHDQF6ywCLsjKFEF1CfCUrMiHnMgXQIEeErr8orFtRvySUJqf70a1Cebf3NNmvx1exhDBsNqgIlFooek4TfzyVG4Oy0bHi7e6P1B1QjxAGtD1scYha__KBEGs12Z9zvIpz-TJceWK-JRmagkAqstR96bYwuKGkKSkeeMU_lfqcqlnE3KSSr8OI6f4mPZiuAwFbyDLIKEUl4S2RMxQFSZ0s0Fba-JS2YYOoOCaV22-GHElP49LedY0vUJpKuUOdBG7W03aBtus_1dPGYQ1GZZrFgPyCyt1482HMLXTwUVt9spDTwMoBAaFvl-bWdtBr17sU07vWDJC_uQx2ZecybyVzfiLhS6cHhn0VJ2WsfDz5etxn-6133BVTUgtKAo9Kb_Hn8gxsVdNxMeWrPlAzNJxvnNKPeg29ItBl8JJPWkBQ%3D)

**[SIGN THE LETTER](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=42b79bf37d6e481e8431d49f0efd363e&_e=LnHDQF6ywCLsjKFEF1CfCUrMiHnMgXQIEeErr8orFtRvySUJqf70a1Cebf3NNmvx1exhDBsNqgIlFooek4TfzyVG4Oy0bHi7e6P1B1QjxAGtD1scYha__KBEGs12Z9zvIpz-TJceWK-JRmagkAqstR96bYwuKGkKSkeeMU_lfqcqlnE3KSSr8OI6f4mPZiuAwFbyDLIKEUl4S2RMxQFSZ0s0Fba-JS2YYOoOCaV22-GHElP49LedY0vUJpKuUOdBy1jHEBKxKB7TDU6aWuuc762FKzEL_EiOLKrDXXYG7vgkzpxgFvl_b3v1iDQAujNYK_CtJY1fDGh3xR467QQZrTN7NKe-0mNF4cWd91c5-gjqjcDASWV3RxBwOKzhAhKBfTDxbCjQaQVaTbT0YDOmjeVifSfqZdJcCGI5fGMeQZw%3D)**

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What do all these signs and symbols mean for you?
body:
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=745acae41a2e4e7ca24445a61a171ceb&_e=WidxTRGbwimOlOFpd7AtQHK6aQKovSpVrXYOWqbKdFE4X5wYMoX3xUMQSJjP_nan8zJuoQOe3pYHmxFPV1L7jSPK-qZin6ibBsV2--OzksNY_xtERDRYbxTfNtbD-wgRmxp8x375W8I7-LXIYmG_CjvvS9i9RwVKArG_BpwBcsZ0kVnCc9Xzg-v84sVNnkIFLABGtV94zX-0GK3b85OvQ3buxl5omHAilpptnt9dbt7ABEY4QrmB-B27EPkP2DLWjf4TgIgNVL6h3JfuodpY73WUFBPY6KfJVEBL74KDUmz5hwKkT-Srjo6as1mosZqO89QzdpO8ACVN_4RK-5IaX03SPf2AW5QJFfpKrrZ5KjgL9m0ELsy6uigMonMC0-7YeeKnwSeFgGJJ7sXaTbc-dQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter, Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return? _When we all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!_ _When we all see Jesus, we’ll sing and shout the victory!_ The words of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ’s return is going to be glorious! **But between now and then, how should we live**? What does God’s Word say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ... **what should our response be?**
---
| | When I have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation, which I’ve found helps provide answers and strength in these dark days. And today, I’m pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the book of Revelation entitled _Final Conquest._ Final Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It’s all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event in human history. This book will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn’t want you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God’s plan as never before — you’ll be encouraged!
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=745acae41a2e4e7ca24445a61a171ceb&_e=WidxTRGbwimOlOFpd7AtQHK6aQKovSpVrXYOWqbKdFE4X5wYMoX3xUMQSJjP_nan8zJuoQOe3pYHmxFPV1L7jSPK-qZin6ibBsV2--OzksNY_xtERDRYbxTfNtbD-wgRmxp8x375W8I7-LXIYmG_CjvvS9i9RwVKArG_BpwBcsZ0kVnCc9Xzg-v84sVNnkIFLABGtV94zX-0GK3b85OvQ3buxl5omHAilpptnt9dbt56NAx1ONDCZTr-nG3JT4rae9M6hYm24ffkIJy-GWedBZOxPpzWb8W6vl1dZzVyiqyAFNR4cx2ryIobVW5-vZGZz-zTOJB6Pp0KgZ2YyEnjxJQMBuTKpSsOOrp0IXeY1XxLxEvi8f6p-a5wbX40PSBIqGTfJptCDhkrOP72u-ZVNQ%3D%3D)
---
| | With your generous donation to _Pathway to Victory_ \-- to help keep our ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of _Final Conquest_ for free! You can make your most generous donation here: [https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=745acae41a2e4e7ca24445a61a171ceb&_e=WidxTRGbwimOlOFpd7AtQHK6aQKovSpVrXYOWqbKdFE4X5wYMoX3xUMQSJjP_nan8zJuoQOe3pYHmxFPV1L7jSPK-qZin6ibBsV2--OzksNY_xtERDRYbxTfNtbD-wgRmxp8x375W8I7-LXIYmG_CjvvS9i9RwVKArG_BpwBcsZ0kVnCc9Xzg-v84sVNnkIFLABGtV94zX-0GK3b85OvQ3buxl5omHAilpptnt9dbt6WEO7Q_zsFl4KJEowJybKKobQp-fcCXf3TEdNCdG_rw2kvK6556NfkJmk-FPT3mI6JX8Yapdo1t280Zu_vQRENv8hnMN1sPbKFm-uDJp0fcjHWg6eT15NOVSXvYoksz9Ak1I2jqtM1AcoullH4eQxi0U4P1eCENxttf4rqzC16fw%3D%3D) One day soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest. Until that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom. Sincerely, Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Targeting my husband and President Trump
body:
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward.
Dear Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=54bd34009f9949edb93317d5c3b760ce&_e=dPDor0LuNP0nGJAAX7H1RHelOioAULM-LfCMdTepKfX9GTjyvKWGumzKQru4E3LzFF0HKbAZX1w2TJoq-ff7bxZY38WpT2H0yTG4WlhCiyljIxo0k5XaKBNvLLHBm_PrKUyxs1F4Y6PzoPJ9JUNfwSDcnZ8NoMZzMVCvOdLWn2Xv-HUx4amw2lXfJRGI44ApEsZE9diVk5euUGze3vh7dREsDSy0oJ_V9n9Qj9s2h9IjwSvreAwiOIBBTVfv-2Zp9FDAUbaL6sNCN_NDFHxB39eF7epE_V5yujNdZspvpve4DDw7-poOz9xFIIJWfC4e2V5edQ_Jg2QUcez0fhlshYt63KZxUYEanb9qC3OFdag7GiCtbkgvk6KEKj98ktP0XyXfDMsVbcDSHiYQlAu0FA%3D%3D)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=54bd34009f9949edb93317d5c3b760ce&_e=dPDor0LuNP0nGJAAX7H1RHelOioAULM-LfCMdTepKfX9GTjyvKWGumzKQru4E3LzFF0HKbAZX1w2TJoq-ff7bxZY38WpT2H0yTG4WlhCiyljIxo0k5XaKBNvLLHBm_PrKUyxs1F4Y6PzoPJ9JUNfwSDcnZ8NoMZzMVCvOdLWn2Xv-HUx4amw2lXfJRGI44ApEsZE9diVk5euUGze3vh7dREsDSy0oJ_V9n9Qj9s2h9LSp25t9M--ml3FIoOo823XOVUFqVNkagcgRzMk4Mt8ZoP7-xv7f7ZQH2bNYVDJqNK4jgSzPjrXNxmw_Z7W_T5SMNtPSXPQWVVomUgvFqy97kqJDTEDHIqELx_y51LCsxk2RF55AvH-w-cHSosKYL3T6ofnE-QqZpMWKHFfrqEDgg%3D%3D)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=54bd34009f9949edb93317d5c3b760ce&_e=dPDor0LuNP0nGJAAX7H1RHelOioAULM-LfCMdTepKfX9GTjyvKWGumzKQru4E3LzFF0HKbAZX1w2TJoq-ff7bxZY38WpT2H0yTG4WlhCiyljIxo0k5XaKBNvLLHBm_PrKUyxs1F4Y6PzoPJ9JUNfwSDcnZ8NoMZzMVCvOdLWn2Xv-HUx4amw2lXfJRGI44ApEsZE9diVk5euUGze3vh7dREsDSy0oJ_V9n9Qj9s2h9L_1-D0lEoZkNI88YVoS4BWt6MxY6eD4vnn26J1sRG4M7qdXC0N35vyNA1490QF_5wxo45qfCuYbtFAdc-3wcDKnM6XcreMxn7M21H9auQ_FYjEbgsajs_nzt9MbI-Q8b_CQxVOSgFd5isgxfkjcb6gwLydAGcy-1gcdfYKUSnv7Q%3D%3D)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=54bd34009f9949edb93317d5c3b760ce&_e=dPDor0LuNP0nGJAAX7H1RHelOioAULM-LfCMdTepKfX9GTjyvKWGumzKQru4E3LzFF0HKbAZX1w2TJoq-ff7bxZY38WpT2H0yTG4WlhCiyljIxo0k5XaKBNvLLHBm_PrKUyxs1F4Y6PzoPJ9JUNfwSDcnZ8NoMZzMVCvOdLWn2Xv-HUx4amw2lXfJRGI44ApEsZE9diVk5euUGze3vh7dREsDSy0oJ_V9n9Qj9s2h9LZtWH6hL6nSkghrXynI0ChQTOJfnFNDIdzdnwxEH3ueKDe7aEOFDAGYhyldeDlrqi0G2lEsafTLTcByMJfcyiLvSNck1s4F_XjKBsUE7Xxxx_4CpzcEXwV1gnQHWCDfMvg9bCmS_IxpWm6uAGsRwNPgCPFgp-wkmCVd_nt_jhQ2A%3D%3D)**

His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=54bd34009f9949edb93317d5c3b760ce&_e=dPDor0LuNP0nGJAAX7H1RHelOioAULM-LfCMdTepKfX9GTjyvKWGumzKQru4E3LzFF0HKbAZX1w2TJoq-ff7bxZY38WpT2H0yTG4WlhCiyljIxo0k5XaKBNvLLHBm_PrKUyxs1F4Y6PzoPJ9JUNfwSDcnZ8NoMZzMVCvOdLWn2Xv-HUx4amw2lXfJRGI44ApEsZE9diVk5euUGze3vh7dREsDSy0oJ_V9n9Qj9s2h9IlmlVGvLn8KhqFEeU0S81mV0AU_YfpHuek_B39Ke3bBlZ8OKTOZ41cmOt3G2LeVVqiVR1_fM_3zzPsL49dtTYnTI3F7TZjDj5C6uy1MEB69SR1FwwY9pDSmR8pdx7Kfw9Q1ybIZCMb80KYVooLLrXR18YWEJhPoZ-J92E2daPEtA%3D%3D)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=54bd34009f9949edb93317d5c3b760ce&_e=dPDor0LuNP0nGJAAX7H1RHelOioAULM-LfCMdTepKfX9GTjyvKWGumzKQru4E3LzFF0HKbAZX1w2TJoq-ff7bxZY38WpT2H0yTG4WlhCiyljIxo0k5XaKBNvLLHBm_PrKUyxs1F4Y6PzoPJ9JUNfwSDcnZ8NoMZzMVCvOdLWn2Xv-HUx4amw2lXfJRGI44ApEsZE9diVk5euUGze3vh7dREsDSy0oJ_V9n9Qj9s2h9KMftq7syeizn26YO9Br-Y9AWL3Z43WZGvGAj7yQIqeFDl-UlyMpuHRsMVjQ8eJlTf8VudUgGECwfu0FbkVIi-842nnlxZYUUnT7stPqppLMNU2lGiByz2t_w2dsa3yWiIMJ41IABVdNc3b3Kk7DpPKIjIxc7KaYSCVFBDY-B9nPg%3D%3D)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=54bd34009f9949edb93317d5c3b760ce&_e=dPDor0LuNP0nGJAAX7H1RHelOioAULM-LfCMdTepKfX9GTjyvKWGumzKQru4E3LzFF0HKbAZX1w2TJoq-ff7bxZY38WpT2H0yTG4WlhCiyljIxo0k5XaKBNvLLHBm_PrKUyxs1F4Y6PzoPJ9JUNfwSDcnZ8NoMZzMVCvOdLWn2Xv-HUx4amw2lXfJRGI44ApEsZE9diVk5euUGze3vh7dREsDSy0oJ_V9n9Qj9s2h9Lpl6HKMiPHlndoBHZvpatnPI7ArIyN5aIrqsRB1RxE73-zlt0NCfRs0wcH1NHa1_VlT2vQCD36JE95worC473EU_IIr0-3Sa79D_692QWNlulrmXIVgDSAEVJrsfVQ0_0_UVb6RI408Qe1RWxsf6iUtg-OF4EB9JQxky9iciyWNQ%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=54bd34009f9949edb93317d5c3b760ce&_e=dPDor0LuNP0nGJAAX7H1RHSfcgenLCZKTL2759f0XU3PdqQ3uC0b8lBBg2f9nb3urzvxpHCBPN6yQPgJ_JWakEavD8vT44WYwLVAwU78EsN70VxuOtzfCDCHVzofgO6M26UND8OeTxJTtjCAeTyYWCFo4XJQdz10CkriXe2d-RUWm8ETsKr-6k8cKX6uV5TroPIOVemeoFXue9ZO1ezHgA%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

name: Qasim Rashid, Esq.
subject: Why Your Support Matters To Me
body:
My sincere ask of you to complete one, two, or all three calls to action I list here (but hopefully at least one call to action)

## My Three Calls To Action
Therefore, here are my 3 calls to action--_I hope you choose to complete at least 1 of them_. Your support has gotten us this far, and your support will elevate _Let 's Address This_ to the next level (especially as we face an incoming fascist President).
1. Jump in. Become a paid subscriber at a cup of coffee ($6) a month or $50 a year.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.._6EsfLTU5Id-X1Qzvu5p47BDd9E-dB7Mm8yxNlTdE3o?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=154653473)
2. Grow our community. Gift a subscription to a friend or loved one.
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack.._6EsfLTU5Id-X1Qzvu5p47BDd9E-dB7Mm8yxNlTdE3o?&gift=true)

## **A Final Word**
Donald Trump is reportedly planning to sign 100 Executive Orders within the first 24 hours of his inauguration. These include mass deportations, another Muslim ban, book bans, anti-LGBTQ orders, and more. Corporate media has already kissed his ring, and will not have the courage or integrity to convey accurate information.
My mission remains clear and firm--**uphold absolute justice and human rights in all I do and advocate** , and do so without billionaire support. Instead, do so with the people, by the people, and for the people. **This is why I seek and want your support.** Every dollar we spend is a vote for the kind of future we want. Help me build a future more committed to justice and universal human rights. Subscribe, share, and let's remain relentless in our mission for a more perfect Union.
**Thank you for your trust. ❤️**
Sincerely,
Qasim

body:
Fight fossil fuel pipelines, which drive climate change and environmental disasters. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW4MjGVok-goHmYgg34bXwpOL6DTR5g7ixq3N-oMNaWRsEl_q_tEwGcwHnxNlfjPVFFK3nFZA7quJ6oS5khl_wQSP_FAlUoWXMZPW19387qaDGRAK53oQUk71N4S21SLvdQge_sqxFk4KpLrzrshAMqkKid-Zvt_LqouVq_l0waApbzpvrxHbZ6706u4L9DDHPmb476Ern4G6l3TDAqX8YjjekUw6uZFut6yB6ME06N-qMhxLYMhFYP1BUJqt1i8Hby7zsRbg8VtlE2_Pofu9gaQH7L9dkxbx6LoKJ_fgnzlzasZyOX8TEh2-REp4KRTtjA3TwPwfmQZT9eiVkxVK6Dw/4d3/bGhQG9YOSUK7sr6o1fMiAg/h0/h001.b1dCEFr15FjdJDzhlxH8YbP0aN_WuGRyU0AGBtWl-e0)
---
Friend, I’ve had the honor of joining Indigenous land and water defenders in the fight to stop the Line 5 pipeline in my state of Michigan and the Line 3 pipeline in Minnesota. Both pipelines carry dirty crude oil from Canadian tar sands, which is even more carbon-intensive and dangerous for our climate than “conventional” oil. The Canadian company Enbridge Energy operates both pipelines and has a history of faulty infrastructure and catastrophic leaks. Both pipelines have been responsible for some of the worst inland oil spills in the United States, and Line 5 in particular threatens the Great Lakes, which provide drinking water for 40 million people. We can’t let the water we rely on be sacrificed for corporate greed, and we need to keep fossil fuels in the ground. In his final week in the White House, President Biden can revoke the permits for both Line 3 and Line 5 right now. [**Will you sign the petition to President Biden to urge him to revoke the permits for the dangerous, polluting Line 3 and Line 5 pipelines? In the final week of his presidency, he can take these important actions to protect our climate and our water.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_yYvxXs0kM92b2oWueaO7WgAI3Jm8Pn0qQT7oxzScZtv10GIeJjDp07RMj_oxy_tXgiKWzKLR5nJ3RJMfZnixUomCY9-5p5io19VpaWPIbl6BA5e9k42pzoIEXHaEQSnP_4DKFp8U-37tNNV_9WT4VaTuaIZNJQh1DIZKBiZHhvxngOxab1xrW7veAH11mDbnyV6SECWDVRVoCtxD6ZhLyn9Am3bh5GMZhKG7C5GCBCi_EhjtUboH54nOvw6lPCfMazZmjyYgzSi69MSu0OH49XCiZFUQe_gzJK67Wq8lvDJ7M79wFhWVWatAMblV_WXAZryiYMJj1w0nxIHj2ApAhJJ_WBcLLgzBBPyERXoure8Wkt7yscpu2IuFFmmJEaoglY7AH9HZCeGdgS__el8YLPd_j74Zoc_HyhwsQone3rziao3A1gVUM_K4vnumT1JOzAgPnmCuGQYN2TmUHM3DYl-h7x2Z5NuiiuGMWXiWZb70zTRmqAhjo3K7cHPZ4eG2LG4bv--tXvi3OgrkrJvo_bCDFHpidMF0ywUy9hPY3UDGkHXDqlmpZd_ncEf2TcxI/4d3/bGhQG9YOSUK7sr6o1fMiAg/h1/h001.ct8pJm4SBbihtsruqP6TyJB-k-ACGo0KjiMqfZhXnuU) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_yYvxXs0kM92b2oWueaO7WgAI3Jm8Pn0qQT7oxzScZtv10GIeJjDp07RMj_oxy_tXgiKWzKLR5nJ3RJMfZnixUomCY9-5p5io19VpaWPIbl6BA5e9k42pzoIEXHaEQSnP_4DKFp8U-37tNNV_9WT4V3Mc4rCwilZPTR0b61CCxetRkYce9N5lsgL33kjBUhiPQ8zEX5fxtQVgLNynj-gi-5KSc2DPAQYuHi_zroKhkYmheBlwYdS_P2l2OJC2XkEp47Fa5ZXRQfsAXlo8ACZDuYOaw6ym3hi4XRmx3VpZH99G3yXXkVhwnBqyxSVKASSkH35lPk0KKU7PA1Zy0vhVIPF-lV0LPtNMbzSGklSAC9SLTgCwNlgYxZMfdflV7Z2-mztZgYhva0RvAYDi9AnHjPoFzRj5acYpd4p1lVdeFv-zDmCJJs8ldZL07VEC4NeQrh3nBpvcfXm78miXAV6r3BjOy-ZkCYwY68PzLXGn858ffWiZr_RLaO4dmbtMw8aa4YR6yBtr5OR-1EsmbJjUDDofiA-fMUTGuGJk6JwwgJmYjiGFdDD_XVzCrZjuARBo/4d3/bGhQG9YOSUK7sr6o1fMiAg/h2/h001.rPt5FIQZNF3TZ9K1_EFJfUAy3xgR2xhEeePRrmB7yxY)
---
Thank you for taking action. We’ll keep pushing our government to recognize clean air and water as a human right. With the fossil fuel industry about to gain even more power under a Republican-controlled White House and Congress, we will not back down in the shared fight for environmental justice.
In solidarity,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Jan 11, 2025
Subject: Line 5 pipeline threatens our drinking water, but Biden can revoke permit his last week in office
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
The devastating wildfires in Los Angeles this week are yet another example of the risks our communities face as climate change intensifies environmental disasters.
The fossil fuel industry will soon have even more power with a Republican-controlled Congress and White House, but **in his final week in the White House, President Biden can take some important environmental actions.**
In the past few weeks Biden has designated new national monuments to protect sacred land from mining and oil and gas exploration, and permanently banned offshore oil and gas drilling for millions of acres of ocean. His environmental legacy should include at least one more step: revoking the permit for the Line 5 pipeline, which transports some of the dirtiest and most carbon-intensive oil through my state of Michigan and more.
[**Add your name to demand President Biden revoke permits for the Line 5 pipeline, which endangers the Great Lakes and nearby communities, and the Line 3 pipeline, which endangers communities in Minnesota, North Dakota, and Wisconsin.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_yYvxXs0kM92b2oWueaO7WgAI3Jm8Pn0qQT7oxzScZtv10GIeJjDp07RMj_oxy_tXgiKWzKLR5nJ3RJMfZnixUomCY9-5p5io19VpaWPIbl6BA5e9k42pzoIEXHaEQSnP_4DKFp8U-37tNNV_9WT4VYvhHMyyk67zOGC93YPQVxI3ZtDA97N_ArCN0buSJsVYwCoPbzHx_WrJJLrwu4vvqmUl1kkZh7z9T5meoSO9rYU9jA0LWV-UpjkEVMAWBARiXTtouyBjrvr1pugj_hALD1eKDZIafHqOvkNPJLPiW2Q8T4SQuqz5HGMPpXcYQVIX5k6X_5uQUD6E_MIzZFzNnaRLQ3ATAUymwOM5sfLqTAcgSzTfVQHAjlVTw5clI-rYN4Cys352WKSP3iA9wTDVquRVsKXC4QPnk3xZb_IORsmkzwTR2SYxosYtsxpOt_F7BwsDmMYU_UICNryIrFNFH3grQqy8XJnmoChfkVQSUmQkXeDvSZbYpXBLqvHTCqxNiEN219RUryxFB7okw93ulX2Tkeh0hOHBxm8_8lEMXg4AhHPWAYR-Ot-KvN1vtXZs/4d3/bGhQG9YOSUK7sr6o1fMiAg/h3/h001.vD3v8gRQMmpM4UH-2ks6yJ_G757_Gioz4c30vgpERE8)
[SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_yYvxXs0kM92b2oWueaO7WgAI3Jm8Pn0qQT7oxzScZtv10GIeJjDp07RMj_oxy_tXgiKWzKLR5nJ3RJMfZnixUomCY9-5p5io19VpaWPIbl6BA5e9k42pzoIEXHaEQSnP_4DKFp8U-37tNNV_9WT4VHl0Ir4mLb1b4qZ0h4AvcL_NCZk7RIK83cLYOwyJyJjdgf5tWMfjFW91mqvRv2di2eYDnjw2EU8fekOkBgaS2CZ4Z6He-2QmvIF13ryKW2UOhIcZ7QlbxGfV-JAGQ4a4hhNJuUjbnebyfdnZNVl9lObxxPY87wyUf65Tvxz0ew0H71ug1wVIGKgZQv_qJTYgu1Nia-F07LyHXOIr9qvSxO44QdxwxyXyqrT7lKn1mdkyGfeZ5-Hrvo8RbDTFAr1AXhK7NBWSMOwF56g55eZjnbEM4t6M-rwlvbFloDE22x7L4LmazgKajzEiuM_e3L0dNh5ujA45hV1CBTkD7dw0Iqm1UcEEyqf9hcaXnO4asOGax5uarMB03ZYyWEoWKpBeVyjX0fue6SVx5fVq2siUGseOrwajL4s0M5pOxo_Debx0/4d3/bGhQG9YOSUK7sr6o1fMiAg/h4/h001.5sKjgNN5h32jaT1ad8yboeGWvTNFHSKB63MF9ipnIkQ)
---
The Line 5 pipeline threatens drinking water for more than 40 million people. Reminding us that “water is life,” Tribal Nations across the Great Lakes oppose the pipeline and have been trying to shut it down for years. Native land and water defenders have also been resisting and trying to stop the Line 3 pipeline for years.
Both pipelines are operated by the same company, Enbridge Energy. Enbridge has a disturbing history of faulty infrastructure and environmental destruction, including in my home state of Michigan. Line 5’s infrastructure is dangerously outdated and aging, increasing the risks of catastrophic oil spills.
As the Grand Traverse Band of Ottawa and Chippewa Indians explains, Line 5 itself has “already leaked more than 1 million gallons of oil inland,” and “much of Line 5’s crude oil is derived from the Alberta Tar Sands, which is the dirtiest fuel to process on earth.”1 Line 3 is also part of the network of pipelines carrying Canadian oil from tar sands into the United States—pipelines that violate our Indigenous neighbors’ treaty rights and sovereign rights.
We know burning and extracting fossil fuels drives climate change and related disasters, which is why the environmental movement and Native communities have demanded we keep fossil fuels in the ground. Additionally, crude tar sands oil has more carbon than “conventional” oil, which means it worsens climate change even more.
[**Can you add your name to urge President Biden to revoke the permits for the dangerous Line 3 and Line 5 pipelines?
