clean_body: Fight fossil fuel pipelines, which drive climate change and environmental disasters. | | | Friend, I’ve had the honor of joining Indigenous land and water defenders in the fight to stop the Line 5 pipeline in my state of Michigan and the Line 3 pipeline in Minnesota. Both pipelines carry dirty crude oil from Canadian tar sands, which is even more carbon-intensive and dangerous for our climate than “conventional” oil. The Canadian company Enbridge Energy operates both pipelines and has a history of faulty infrastructure and catastrophic leaks. Both pipelines have been responsible for some of the worst inland oil spills in the United States, and Line 5 in particular threatens the Great Lakes, which provide drinking water for 40 million people. We can’t let the water we rely on be sacrificed for corporate greed, and we need to keep fossil fuels in the ground. In his final week in the White House, President Biden can revoke the permits for both Line 3 and Line 5 right now. | Thank you for taking action. We’ll keep pushing our government to recognize clean air and water as a human right. With the fossil fuel industry about to gain even more power under a Republican-controlled White House and Congress, we will not back down in the shared fight for environmental justice. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Jan 11, 2025 Subject: Line 5 pipeline threatens our drinking water, but Biden can revoke permit his last week in office To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, The devastating wildfires in Los Angeles this week are yet another example of the risks our communities face as climate change intensifies environmental disasters. The fossil fuel industry will soon have even more power with a Republican-controlled Congress and White House, but in his final week in the White House, President Biden can take some important environmental actions. In the past few weeks Biden has designated new national monuments to protect sacred land from mining and oil and gas exploration, and permanently banned offshore oil and gas drilling for millions of acres of ocean. His environmental legacy should include at least one more step: revoking the permit for the Line 5 pipeline, which transports some of the dirtiest and most carbon-intensive oil through my state of Michigan and more. The Line 5 pipeline threatens drinking water for more than 40 million people. Reminding us that “water is life,” Tribal Nations across the Great Lakes oppose the pipeline and have been trying to shut it down for years. Native land and water defenders have also been resisting and trying to stop the Line 3 pipeline for years. Both pipelines are operated by the same company, Enbridge Energy. Enbridge has a disturbing history of faulty infrastructure and environmental destruction, including in my home state of Michigan. Line 5’s infrastructure is dangerously outdated and aging, increasing the risks of catastrophic oil spills. As the Grand Traverse Band of Ottawa and Chippewa Indians explains, Line 5 itself has “already leaked more than 1 million gallons of oil inland,” and “much of Line 5’s crude oil is derived from the Alberta Tar Sands, which is the dirtiest fuel to process on earth.”1 Line 3 is also part of the network of pipelines carrying Canadian oil from tar sands into the United States—pipelines that violate our Indigenous neighbors’ treaty rights and sovereign rights. We know burning and extracting fossil fuels drives climate change and related disasters, which is why the environmental movement and Native communities have demanded we keep fossil fuels in the ground. Additionally, crude tar sands oil has more carbon than “conventional” oil, which means it worsens climate change even more. Thank you for taking action to protect our planet and our Great Lakes. I’m committed to fighting for environmental justice and I’ll keep taking on corporate polluters in Congress. In solidarity, Rashida 1 * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . body:
We’re willing to bet that when you woke up this morning, your first thought wasn’t that you’d be making your first online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.
#

Friends -
We’re willing to bet that when you woke up this morning, your first thought wasn’t that you’d be making your first online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.
But today we’re asking if you can do just that.
[**If you already know that you’re able to give today, please use this link to make a contribution.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250112-1-b&t=1&akid=9797%2E3935704%2ETOWpox)
If you need a little more convincing, allow us to explain:
Although the new Congress has just begun, House Republicans have wasted no time trying to roll back the progress we’ve made in our gun violence prevention movement. On Wednesday—which was the 14 year anniversary of Gabby being shot in Tucson—the House GOP introduced legislation pushing for national concealed carry reciprocity. Concealed carry reciprocity poses a grave threat to public safety because it allows people to carry loaded, concealed firearms across state lines.
Back in 2017, we fought a national concealed carry bill and won. We know we can defeat this dangerous legislation again, but not without the support of this grassroots community.
So while we know you probably didn’t wake up this morning thinking you’d be making a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC, we hope we’ve shown you that your donation is critical in our efforts to take on the GOP and their gun lobby-backed “guns everywhere” agenda.
[**Will you join us in the fight by making your first online contribution of $3 or more to GIFFORDS PAC?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250112-1-b&t=2&akid=9797%2E3935704%2ETOWpox)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: COURIER
subject: Mark Jacob: Beware of Republicans bearing false fear
body:
Most Americans saw the New Orleans terrorist attack as a tragedy. Republican propagandists saw it as an opportunity.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100289304/522269681/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTc5ODJjMzktMDRkMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=feMu8OMiootre-dtwRaIv7hHfjHpYc2jERn4MRyTyGU=&emci=0c0392da-c3cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=17982c39-04d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=14016711)
Peter –
Last week, we saw a tragedy unfold in New Orleans in the form of a New Year’s terrorist attack. In a moment of fear and mourning, Trump preyed on America’s emotions to spread misinformation about the attacks.
The media predictably failed in their response, calling Trump’s rhetoric a “mistake,” or even praising it as “tough on crime.”
This week, COURIER contributor Mark Jacob dives into why Republicans’ fear-mongering is so dangerous, and what the media – and you – can do to protect our democracy.
**[Please take a moment to read Mark’s article for this week below, and if you support journalism like this, please contribute $25 or whatever you can to help COURIER continue publishing these critical stories.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100289305/522269682/-593472309?refcode=20250112-EM-MarkJacobHighlight&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTc5ODJjMzktMDRkMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=feMu8OMiootre-dtwRaIv7hHfjHpYc2jERn4MRyTyGU=)**
* * *
**Beware of Republicans bearing false fear**
_Reaction to the New Orleans attack raises worries about what’s ahead._
Most Americans saw the New Orleans terrorist attack as a tragedy. Republican propagandists saw it as an opportunity.
That’s what extremists do. They exploit public fear to further their political ambitions – and too often news outlets help them. We’ll see a lot of this under the coming Trump regime, and it will be vital for us to push back. MAGA authoritarians want us to surrender our rights and give them more and more power. We have to tell them no.
After last week’s attack, Fox News issued a false report suggesting an immigration link to the crime. This wasn’t a departure for Fox – it’s in their playbook. Remember, Fox had to pay a $787 million settlement for spreading lies about the 2020 election. Twisting the news is what they do.
Either the Fox report or Donald Trump’s own imagination led him to rant on social media about immigration. Soon after, we learned that the attacker was an American-born citizen. Trump’s rant included a false claim that immigrants pose a bigger crime problem than native-born Americans (research shows the opposite) and that crime in the United States is “at a level that nobody has ever seen before” (in fact, crime is falling and is nowhere near an all-time high).
Even when it was clear that the terrorist attacker was not an immigrant, Republican leaders kept talking about the border in the context of the attack, intent on erasing the facts with rhetoric. And the media’s tolerance for Republican dishonesty makes their disinformation all the more effective.
**[Support fact-based reporting today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100289307/522269684/-593472309?refcode=20250112-EM-MarkJacobHighlight&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTc5ODJjMzktMDRkMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=feMu8OMiootre-dtwRaIv7hHfjHpYc2jERn4MRyTyGU=)**
MSNBC said Trump "wouldn't admit he made a mistake in his initial post." But that was the wrong takeaway. It wasn’t a “mistake.” Instead of responsibly waiting for verified information, Trump spread disinformation to further his hate campaign against immigrants. Major media know this. Will they ever stop pretending that Trump makes honest mistakes when, in fact, his chief operating principle is to lie all the time?
Politico’s response to Trump’s lies was to cast him as a crime fighter, with a headline reading, “Trump talks tough on crime after attack.”
Fear-mongering is dangerous. People who are afraid make poor decisions. They surrender their rights in exchange for the promise of protection. History offers many examples of this, including one 92 years ago called the Reichstag Fire.
Yes, I’m talking about Germany in the time of the Nazis. And I know, Nazi comparisons seem unfair to some people. In deference to that, I promise to stop comparing MAGA to Nazis as soon as MAGA stops acting like Nazis. Right now, the echoes are loud. A radical leader has attempted a coup, received ridiculously lenient treatment, and come back to claim power. A rising fascist movement promotes violence, tells big lies, bans books, intimidates the media, and demonizes vulnerable minority groups with absurd smears. But so far in America, there has not been a Reichstag Fire.
In February 1933, a month after Adolf Hitler was named chancellor, arson struck the Reichstag, Germany’s parliament. To this day, it’s unclear who set the fire. A lone-wolf Dutch construction worker arrested near the scene? The Nazis? In any case, the Nazis exploited the incident by lying that the fire was part of a communist attack on the government. That led to the Reichstag Fire Decree, which suspended the right to assembly and freedom of speech as well as other constitutional protections. Dictatorship followed.
We’re about to see a blatantly dishonest Republican Party assume sweeping power through an election just four years after it tried to retain power through violence and law-breaking. Trump has selected election-denying toadies such as Pam Bondi and Kash Patel to take charge of law enforcement. If there is another terrorist attack, can we count on Republicans to accurately identify the perpetrators? Can we be sure Republicans won’t seize upon a Reichstag Fire to gain public acceptance of authoritarian measures? No, we cannot.
In fact, Republicans invent enemies all the time. When Trump and Vice President-elect JD Vance falsely accused Haitian immigrants of eating the dogs and cats of Springfield, Ohio, it wasn’t just a silly distraction from real issues. It was a dramatic fabrication designed to make gullible white people think dark-skinned foreigners were out to ruin their version of America. The right wing has built an entire fear industry around immigration, including the great replacement theory, the racist idea that leftists are bringing in immigrants, especially those of color, in a scheme to “replace” the culture of white people.
Of course, neither the Nazis nor Trump invented hype and abuse of power. American history is full of official falsehoods to justify government overreach. The George W. Bush administration’s hoax about Iraqi weapons of mass destruction served as a pretext for a war that killed hundreds of thousands of people. And a century earlier, the supposed mining of the U.S. battleship Maine in Havana Harbor pushed the country toward the Spanish-American War. Many historians now believe the explosion was caused by a design flaw that caused a fire in the ship’s coal bunker, not by a Spanish mine. But the mine theory was convenient to American conquest.
If a new Reichstag Fire happens, or a new battleship Maine explosion, journalism will be vital. There will be a temptation to accept the official version, as so many journalists did in the run-up to the Iraq war.
A national crisis, real or imagined, will not be the time to accept Republicans’ version of reality. It will be time for the media and the American people to ask questions and demand answers – to be ruled by documented facts, not panic and paranoia.

name: Troy Downing
subject: My Hail Mary Moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I'm down to my last play

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
That’s it... I’m throwing my final Hail Mary pass.

Peter, it’s not looking good. **My first deadline of 2025 is coming up, and I’m down to my last play.**
---
I was counting on grassroots Patriots like you to help run defense, but I guess I’m out of luck.

I’ve sent texts, sent emails, made phone calls... and I’ve heard nothing. It’s been **RADIO SILENCE.**

**THIS. WON’T. DO.**
---
[ **CHIP IN TODAY**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
_I’m**NOT** a quitter_ \- I will keep fighting, even when my back is against the wall.

It's Troy Downing. I’m just a guy from Montana taking a huge leap of faith.

Peter, I'm also a U.S. Air Force combat veteran. A God-fearing Christian, a husband, and a proud dad.

**I've now taken my seat in Congress, and I couldn’t be more honored to serve you!**

But, I still need to make one thing clear to my new colleagues: the American people are demanding real change. To do that, I need your help to start my first term in Congress strong.

I’m asking you, person to person, please **CHIP IN TODAY**. **[Whether it’s $5 or $100, EVERYTHING HELPS.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._uHxRjpqjQ)**
---
[ **CHIP IN TODAY**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[**You’re on deck, Peter. Will you help me start the year strong?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._nLzLuc3YtLW3baqhMQ)

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,

Congressman Troy Downing

---

body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/5?t=1&akid=31%2E181023%2EsslZ47)
We mean it when we say Jocelyn Benson is tireless.
She’s made democracy more than her job -- it’s her life’s work. She has fought for free and fair elections and transparent government no matter what democracy’s opponents have thrown at her. She’s criss-crossing Michigan to hear people’s priorities directly and in-person.
**_On top of all that, she’s even running her 34th marathon right now._**
Secretary Benson puts all that energy into her tireless defense of democracy, and it’s all possible with the support of this team at her back. That’s why we’re asking:
**[Can you chip in any amount right now so we can show Jocelyn a surge of donations once she crosses the finish line?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250112-1?refcode=em20250112-1&refcode2=31_181023_sslZ47&akid=31%2E181023%2EsslZ47)**

Thank you!
-- Team Benson

* * *
Before you go... we need your help. Since her 2018 election, Secretary Benson has fought for free and fair elections. She’s on the front lines of defending and strengthening our democracy. **[Will you contribute today to show your support?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250112-1?refcode=em20250112-1&refcode2=31_181023_sslZ47&akid=31%2E181023%2EsslZ47)** **[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250112-1?refcode=em20250112-1&refcode2=31_181023_sslZ47&akid=31%2E181023%2EsslZ47)**

---|---|---
Must-see MAGA moments from past and present.
* * *
Donald Trump **[stops his speech when he sees a woman](https://substack.com/redirect/cfe0a9dc-532b-4d5b-9b3b-f7a197543621?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in the crowd who he recognizes.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/cfe0a9dc-532b-4d5b-9b3b-f7a197543621?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The woman was former Miss Wisconsin winner Melissa Young who at the time of this rally in 2016, was suffering from a terminal illness. She had **[a very important message for Trump.](https://substack.com/redirect/cfe0a9dc-532b-4d5b-9b3b-f7a197543621?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"I just want to say thank you, you saved me!" she told Trump. "I've been struggling with an incurable illness,.. it was caused by a doctor's medical negligence."
"I have a do not resuscitate order, and I have a 7-year-old son," she continued. "In the hospital, I received from you a hand written letter that said 'To the brafest woman I know...'"
Trump was shocked, "Wow... I remember that,... Are you coming along okay?"
Watch what happens next in this unexpected Trump rally moment.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/cfe0a9dc-532b-4d5b-9b3b-f7a197543621?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# _**Resurfaced:**_**Journalist AMBUSHES Tucker Carlson fishing in NYC, he wasn't ready for this...**
An journalist **[confronted Tucker Carlson](https://substack.com/redirect/ef3ba1db-da82-4f34-9ce6-807e26d5f8f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while he was fishing alone at a pond in Central Park in New York City.
"What is that?! Are you videotaping me?" Tucker asks the man as he walks towards him.
"It's called a video camera, I'm allowed to film here..." the man responded.
**[Watch what happens next:](https://substack.com/redirect/ef3ba1db-da82-4f34-9ce6-807e26d5f8f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100290279/522273265/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODk4YThiOS0wNmQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cfJP0rcwBVTjWR2M0vkPpbUwyXDiltQLm9k2fx7-b0s=)

| Peter,

**I’m not a career politician. I’m a dairy farmer.**

I know what it’s like to get up for work at 3:30 am, trudge through feet of snow to feed my herd, and make difficult decisions to keep my farm afloat while providing for my family and employees. That’s exactly why I decided to run for Elise Stefanik’s seat and why I’m asking for your support today.

[_**This is the closest House majority ever, so this race presents a real opportunity—and the work we do in the early days of the campaign will play a vital role in our success. We need your support to elect Blake, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can here. = | Peter, I’m not a career politician. I’m a dairy farmer. name: Save PBS via Our Revolution
subject: Petition: Save NPR and PBS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Trump and Musk have a new target: beloved public media stations NPR and
PBS.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20911?t=1011&akid=7510%2E5885482%2Eb_nMg2 ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20911?source=email-20250112&t=1012&akid=7510%2E5885482%2Eb_nMg2 ]After facing one Republican assault after the next in recent years, NPR
and PBS are already hanging on by a thread. And now Trump and Musk want to
completely gut the most trusted, unbiased source for news out there. Will
you urgently add your name to save PBS and NPR?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20911?source=email-20250112&t=1013&akid=7510%2E5885482%2Eb_nMg2 ]ADD YOUR NAME

Musk has floated lots of ideas to cut spending – eliminating entire
government departments and firing thousands. But one of the most concrete
things on his list is slashing HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS of dollars in annual
funding for PBS and NPR.

It’s not a new threat. Republicans have been waging a war on public
broadcasting for years, trying to do away with free, fact-based
independent journalism that is required by law to be objective and free
from corporate or political agendas.

When Trump tried to slash public media funding during his first term,
millions mobilized to stop him. Trump lost that fight, but this time could
be different as Republicans line up behind him and Musk pushes harder than
ever for major cuts.

We’re going to be ready.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20911?source=email-20250112&t=1014&akid=7510%2E5885482%2Eb_nMg2 ]Together, we can fight back to save NPR and PBS – and win. But it will
only work if we mobilize in MASSIVE numbers, then relentlessly lobby
Congress to keep public media alive. That work starts NOW – will you add
your name to send a message straight to Congress?

In this polarized environment, free and independent media is more vital
than ever. And that’s exactly why Trump and his oligarch buddies have
settled on PBS and NPR as targets – without this vital public service,
they’ll be free to spread all the disinformation they desire.

Together, we can save one of our most important tools left to expose their
lies.

When we organize, we win.

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis, Trump and Musk have a new target: beloved public media stations NPR and PBS. [ ][IMG] [ ]After facing one Republican assault after the next in recent years, NPR and PBS are already hanging on by a thread. And now Trump and Musk want to completely gut the most trusted, unbiased source for news out there. Will you urgently add your name to save PBS and NPR? [ ]ADD YOUR NAME Musk has floated lots of ideas to cut spending – eliminating entire government departments and firing thousands. But one of the most concrete things on his list is slashing HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS of dollars in annual funding for PBS and NPR. It’s not a new threat. Republicans have been waging a war on public broadcasting for years, trying to do away with free, fact-based independent journalism that is required by law to be objective and free from corporate or political agendas. When Trump tried to slash public media funding during his first term, millions mobilized to stop him. Trump lost that fight, but this time could be different as Republicans line up behind him and Musk pushes harder than ever for major cuts. We’re going to be ready. [ ]Together, we can fight back to save NPR and PBS – and win. But it will only work if we mobilize in MASSIVE numbers, then relentlessly lobby Congress to keep public media alive. That work starts NOW – will you add your name to send a message straight to Congress? In this polarized environment, free and independent media is more vital than ever. Friend, Elon and Vivek are starting a Department of Government Efficiency podcast!

What better way to help hold the government accountable than to bring the public along to see all of the wasteful spending, unnecessary regulations and fraud that goes on.

Well, that’s what Elon and Vivek’s new podcast is all about. Call it DOGEcast if you will.
Friend, pinch me, I’m dreaming. Elon + Vivek are teaming up for a ONCE-IN-A-LIFETIME project and you’ve got a chance to be part of history.

name: David Horowitz
subject: Who is the enemy within?
body:
I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=202e3e80eec344c3a94067d84fe67bf1&_e=js-KUvh1B4tNClCqiu0ZwxJh6wJ19ZR_Bjxo7g1wLwo1HgVlHPC70buc4QK78NLZZlKyzU4GSo7lA-l2gcWqXY0bqppKAlnZuOqBSmm7QJtfBr9s3mouuXi-Yzuj6UPObM6S3RODMqRH27lOiMaLi7zHAVIk9abAb7Ws5Hf0HGT76taegHjMCnE0211pQYG8bkXBS1xBxJ5GebcZi6wkUD0ASYXCsa22IAul6XtL-c66oWZ-C9n-4ACOiFE8F3V6n5NODF52zVPbXJQ2nAZefkfCHQnN6sYrT8dygkxrh5cuSt8kysGi7qHJ2SB51gykLsNYwaMN2YNgz_mxgsag9EDjTracudQNeb75VkViKvxJ3gmgYxo-h-NzMioVdK36gqT7oQjN25BE9dhCdZufrQ%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=202e3e80eec344c3a94067d84fe67bf1&_e=js-KUvh1B4tNClCqiu0ZwxJh6wJ19ZR_Bjxo7g1wLwo1HgVlHPC70buc4QK78NLZZlKyzU4GSo7lA-l2gcWqXY0bqppKAlnZuOqBSmm7QJtfBr9s3mouuXi-Yzuj6UPObM6S3RODMqRH27lOiMaLi7zHAVIk9abAb7Ws5Hf0HGT76taegHjMCnE0211pQYG8bkXBS1xBxJ5GebcZi6wkUD0ASYXCsa22IAul6XtL-c66oWZ-C9n-4ACOiFE8F3V6ef6fpacKBqvWzUTulmw8VOyST4XZxK-bzh5brl6tIbV7dMX5cESVtFf9hbjQC1F6Ze59tYUpWXDURvtYthWrEz9GXtzD-2a1wRWg3njac56Ez9Y8HGl1X5ZDrhIhWgJG6YUQsT0B0mfH1CLIxKz2qw%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=202e3e80eec344c3a94067d84fe67bf1&_e=js-KUvh1B4tNClCqiu0ZwxJh6wJ19ZR_Bjxo7g1wLwo1HgVlHPC70buc4QK78NLZZlKyzU4GSo7lA-l2gcWqXY0bqppKAlnZuOqBSmm7QJtfBr9s3mouuXi-Yzuj6UPObM6S3RODMqRH27lOiMaLi7zHAVIk9abAb7Ws5Hf0HGT76taegHjMCnE0211pQYG8bkXBS1xBxJ5GebcZi6wkUD0ASYXCsa22IAul6XtL-c66oWZ-C9n-4ACOiFE8F3V6Qp3O0PMft9IuiR9x1P6f29zu5yJLzqRxEHjXn8mv31MiAcNC7LpLchksL93BI46jFyJjKnd7OqaZ270jHC2k7WZmB5Df_we_zjOdcpp2l-Y-juj4KpVSpA1gdShct375ClYGHqYmKIY9PpYavJRALw%3D%3D)**
---
| | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=202e3e80eec344c3a94067d84fe67bf1&_e=js-KUvh1B4tNClCqiu0ZwxJh6wJ19ZR_Bjxo7g1wLwo1HgVlHPC70buc4QK78NLZZlKyzU4GSo7lA-l2gcWqXY0bqppKAlnZuOqBSmm7QJtfBr9s3mouuXi-Yzuj6UPObM6S3RODMqRH27lOiMaLi7zHAVIk9abAb7Ws5Hf0HGT76taegHjMCnE0211pQYG8bkXBS1xBxJ5GebcZi6wkUD0ASYXCsa22IAul6XtL-c66oWZ-C9n-4ACOiFE8F3V67LN2AozFfWotNhBt1ExO7IJeh8LZzjqlcF891KOqvX4BBdBO8YgtYPqFrVHHP67Znyqi-FOvKg2iiwFw9EN0hUzToAARLB0-4SuAgcGjVirwkBtuNQtMrS7mcz_xW5UEqRxBWq4TEHQQZnGAiwRH9A%3D%3D)
---

But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. A gunshot is an impulse high decibel noise, which can be harmful to the human ear, so much so that even a single shot can cause permanent damage without the right [hearing protection.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19744/6374453/6ae298ebdae06dd9f19e1791808f66fa8e7641b7/f6ece0f4b5aa4389c6327c23d159f0e22513bdbf) **Depending on the caliber of the firearm, every gunshot registers above the safe hearing DB levels, at which hearing damage can occur quickly.** EarArmor.com's Earmuffs Rated with a Noise Reduction Rating (NRR) of 21, EarArmor offers best-in-class hearing protection from noise levels across all firearm calibers.

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: We’re here to help the American people, not pursue distracting proposals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
In the last week, we’ve heard a lot from Donald Trump.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100291506/522277525/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzAwMWNlOS0wYWQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9mDD9GjDiqhJvhlaP-9muf0HIoenuWLg-GColWef95c=&emci=bfca66c6-a2cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=f7001ce9-0ad1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=7731215)
---

| | In the last week, we've heard Donald Trump concoct distracting proposals like renaming the Gulf of Mexico and using military force to take over Canada, Greenland, and the Panama Canal to distract from the harmful agenda he and his MAGA cronies want to implement. Right now, people want their elected officials to make their lives better. Folks are struggling to afford rent, feed their families, and pay for health care. **Donald Trump's latest proposals do nothing to alleviate the stress everyday Americans are feeling.** I was elected to the Senate to get things done for Oregonians. No matter who is in office, I'm always focused on finding real solutions that put people first. Lowering costs, investing in local communities, and pushing for climate action that protects our planet and our health are issues I'm in D.C. working on every day with you in mind. We know Trump's playbook from his first term: He plans to distract, deflect, and divert instead of actually governing and getting things done. He wants people to think our government is broken and ineffective when he is the one breaking it by trying to rig the government against the people. We must stand strong against the MAGA agenda, and if we stay focused throughout the next four years, we can continue to deliver solutions. That's what I, along with my Democratic Senate colleagues, plan on doing. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

name: Greisa, United We Dream
subject: Thank you 🧡
body:
We spread immigrant joy in many ways. | | | Peter, In 2024, our immigrant youth-led network mobilized and practiced community care — investing in our self-care as much as we did in activism. With your support, we made great strides in our pro-immigrant movement. Just take a look at the numbers: 🧡 **252 DACA recipients** helped through the DACA Renewal Fund 🧡 **3,000+ sign ups** for UndocuHealth, Know Your Rights, and DACA Renewal Info webinars 🧡 **500+ people** signed up to receive regular mental health reminders 🧡 **1 million members** across the country ready to take action for the rights of immigrants [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeARiJWbKmi25YG4wXHXa28Has1hIQ-QfnGL0HacQRXaLQBjanTyJ641yFmOor6SnqY7o4AtSmdmbBYXS44HRHJ66A-aKnRco1Diq0ydR4EThdWgjZ6bnoOrHS8MGvBp3YE2rezVbbiSSPxHRg57qHR7aVZnzbYRXhgVXpeQVIgM77ZoFZ-LsAyG5G60i1w2gsDGD0OIbtX4ZC2rloMBek7uMzbt0mX9U3vpjChGI__7MM7qIGlxIBbvPgtBRdzgvPtVGmlx1BlpA5MEZd8CVYEcenBKsHF_nJBuUbQpgT49TmjJOLhgAcy8qEcH_jvrsw/4d3/H_S0K8PzTo2mBghO5m97_g/h0/h001.C3skuEs2RAte1D63blX7ty2XsmyZ7hyJ_OpSznWgCzw)
During a year filled with so much uncertainty for our community, we still found ways to spread immigrant joy. We worked on the second season of our award-winning cook-off web show, **“No Borders, Just Flavors!”** featuring young people with an immigrant identity from all over the country competing with their family recipes. _(Stay tuned for the season premiere!)_ [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeARiJWbKmi25YG4wXHXa28Has1hIQ-QfnGL0HacQRXaLQBjanTyJ641yFmOor6SnqY7o4AtSmdmbBYXS44HRHJ4vXrBr3-i4auHmOK4Z71I-M69xBpQc9viyjidDy0TXHsLWdpUkNn38csGHDI9JAb-3-KM4KjtfLosha8mW36VE1yfifzRqosgI2QPKx8_VYmXXmlwz29TGpSq1Cp2421TvKTjWsbwb3S3QEeVLHDCq1R8rwxRYaw3c2Ye-LC7CiEuYhy8hZQmQo5Dsspyz4cts2gjSLTgPOUxN1NIFMPgt3p1mMVaBmdzxBlqEuex9n/4d3/H_S0K8PzTo2mBghO5m97_g/h1/h001.ZO7XwCAZ4Dp-4hrVRAucO66_E30l-30nLOJQ6zQ-_vI)

clean_body: We spread immigrant joy in many ways. | | | Peter, In 2024, our immigrant youth-led network mobilized and practiced community care — investing in our self-care as much as we did in activism. With your support, we made great strides in our pro-immigrant movement. Just take a look at the numbers: 🧡 252 DACA recipients helped through the DACA Renewal Fund 🧡 3,000+ sign ups for UndocuHealth, Know Your Rights, and DACA Renewal Info webinars 🧡 500+ people signed up to receive regular mental health reminders 🧡 1 million members across the country ready to take action for the rights of immigrants During a year filled with so much uncertainty for our community, we still found ways to spread immigrant joy. We worked on the second season of our award-winning cook-off web show, “No Borders, Just Flavors!” featuring young people with an immigrant identity from all over the country competing with their family recipes. (Stay tuned for the season premiere!) As we face attack after attack on our community, immigrant joy, humor, and connection are often overlooked. So, we’re heading into 2025 with our heads up. 🧡 We are strong, resilient, and more ready than ever to continue fighting for immigrant rights. Thank you for fighting with us, Greisa at United We Dream | | We gathered together to protect one another all last year, and we will continue to do so in 2025. You can fuel our fight for justice and dignity for all immigrants by donating any amount today: | | Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Protecting our progress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This is an important step in the right direction.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250112-1&t=1&akid=1628%2E587540%2E0s-H1O)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250112-1?refcode=em20250112-1628&amount=5&refcode2=1628_587540_0s-H1O&akid=1628%2E587540%2E0s-H1O)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250112-1?refcode=em20250112-1628&amount=5&refcode2=1628_587540_0s-H1O&akid=1628%2E587540%2E0s-H1O)
Peter, it’s kind of unusual to see headlines like this, right? But facts are facts:
* We saw a **significant decline in gun-related violence** in 2024, with rates of mass shootings and gun deaths reaching their lowest point in five years.
* The **murder rate fell** at the fastest rate ever recorded in history last year.
* **Experts give credit to the 2022 bipartisan gun safety bill** that poured $750 million into essential programs to address gun violence in our communities.

**This is an important step in the right direction.** Still, we have to be honest about what we’re up against in protecting our progress. Because the United States has more guns per capita than any other country on Earth and regulation is difficult.
We’re also heading into a GOP trifecta in the federal government. And we all know the Republicans will side with the gun lobby over the lives of innocent people, just like they have time and time again. So the gun reforms that are leading to lower rates of gun violence could very well be rolled back over the next couple of years.
**Protecting our progress and saving lives is incredibly essential, Peter.**
That’s why Leaders We Deserve is laser-focused on electing the next generation of bold progressives to state legislatures and Congress, inspiring young leaders who will fight the gun lobby and prioritize keeping our communities safe from gun violence.
**[Together, we can keep up the fight for a future free from gun violence. Can you make a $5 contribution right now and join us in this important mission?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250112-1?refcode=em20250112-1628&amount=5&refcode2=1628_587540_0s-H1O&akid=1628%2E587540%2E0s-H1O)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250112-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250112-1628&refcode2=1628_587540_0s-H1O&akid=1628%2E587540%2E0s-H1O)**
Thank you,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250112-1&t=2&refcode2=1628_587540_0s-H1O&akid=1628%2E587540%2E0s-H1O)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1628%2E587540%2E0s-H1O)

name: Jay Jones
subject: The last two months
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025]
Folks,
Two months ago today, I officially launched my campaign to become Virginia’s next attorney general.
But my decision to run was a lifetime in the making, folks.
I come from a long line of Virginians committed to making the state a better place for all its residents. My grandfather dedicated his life to advancing civil rights as the first Black member of the Virginia Board of Education. My father served in the House of Delegates working to improve life for all Virginians, not just those with wealth and power.
It was an honor to later fill the same seat in the House of Delegates that my father held. I am proud of the work I did to raise Virginia’s minimum wage, improve pay for our hardworking educators, and keep health care costs affordable.
And I’ll keep up that work as attorney general. But if I’m going to defeat Virginia’s far-right attorney general, Jason Miyares, I’m going to need your help.
Will you chip in $10 or more today so my team and I can keep our voter outreach efforts going strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=10]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=10]

Jay

subject: HUMILIATING defeat

body:

Peter,

I only reach out when it’s important, so hear me when I say: this is as important as it gets:

My friend Raja Krishnamoorthi is just 12 hours away from his midnight deadline -- and as of 12pm, he still needs 600 gifts to reach his goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

That’s why I’m rallying Democrats from coast to coast today to help Raja reach his critical goal, close this fundraising gap, and hand Republicans a HUMILIATING defeat. Can I count on you before midnight? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Peter, let me explain:

Raja is working night and day to:

-- Defend healthcare access from Republican attacks
-- Protect our communities from gun violence
-- Grow our economy and create good-paying jobs from coast to coast
-- And so much more

Meanwhile, MAGA Republicans are busy defending insurrectionists, calling for a MASSIVE tax increase on the middle class, and pushing baseless investigations against our Democrats.

Simply put, it’s never been more clear that Raja is exactly the kind of leader we need to keep in Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

That’s why I’m proud to stand by Raja, Peter. But he still needs 600 gifts to reach his goal. Will you stand with Raja and rush in $14 before midnight? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

clean_body: [] Peter, I only reach out when it’s important, so hear me when I say: this is as important as it gets: My friend Raja Krishnamoorthi is just 12 hours away from his midnight deadline -- and as of 12pm, he still needs 600 gifts to reach his goal. [] That’s why I’m rallying Democrats from coast to coast today to help Raja reach his critical goal, close this fundraising gap, and hand Republicans a HUMILIATING defeat. Can I count on you before midnight? >> [] Peter, let me explain: Raja is working night and day to: -- Defend healthcare access from Republican attacks -- Protect our communities from gun violence -- Grow our economy and create good-paying jobs from coast to coast -- And so much more Meanwhile, MAGA Republicans are busy defending insurrectionists, calling for a MASSIVE tax increase on the middle class, and pushing baseless investigations against our Democrats. Simply put, it’s never been more clear that Raja is exactly the kind of leader we need to keep in Congress. [] That’s why I’m proud to stand by Raja, Peter. But he still needs 600 gifts to reach his goal. Will you stand with Raja and rush in $14 before midnight? >> [] Chip in $14 immediately >> [] Chip in $19 immediately >> [] Chip in $24 immediately >> [] Chip in $50 immediately >> [] Chip in $100 immediately >> [] Or chip in another amount >> [] Thank you, TedRaja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? DONATE [] Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress Friends of Raja for Congress PO Box 681202 Schaumburg, IL 60168 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

body:
The only way to stop Trump’s agenda from flowing into the states is by electing more Democrats to pivotal battleground states this year and beyond. The fight is already underway and we need you. | | |
---
| |
---|---
There’s never been a more important time to commit to the fight for Democratic power in the states. Here’s why: **Democrats nationwide are relying on state legislatures to act as an anti-Trump firewall during his second term.** [Chip in $7 to elect state Democrats and strengthen our defenses →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquD37PtIk9GhRAB5og_YtPfr0A4dBpd_CC4Uqnpn8KTZi5GJp8K_DelyhgrqdKOjdFMIb8Xr-9SE3ymR27MvSaeWv1gxxNqvfSrhqREwQxly1nR50MK12bo96TFWKGIYvTdkTo_imaxtT6w8CAE_RuT7VmrzeQiRMPH0jv6BsnNosxcg5AZhQXSbYEMcT1zCU7mjn-GaNl55UU1E7l-MrY_NNkHzzk5ATdY602YtBRSlvI1E2uINQ3wfAu1vbAur032-HxLm8HzgzNOkQhS8FXzrovZEi4j8YrRDXcGPFWzC0hqJL2utUPGUTQA18PtBxF-r5vz_vCwr-rwACHu0F9pKwxZV44wvy2nvOVfbftejprK-OWX9EIxPISsHk9KmmCqv3wKu0LrWNuOa9DTfsxfwGkiAFtB3-RZMl4_D6uLQIyYiB8QQ4fhqdtZrtST3co/4d3/UTphlzvYTVSiLeeK2xUw_A/h0/h001.BhuP1z8xa0fAA_miXOlbgJ6YK_n6eV-F58T1HQZ4y7Y) Even with the GOP winning a federal trifecta, Democrats held their ground in the states. clean_body: The only way to stop Trump’s agenda from flowing into the states is by electing more Democrats to pivotal battleground states this year and beyond. The fight is already underway and we need you. | | | | | ---|--- There’s never been a more important time to commit to the fight for Democratic power in the states. Here’s why: Democrats nationwide are relying on state legislatures to act as an anti-Trump firewall during his second term. Even with the GOP winning a federal trifecta, Democrats held their ground in the states. Right now, Democrats control 39 legislative majorities. Our party has our own trifectas in 15 states thanks to our work electing state Democrats. The only way to stop Trump’s agenda from taking over in the states is by electing more Democrats to statehouses nationwide this year and beyond. The fight is already underway, but to continue making progress, we need you on our side. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | State Democrats are fighting to make real progress for our communities, fighting to lower grocery prices, combat the housing crisis, and reduce medical expenses – but they can't continue that work without all of us coming together to support them. name: Bethany Hamilton
subject: God had my back
body:
I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again. | | | But the biggest reason I kept surfing was my belief that God had my back.
---
| | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2dd0856e4efb417fbdcbf76cdf783879&_e=7hb3gji8J97gvlnw7fw1w1ENflc-8yKd57KNyMq9wFCX331hNsYhT8yojo8jTMNUrc51QsZuDJjiFqHTFMNQFUuJF7YNfzbMqVytsDSUU9JFrZiz6hcFiiGyPFPcO983ihpsld2_ZxX74jg5dqyBbv2d3yNNB9WluZqq9lAZcfSltWyQM1IfxhJ3Fmbdh_er1yhAR5wYFQUojlLGTcUvFKFEr3RJPdFB7PHowlpgc-qMe3S0X_kCNMjJ-1bObRuWm9hE3QsnFDhw-gUo8PNysV1J9is79RAQZ5SZFsIdvMeFQNgsJP_wWUXnI7qia4rtFp1CY-H6yEiM06WS0zhPvbFglDJekvWKkny5MINm8lXjxNXTlBKXDEYSs6wRAmAqENQQYOyci7ZkSRUjiJs4Ug%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend, I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again.But just 4 weeks later I was back in the water.
---
| | Dear Friend,I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again. But just 4 weeks later I was back in the water.
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2dd0856e4efb417fbdcbf76cdf783879&_e=7hb3gji8J97gvlnw7fw1w1ENflc-8yKd57KNyMq9wFCX331hNsYhT8yojo8jTMNUrc51QsZuDJjiFqHTFMNQFUuJF7YNfzbMqVytsDSUU9JFrZiz6hcFiiGyPFPcO983ihpsld2_ZxX74jg5dqyBbv2d3yNNB9WluZqq9lAZcfSltWyQM1IfxhJ3Fmbdh_er1yhAR5wYFQUojlLGTcUvFKFEr3RJPdFB7PHowlpgc-qMe3S0X_kCNMjJ-1bObRuWNIyzqaI032Uic7LOZcU4JVOL75c1GTybiLAHcnxx1CwmodY7SdQ4DlKzgUgoPJpFh0YS-D4ze3_uegzIYyQtmLk3qWwJ6URYCH4LCe4-bvQpenPr__L1QLVVm9EMtoVz_UCk4e8Dona7hQCOiEOMNA%3D%3D)
---
| | It was partly due to my parents’ unconditional support and my love of the ocean. But the biggest reason I kept surfing was my belief that God had my back. And I want more children to hear that message because too many of them are being trained up in fear, _not_ _faith_. That's why I wrote a children's book called "Surfing Past Fear" with an amazing Christian publisher called **Brave Books**. [**_I hope you'll consider giving a gift of $100 or any amount you can afford to support Brave Books_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2dd0856e4efb417fbdcbf76cdf783879&_e=7hb3gji8J97gvlnw7fw1w1ENflc-8yKd57KNyMq9wFCX331hNsYhT8yojo8jTMNUrc51QsZuDJjiFqHTFMNQFUuJF7YNfzbMqVytsDSUU9JFrZiz6hcFiiGyPFPcO983ihpsld2_ZxX74jg5dqyBbv2d3yNNB9WluZqq9lAZcfSltWyQM1IfxhJ3Fmbdh_er1yhAR5wYFQUojlLGTcUvFKFEr3RJPdFB7PHowlpgc-qMe3S0X_kCNMjJ-1bObRuWtGysVE8X8cLv2_xNexyQuGUc1oBCpSopKUpxdTPSrw38PvI3HV5KXRENyVlWHbTaz6b9BydqXMKy4yHtFniV1vPHVw2O0Z7P1I4ZTwqoTuOcxT61rYqNrHdkBgJd3bL4Ot4WhwHVVv_5zk7RrknzxA%3D%3D) as they help parents raise strong, resilient, God-loving children. In courage,
---
| | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2dd0856e4efb417fbdcbf76cdf783879&_e=7hb3gji8J97gvlnw7fw1w1ENflc-8yKd57KNyMq9wFCX331hNsYhT8yojo8jTMNUrc51QsZuDJjiFqHTFMNQFUuJF7YNfzbMqVytsDSUU9JFrZiz6hcFiiGyPFPcO983ihpsld2_ZxX74jg5dqyBbv2d3yNNB9WluZqq9lAZcfSltWyQM1IfxhJ3Fmbdh_er1yhAR5wYFQUojlLGTcUvFKFEr3RJPdFB7PHowlpgc-qMe3S0X_kCNMjJ-1bObRuWo8VDg7iwxOJlinGuG_3sWXC8r4RSanJpeJGNUizEP8UUeV8ZXKGlXcHw31g4ncnZQrObkG51nHA0cguXHRffR32UMfn26h0Oo_f91dLxBJUMhJ0t_RJIfzMY3Rz9ijkAFXxwQLfJ-QEZJcWDLzVEpQ%3D%3D)
---
**Bethany Hamilton** Professional Surfer and Mother
---
|
---
| | P.S. I've set aside a small number of copies of "Surfing Past Fear" just for the friends of **Brave Books**. **[When you support their work today with your gift of $100 or more, it'll be my honor to send you one.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2dd0856e4efb417fbdcbf76cdf783879&_e=7hb3gji8J97gvlnw7fw1w1ENflc-8yKd57KNyMq9wFCX331hNsYhT8yojo8jTMNUrc51QsZuDJjiFqHTFMNQFUuJF7YNfzbMqVytsDSUU9JFrZiz6hcFiiGyPFPcO983ihpsld2_ZxX74jg5dqyBbv2d3yNNB9WluZqq9lAZcfSltWyQM1IfxhJ3Fmbdh_er1yhAR5wYFQUojlLGTcUvFKFEr3RJPdFB7PHowlpgc-qMe3S0X_kCNMjJ-1bObRuWgdJc0YlPe40UNE0adUBsWynRNsmh3siD3619W6EU5s-QyZoQFBqIJjHTkOtheySVgt5eTIAlJh6LHBAC5SV7v0yRwU8McNhJkyVCbWriHHuZAHy2ZGEI7wOEURhPfF7x8Ydvb5OwlCDwRdsTkf-qBw%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping America's children learn that God "has not given them a spirit of fear!" (2 Timothy 1:7) -- Bethany
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2dd0856e4efb417fbdcbf76cdf783879&_e=7hb3gji8J97gvlnw7fw1w1ENflc-8yKd57KNyMq9wFCX331hNsYhT8yojo8jTMNUrc51QsZuDJjiFqHTFMNQFUuJF7YNfzbMqVytsDSUU9JFrZiz6hcFiiGyPFPcO983ihpsld2_ZxX74jg5dqyBbv2d3yNNB9WluZqq9lAZcfSltWyQM1IfxhJ3Fmbdh_er1yhAR5wYFQUojlLGTcUvFKFEr3RJPdFB7PHowlpgc-qMe3S0X_kCNMjJ-1bObRuWqtMF1qbq_OujtI1vVaZ06FlZUaCE5TtxkRZgxdAvfAAyTwDMMV0OL12mbSTS4oZdan8X6lr2bFrSmgjxhOq_TOh1NvoaoVYLlFpv-t2k6crwsrvLiiquJu8LwhQhU3nQiDtjJONIOH12YAW7XEyQqQ%3D%3D)

name: JanePAC
subject: 🖊️ Tell Your Senators: Oppose Trump’s Pick for EPA Administrator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Time is running out.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100294652/522288565/1328794144?refcode=ea.3f84f7a9-16d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.3f84f7a9-16d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmODRmN2E5LTE2ZDEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=s1lAFsIx8pkJI-_I4-drjcqo3iTmzzaoLtIyo8COjBM=&emci=3284f7a9-16d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=3f84f7a9-16d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)
---
We’ll cut straight to it. Donald Trump’s pick for EPA Administrator, Lee Zeldin, is scheduled for his Senate confirmation hearing this week. Here’s a little refresher on who Zeldin is: As a former New York Representative, **Zeldin earned an _embarrassing 14% lifetime score_ from the League of Conservation Voters** — aligning himself with corporate polluters over public health time and again. His record of prioritizing deregulation over science-based policy endangers the EPA’s mission to protect public health and our environment. With Lee Zeldin at the helm, decades of climate progress could be wiped away. Critical safeguards for drinking water could vanish. Communities already facing disproportionate pollution could be left defenseless. **We need you to act now and urge your senators to vote against Zeldin’s confirmation before it’s too late. That’s why we’re co-sponsoring a letter-writing campaign to demand the Senate reject his nomination.** | **[By adding your name to this letter, you’ll join thousands of others urging the Senate to block Zeldin and defend the EPA’s mission to protect public health and our environment.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100294653/522288566/1608848763?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jane-bax-email-ja&refcode=ea.3f84f7a9-16d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.3f84f7a9-16d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmODRmN2E5LTE2ZDEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=s1lAFsIx8pkJI-_I4-drjcqo3iTmzzaoLtIyo8COjBM=&emci=3284f7a9-16d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=3f84f7a9-16d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN ON NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100294654/522288567/1608848763?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jane-bax-email-ja&refcode=ea.3f84f7a9-16d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.3f84f7a9-16d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmODRmN2E5LTE2ZDEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=s1lAFsIx8pkJI-_I4-drjcqo3iTmzzaoLtIyo8COjBM=&emci=3284f7a9-16d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=3f84f7a9-16d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)
---
In solidarity,
Team JanePAC

clean_body: Time is running out. | We’ll cut straight to it. Donald Trump’s pick for EPA Administrator, Lee Zeldin, is scheduled for his Senate confirmation hearing this week. Here’s a little refresher on who Zeldin is: As a former New York Representative, Zeldin earned an embarrassing 14% lifetime score from the League of Conservation Voters — aligning himself with corporate polluters over public health time and again. His record of prioritizing deregulation over science-based policy endangers the EPA’s mission to protect public health and our environment. With Lee Zeldin at the helm, decades of climate progress could be wiped away. Critical safeguards for drinking water could vanish. Communities already facing disproportionate pollution could be left defenseless. We need you to act now and urge your senators to vote against Zeldin’s confirmation before it’s too late. That’s why we’re co-sponsoring a letter-writing campaign to demand the Senate reject his nomination. | | In solidarity, Team JanePAC P.S. If you’ve been impacted by the fires in Southern California and need a break from our emails, Take care of what matters most, and we’ll be here when you're ready. | = | = = Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

_When disaster strikes, we need a president who can act swiftly and responsibly—not one who downplays the suffering of millions or fails to properly assess the need for relief. _ This is Gay Valimont, FL-1 candidate in the upcoming special election. We need leaders who understand the gravity of natural disasters and prioritize the safety of our people, and _**with your help we can make that happen. April 1st is just around the corner, we must act NOW before its too late!!!**_

_Donald Trump’s response to the wildfires in California was not only inadequate, but outright misleading_ —insisting that FEMA was overstepping and failing to recognize the scale of the devastation. This kind of reckless misjudgment is dangerous, especially when it comes to protecting lives and communities in the aftermath of a crisis.

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: A big win for Social Security
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAPTUR FOR CONGRESS
body:
My sponsored bill to protect Social Security was just signed into law.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100295246/522290636/1039792322?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=250112_mk_ssfa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTc0NjA3YS0xOGQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpByVSEI6sTX5JQCqWtSctsW_ZsnflVhkGGJRT2_AUA=)
---
Friend, Last week, I joined President Biden at the White House as he signed the Social Security Fairness Act into law. **This bill, which I proudly sponsored and helped pass into law, is a big win for millions of Americans who have earned and rely on Social Security benefits. Ohioans in particular are now set to collect hard-earned benefits. ** It means that folks who have dedicated their lives to public service — like police officers, mail carriers, firefighters, and teachers — will be able to get the Social Security benefits they've earned through years of hard work. I'm proud of this bill, friend, and I'm proud that we passed it with strong bipartisan support. As long as I'm in Congress, I'll never stop fighting to defend Social Security. Thanks for being with me in that fight, friend. — Marcy **[Support our work →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100295247/522290637/1039792322?refcode=250112_mk_ssfa&ms=250112_mk_ssfa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTc0NjA3YS0xOGQxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpByVSEI6sTX5JQCqWtSctsW_ZsnflVhkGGJRT2_AUA=)**

name: David Nammo, Christian Legal Society
subject: Most Christians don’t realize this…
body:
A 50-state strategy| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fc89ccb25652458b8df2ae094c2a3b5f&_e=OceljOqXUdF4ZkPmJ4MT8R5I156vYO2dGFJCy73Iy7b_ozECztnPwgaUrRe5ZGb55tyYs94yDn2C5wCyCd2HaHSsGjmrL5IZ0cJq4AIBfmwaoEHEp78Z4ItV-tmxaNWE1y56F4TWyccmTB2kVrImwVq2ojWEO2r_PL3ygzQdaTz5QkFA7HshY0HfTeE-446xnDk79b_GDqtn49dmvJkvwp297_aezr_UOu9YjSlOCSj-alBAjPGUbAYnW1bQAVlsyiFXm_pryCWA6VhgNijFlfamwgd2Li4h99ZfWQDqDpiOlLteb8z0Bf2UNVBcAc74)
---
Fellow Christian, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! **The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states.** That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of **personal prayer** without getting fired, protection of **moral conscience** so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a **Christian student club** --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! **Fellow Christian, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state.** _**[_**Against a well-organized, well-funded opposition, we're counting on the support of generous Americans of faith like you to stand with us. Would you consider a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help support Christian Legal Society in this critical work?**_](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fc89ccb25652458b8df2ae094c2a3b5f&_e=OceljOqXUdF4ZkPmJ4MT8R5I156vYO2dGFJCy73Iy7b_ozECztnPwgaUrRe5ZGb55tyYs94yDn2C5wCyCd2HaHSsGjmrL5IZ0cJq4AIBfmwaoEHEp78Z4ItV-tmxaNWE1y56F4TWyccmTB2kVrImwVq2ojWEO2r_PL3ygzQdaTwBQMm7Z3jhfeT_eC7GrT9H7Ayu7C40h-ZI8RVkQAqvKM76g_wFCUFM2nFE7zNzD20R5aELfmiR54tkTYDhN4C-SGfM1wMTLXsigKsxiOKzzjsM5oYm6BZRZMrrKM5mlPN2qsyx8d7z8SNfG-1SvDSI)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fc89ccb25652458b8df2ae094c2a3b5f&_e=OceljOqXUdF4ZkPmJ4MT8R5I156vYO2dGFJCy73Iy7b_ozECztnPwgaUrRe5ZGb55tyYs94yDn2C5wCyCd2HaHSsGjmrL5IZ0cJq4AIBfmwaoEHEp78Z4ItV-tmxaNWE1y56F4TWyccmTB2kVrImwVq2ojWEO2r_PL3ygzQdaTxAFfBSH0OuXD98Xm_6NtnlJbS6pHONfC-A7kHxx-oxVG8c-2l8Y4FIw875sEy8ZZ_EupJNJWTpYd6dTHGf7wZ13lb7IgT5l42tnn8tOfobAcpzJWNCA76ajDZBCnXVpSNXk-m0Dvujol9PTUkS3uP5)
---
For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. **But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change.** Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to:
* **discourage or punish attorneys** from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke");

* **stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches,** sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious;

* **prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries** , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and

* **put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work** **to defend religious freedom** on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values!

**Fellow Christian, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work.** Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. _**[_**Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help Christian Legal Society save these critical protections for Christian attorneys . . . and every ministry, nonprofit, or believer that those same attorneys would defend?**_](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fc89ccb25652458b8df2ae094c2a3b5f&_e=OceljOqXUdF4ZkPmJ4MT8R5I156vYO2dGFJCy73Iy7b_ozECztnPwgaUrRe5ZGb55tyYs94yDn2C5wCyCd2HaHSsGjmrL5IZ0cJq4AIBfmwaoEHEp78Z4ItV-tmxaNWE1y56F4TWyccmTB2kVrImwVq2ojWEO2r_PL3ygzQdaTw9Pp645zxpODgj6wdB7QBVeCt-YEFlsh9mmAEPgF-U8cG9fj1LsGGVEPw_OrK9jGVKcvwyZp0P3ZjIXtQ03nzwJ4IwpleImq-3Z78MH6E-FdkzRw1wJ5PnnT4zIGQveCDyEl2WRUcxG-ZPXrde0uT6)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fc89ccb25652458b8df2ae094c2a3b5f&_e=OceljOqXUdF4ZkPmJ4MT8R5I156vYO2dGFJCy73Iy7b_ozECztnPwgaUrRe5ZGb55tyYs94yDn2C5wCyCd2HaHSsGjmrL5IZ0cJq4AIBfmwaoEHEp78Z4ItV-tmxaNWE1y56F4TWyccmTB2kVrImwVq2ojWEO2r_PL3ygzQdaTyfRzibVb-huC8OoJrsLwulbtfI3KnFUdN88GsmqswnXhUeBk2tsFVP691hy9qyUjmtcGhlZ2XYcou4rnuWjQN-MsQYdko0xFjKWOF4LmFcnZq3OGsLWZaLX3f3GwaFulptryvGNMJxIYmXkgDMCnY8)
---
Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. **No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society.** _**[That's why I encourage you--and hope--that you'll make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help Christian Legal Society WIN critical victories in the battles still to come.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fc89ccb25652458b8df2ae094c2a3b5f&_e=OceljOqXUdF4ZkPmJ4MT8R5I156vYO2dGFJCy73Iy7b_ozECztnPwgaUrRe5ZGb55tyYs94yDn2C5wCyCd2HaHSsGjmrL5IZ0cJq4AIBfmwaoEHEp78Z4ItV-tmxaNWE1y56F4TWyccmTB2kVrImwVq2ojWEO2r_PL3ygzQdaTyOelicEQJLqdvAAd4vlft71SHwqxGkAEOwT6MoPr8PZT-1MZFCjJ7kVXD4wQDdocp6qi-48VVo2ZjwFBAANTGV5XgQGD3Hhf4FX5kR1ErIU6bBuEjAnTnavsqneFxW_-TLJmdFrse8jZ8KNQJ6XrBd)**_ Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. David Nammo
Executive Director & CEO
Christian Legal Society
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fc89ccb25652458b8df2ae094c2a3b5f&_e=OceljOqXUdF4ZkPmJ4MT8R5I156vYO2dGFJCy73Iy7b_ozECztnPwgaUrRe5ZGb55tyYs94yDn2C5wCyCd2HaHSsGjmrL5IZ0cJq4AIBfmwaoEHEp78Z4ItV-tmxaNWE1y56F4TWyccmTB2kVrImwVq2ojWEO2r_PL3ygzQdaTwayRBOPgGmTQOi4kdueVmaLjuK4RvbiKI8rXRmHSG3EZkRuWDWtH6PpQgWuOD63nE3jDJXgONaMelSVaCFPDWW-1aPXBjI4pKRxroUJYrMgT7Bf7kvPzq-3VfR3ZwJjthuBUU03YspmJNWQlBNBGtp)

For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change. Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to: discourage or punish attorneys from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke"); stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches, sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious; prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work to defend religious freedom on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values! Fellow Christian, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work. Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society. Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. David Nammo Executive Director & CEO Christian Legal Society Christian Legal Society P.O. Box 7712 McLean, VA 22106-7712

name: David Horowitz
subject: America is on the brink of destruction
body:
I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=dcd7866f4f50459da91ffdc626d2a947&_e=p_LIJYsrUTwcrVQjgwjOYpNbED3U_3dcm5u-CUoU_LqN6k2NorQM8CwPwOXJD_2AVR7jTd_NqtgBUjfu2uqwkN4qCIhm0AZ4ymIcw44Pc7poxSHmHpuTmGZOvvOjKokiTF7TY2kvG8u3ZPY4T0O-pXNzFK1ztVn_dNqFm4ZkaUTEqQzQNTckomhJ5TCm1ZbLVeELqJsxYWcP-BFF55EQdfu298YUX78_SG7YOXmzSqM2B6cZ3inyn4mo-2BBggWb5ABurvBU0fVdxfd-gmpwUQ4fVm8zaEpLdwfq8CMSM21VyZHW_IeFGVNNXrOXNVNRYFZdnb1tOq5qNN5pmD71-0bu143rgBCwoI_xjx-mwvja5qx5iMuJmgfyQ0AlU5gqzVKgoMacN_Ds6TmwXsd0K8rA9SBKsAarov4MhXaCXOI%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=dcd7866f4f50459da91ffdc626d2a947&_e=p_LIJYsrUTwcrVQjgwjOYpNbED3U_3dcm5u-CUoU_LqN6k2NorQM8CwPwOXJD_2AVR7jTd_NqtgBUjfu2uqwkN4qCIhm0AZ4ymIcw44Pc7poxSHmHpuTmGZOvvOjKokiTF7TY2kvG8u3ZPY4T0O-pXNzFK1ztVn_dNqFm4ZkaUTEqQzQNTckomhJ5TCm1ZbLVeELqJsxYWcP-BFF55EQdfu298YUX78_SG7YOXmzSqM2B6cZ3inyn4mo-2BBggWb5nziQDrDEzhmSy9-5ai9EoCCMO_G48XyFZdwHyf7-g68sZtFc50B99DPIxnBt-LNOn0FACL7UDvxy4mirArivWGKMIVDhn5UK_sg2x9HRJCcLxb5adWm5PWnynGHvFr_BAD55Rf4LWcVBBoxOx1saIkTE2c1sc-jDGIO84Dvxxc%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=dcd7866f4f50459da91ffdc626d2a947&_e=p_LIJYsrUTwcrVQjgwjOYpNbED3U_3dcm5u-CUoU_LqN6k2NorQM8CwPwOXJD_2AVR7jTd_NqtgBUjfu2uqwkN4qCIhm0AZ4ymIcw44Pc7poxSHmHpuTmGZOvvOjKokiTF7TY2kvG8u3ZPY4T0O-pXNzFK1ztVn_dNqFm4ZkaUTEqQzQNTckomhJ5TCm1ZbLVeELqJsxYWcP-BFF55EQdfu298YUX78_SG7YOXmzSqM2B6cZ3inyn4mo-2BBggWbgpFb6GP7itZ-m6wDqREiawpQGflJTODE2QhczqrIaMj5ZOOiICaotuLGUwsonIl3LyfDnXa0vMKE24Ep74c7o-LOj0HGJzTVvcneLMxlaiCULHMrrM-Z7C_Lf9l5pAGmpm5THuOJEUs3Z9CtCAphXuTLzaBPnDcWNN6Hsg-7eAA%3D)**
---
| | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=dcd7866f4f50459da91ffdc626d2a947&_e=p_LIJYsrUTwcrVQjgwjOYpNbED3U_3dcm5u-CUoU_LqN6k2NorQM8CwPwOXJD_2AVR7jTd_NqtgBUjfu2uqwkN4qCIhm0AZ4ymIcw44Pc7poxSHmHpuTmGZOvvOjKokiTF7TY2kvG8u3ZPY4T0O-pXNzFK1ztVn_dNqFm4ZkaUTEqQzQNTckomhJ5TCm1ZbLVeELqJsxYWcP-BFF55EQdfu298YUX78_SG7YOXmzSqM2B6cZ3inyn4mo-2BBggWbzpM1mmRXsTRBVUgDdFek06jcyULcPxOPcBhzUJdfzi2qtWOjpIK1HH97uNr_JPJEqM9oY2Yx0JJeYqykBi1ESN_06XZY8iRH0akHqTobmQP1FGwm6WFUa3BIRLr7VfEd8OqcNpAfRIvXeBfhT6P-Acc8AeMaumNZXyjYh4Ss6QY%3D)
---
