subject: From New York to Los Angeles
body:
Two ongoing sagas on opposite coasts reveal the death of democracy in America well before Trump returns to office

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..uUU8REjoq62uQsuh-_McjIzmSetsdLcbVBJPME1-mgc?) for more
---
[](https://substack..IONch5jlQsmiVTAkFPTh1PGsRuqn42Qfv11aY8cGTx4?)
---
# [From New York to Los Angeles](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=154683534&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NjgzNTM0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzY3MTA0OTYsImV4cCI6MTczOTMwMjQ5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.4ok5SFeeJ75uXxdydhrZjWPc1baCns2nGMbqhfP9k-k)
### Two ongoing sagas on opposite coasts reveal the death of democracy in America well before Trump returns to office
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Jan 12
---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=154683534&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NjgzNTM0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNjcxMDQ5NiwiZXhwIjoxNzM5MzAyNDk2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.TJPbov2i4DEIxO8X6IJKrpE6BDEBrV17SWgWgfdEBVg&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=154683534&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NjgzNTM0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzY3MTA0OTYsImV4cCI6MTczOTMwMjQ5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.4ok5SFeeJ75uXxdydhrZjWPc1baCns2nGMbqhfP9k-k&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=154683534&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NjgzNTM0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzY3MTA0OTYsImV4cCI6MTczOTMwMjQ5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.4ok5SFeeJ75uXxdydhrZjWPc1baCns2nGMbqhfP9k-k)
---
| | [](https://substack..CVzNBd1k8nqTH1i1sl9NFu_V3RDIRq_XsOdqN3_FrrE?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/from-new-york-to-los-angeles?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

When a town in northern California called [Paradise burned to the ground in 2020](https://substack.com/redirect/c789e14e-a386-4673-906c-2d087d01bde9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), I thought the poetry of the climate catastrophe could not grow more poignant.
The past week proved me wrong.
Many voices will claim in the coming weeks and years that Donald Trump was the key force undermining democracy in America. Despite his overt [support](https://substack.com/redirect/bd7066c7-7331-405e-9aae-158910675b48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for authoritarianism, it was not Trump who drove a stake through the heart of our democracy. It died long before.
I've written at length about the Democratic Party's unrelenting [attacks on democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/ee9048f1-61df-4a1f-803f-905060ca1d8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and consistent bipartisan support in Washington for [imperial militarism stretching back 75 years](https://substack.com/redirect/8dafcdca-a45d-4db2-abfc-5a2fadc67f7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Setting aside those examples for now, few other issues demonstrate the unfortunate death of democracy in America as well as healthcare and Climate Justice.
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform your friends --and build a more reliable media ecosystem--by sharing this post._
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=154683534&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NjgzNTM0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzY3MTA0OTYsImV4cCI6MTczOTMwMjQ5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.4ok5SFeeJ75uXxdydhrZjWPc1baCns2nGMbqhfP9k-k)
### **An inferno well beyond Los Angeles**
While the wildfires gripping [global attention](https://substack.com/redirect/7a0fef1d-0251-4de8-8ebb-e0d0bebedd46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) this week happened in Los Angeles, comparable disasters have unfolded with remarkable consistency across the world in recent years. The accelerating global climate catastrophe ensures that they will grow only more severe, more frequent, and more widespread.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/31e1f353-a23e-4986-bd44-1e240ce0330c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The past year alone has witnessed catastrophic floods from [Asheville](https://substack.com/redirect/ad3c2524-89b9-4e91-b4c0-cd3904b5208f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), North Carolina to [Spain](https://substack.com/redirect/a6879db7-e2a5-403c-81e2-aa0669dc70ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [France](https://substack.com/redirect/28fd38b1-182d-43d6-9760-cc210bc39624?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [Brazil](https://substack.com/redirect/5de5ba08-5c46-40c5-9a1b-53b7b00e5630?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), as well as devastating wildfires from [Canada](https://substack.com/redirect/b00bd669-39af-4a26-a943-4bfe2fdeb02f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [Australia](https://substack.com/redirect/4ade7ed4-454b-4031-b7a9-61e65678a7c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to, most recently, [Los Angeles](https://substack.com/redirect/c685c2d5-62d8-4c11-b0fe-6e558c0bf3ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Each of these disasters wrecked the lives of not only individuals and families, but entire communities and regions.
Whether due to too much rain, not enough of it, or simply its unfortunate timing, climate disasters are becoming more common, and more intense. They are sadly also increasingly predictable--not in the sense that any particular disaster can be more accurately predicted, but rather in the sense that we can all predict with mounting certainty that each of our lives will be impacted (or ended) by some sort of preventable calamity.
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication supported by readers, rather than advertisers. To receive new posts,**sign up for a free subscription!** To support my work, please consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..OJOd4FLFzZ2rQrsLBMvln6UI2oul1NKaL_RXyRWoOQU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=154683534)
### **Painful poetry**
Los Angeles is not just any city, nor is it only the second most populous and prosperous city in the country.
Southern California has been the epicenter of a [propaganda machine](https://substack.com/redirect/765e84da-d6c8-43ff-8950-09db9b7ffe33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) supporting America's military industrial complex for decades. It has churned out [thousands of films](https://substack.com/redirect/22002665-5d66-400b-ba99-6174b6501025?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) depicting America as an international hero, despite our [history of global predation and plunder](https://substack.com/redirect/5380ec7b-6e1f-4c68-a0ff-db4838dcf036?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Combined with the power of [mass media](https://substack.com/redirect/8da27f27-56fc-4336-a4b1-90027b7363a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) dedicated to justifying American imperialism, no empire in human history has ever boasted so powerful a propaganda machine. It would have made Hitler blush, and would probably have kept him in power had Goebbels the technology and prowess to rival the likes of Lucas (whose most popular films, to be fair, were [allegories written to expose the barbarity of American empire](https://substack.com/redirect/c0b23bcc-8e9a-4d51-9f23-dedfdaa20239?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) and Spielberg.
If any irony could surpass the jarring spectacle of a town called Paradise burning to the ground, it would be that the propaganda center of an empire largely responsible for destroying life on Earth would go up in flames at a [bizarre time of year](https://substack.com/redirect/cbaa85f3-e6dc-45a2-9c5e-02498b170861?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) two weeks before an overt fascist returns to the White House. A center of global propaganda supporting American empire is now an inferno.
Coming in the wake of a U.S.-enabled [genocide ignored for over a year](https://substack.com/redirect/91666115-6bdb-43f7-992d-82b83e0863d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--despite unfolding on global mass media [for the first time](https://substack.com/redirect/d2ddc1c7-a96e-43e8-833c-d344f8366bf9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--it's almost like the Universe rubbing America's face in our collective complicity and foolishness.
### **Just like healthcare**
The assassination of United Healthcare CEO Brian Thompson, and [national celebration](https://substack.com/redirect/e6cc686b-7e84-4d96-91db-b8d8a4b4fc45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of his alleged killer, Luigi Mangione, reflect a deep seated [illegitimacy](https://substack.com/redirect/ba9e3853-1577-4917-9ae9-4967ddcb25ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) pervading our institutions.
It's not merely the case that Americans feel disempowered, ignored, and preyed upon. In the healthcare context, it's particularly ironic: the very institutions to which we pay money in order to protect our health are the ones preying on us and driving people to early graves by denying them critical care that would be recognized as a right in any other industrialized country.
Aside from the many things about that set of events that I have been meaning to write (and struggling to find the time to address while working to survive in the mountains), the most jarring is its ultimate futility: despite an assassination; a frantic interstate manhunt; a manic and continuing national conversation about the crime, the alleged killer and his background; and the moral justification for an act that could be fairly described as [collective self-defense responding to unrelenting economic violence](https://substack.com/redirect/86ca4712-2bdf-494f-9503-a03c8e621a13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), policymakers in Washington have done more or less nothing to respond to any of this.
There is no realistic possibility of a solution for even the medical debt crisis, let alone one for the crisis in healthcare access that continues to [drive down life expectancy](https://substack.com/redirect/3eb03344-e7a1-4cd4-8b88-3d4d4349cd22?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the richest country the world has ever seen.
This is a result not of random or isolated events, but rather a sustained impediment on public debate [enforced](https://substack.com/redirect/ee9048f1-61df-4a1f-803f-905060ca1d8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by two corporate political parties. Worse yet, both parties' leaders have proven willing to [sink to any depth](https://substack.com/redirect/c65e0e10-1b68-4ef4-88b7-67af8293a3b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in order to [protect their careers](https://substack.com/redirect/e1601078-b438-4405-9fb2-456317cf0c52?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by insulating their patrons on Wall Street from the American public.
### **Parallels**
The fires in Los Angeles are no different in the sense that, despite drawing the attention of billions of people, wrecking the lives of millions, and revealing in painful relief the need to make dramatic changes at the social and political level, nothing will happen in Washington.
Aside from predictable [right wing disinformation](https://open.substack.com/pub/readtpa/p/the-rights-wildfire-lies-spread-faster?r=97w99&utm_medium=ios), Congress simply lacks the capacity to legislate on behalf of the American people. Our aging leaders are not only [entrenched and unaccountable](https://substack.com/redirect/deeb10dc-3c3f-4a6b-9e33-ad0f24f58a21?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Every one of Congress' 535 members (with, at most, a handful of revealingly rare exceptions) were chosen on the basis of [their allegiance to capital](https://substack.com/redirect/9ed47df9-d39a-476c-9920-179f1159ee69?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
### **A thought experiment**
Will the outcome be any different when another wildfire, or some other climate-fueled natural disaster, consumes Washington, DC or New York?
Don't hold your breath. [That happened 12 years ago](https://substack.com/redirect/a0659c1e-6066-4e1d-b05a-61c349356f34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and Congress barely batted an eye.

body:
I knew the Democrats would want revenge after getting CRUSHED at the ballot box...

| |
---
| | | _I knew the Democrats would want revenge after getting CRUSHED at the ballot box...

I knew they'd come for MAGA Republicans hard and fast...

And I knew President Trump's Cabinet would be a prime target for their revenge campaign..._

But this surprised even me. The Democrat Machine just unleashed a coordinated hatchet job against President Trump's top appointments.

_**[It's a sweeping political ambush and I need to fill you in immediately.](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkTGP3SAMxz8N2YiwA-QxZDj1lKW6qurSERHi5KFHeBGQ3H38Kqd26tLOtn9_--efb_bNhRjS-s1tNDx8trnYetriXeT7Mwbutukod7QoUHEBHNB2zTzMxmunGxqg73QPUveiuQ9IaiIEIkTpZ6P65bYoodDLHqQB2YTh4ggABCNvcGtxArNosyxaiMlow6RwkXJtH0S7f6Y1UymZ9mOKwbvU-ufWxOFe615Y98JwZDgW8kem9j2kTPPVwXCs5DZ-XREKMRxnWijNvOZj27l3U0hU-R78o1yIbswXIoe0su615oMY6qNu1rttd2FNrHv9vbew31_41y8_oAXotERbQZlOacWhV5qhpg9bw_wfA585z1Qp1Sv85A-f-R9LDPXHkc6_C00e5v09xBiK7pkU6-ZC_LRT__2N54C_AgAA__87sJ1E "It’s a sweeping political ambush and I need to fill you in immediately. ")**_
- Elizabeth Warren fired off a propaganda letter calling **PETE HEGSETH** a potential 'insider threat' because of his Christian tattoo
- Adam Schiff went on ABC to attack **KASH PATEL'S** nomination to run the FBI
- Axios confirmed that Senate Democrats declined an expedited confirmation process for **TULSI GABBARD** for political purposes
- Blue state governors announced they'll defy Trump Border Czar **TOM HOMAN 'S** mass deportation plan of violent criminals
- Democrat Gov. Josh Green is jetting to DC in order to help torpedo the confirmation of **ROBERT F. KENNEDY JR.**
- Nancy Pelosi fired off a press release slamming **ELON MUSK** as being a 'puppet'
It's a national disgrace.

That's why I'm rushing to you with an urgent request:

_**[I'm respectfully asking Conservatives from ALL 50 STATES to help me support President Trump and his Administration, defend his top allies in Congress, and deliver on his mandate from the American People.](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkTGP3SAMxz8N2YiwA-QxZDj1lKW6qurSERHi5KFHeBGQ3H38Kqd26tLOtn9_--efb_bNhRjS-s1tNDx8trnYetriXeT7Mwbutukod7QoUHEBHNB2zTzMxmunGxqg73QPUveiuQ9IaiIEIkTpZ6P65bYoodDLHqQB2YTh4ggABCNvcGtxArNosyxaiMlow6RwkXJtH0S7f6Y1UymZ9mOKwbvU-ufWxOFe615Y98JwZDgW8kem9j2kTPPVwXCs5DZ-XREKMRxnWijNvOZj27l3U0hU-R78o1yIbswXIoe0su615oMY6qNu1rttd2FNrHv9vbew31_41y8_oAXotERbQZlOacWhV5qhpg9bw_wfA585z1Qp1Sv85A-f-R9LDPXHkc6_C00e5v09xBiK7pkU6-ZC_LRT__2N54C_AgAA__87sJ1E "I’m respectfully asking true American Patriots from ALL 50 STATES to join me and stand with President Trump, each of his Cabinet picks, and his allies in the House at this key moment. It’ll take ALL OF US to stand up for what’s right to help see these nominations through.")**_
| | [PLEASE JOIN ME NOW](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkTGP3SAMxz8N2YiwA-QxZDj1lKW6qurSERHi5KFHeBGQ3H38Kqd26tLOtn9_--efb_bNhRjS-s1tNDx8trnYetriXeT7Mwbutukod7QoUHEBHNB2zTzMxmunGxqg73QPUveiuQ9IaiIEIkTpZ6P65bYoodDLHqQB2YTh4ggABCNvcGtxArNosyxaiMlow6RwkXJtH0S7f6Y1UymZ9mOKwbvU-ufWxOFe615Y98JwZDgW8kem9j2kTPPVwXCs5DZ-XREKMRxnWijNvOZj27l3U0hU-R78o1yIbswXIoe0su615oMY6qNu1rttd2FNrHv9vbew31_41y8_oAXotERbQZlOacWhV5qhpg9bw_wfA585z1Qp1Sv85A-f-R9LDPXHkc6_C00e5v09xBiK7pkU6-ZC_LRT__2N54C_AgAA__87sJ1E "DEFEND TRUMP’S CABINET PICKS")

_As your House Majority Leader - and as an American - this political ambush against our duly elected 47th President infuriates me to my core._

But there's something that brings me comfort and I'll share it with you...

**The Democrats are desperate. They 're grasping at straws to do ANYTHING in their power to stay relevant and sabotage President Trump's second term. The election was certified. His historic victory is set in stone. And our mandate from the American People is ironclad. **

Now we need your help to deliver on it.

If ONE MILLION true American Patriots can join me right here and right now, we'll have the power and resources to fight back, deliver on his agenda, and support President Trump's vision for our country.

**I 'm personally asking you to step up and join me in this critical fight.**
| [PLEASE JOIN ME NOW](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkTGP3SAMxz8N2YiwA-QxZDj1lKW6qurSERHi5KFHeBGQ3H38Kqd26tLOtn9_--efb_bNhRjS-s1tNDx8trnYetriXeT7Mwbutukod7QoUHEBHNB2zTzMxmunGxqg73QPUveiuQ9IaiIEIkTpZ6P65bYoodDLHqQB2YTh4ggABCNvcGtxArNosyxaiMlow6RwkXJtH0S7f6Y1UymZ9mOKwbvU-ufWxOFe615Y98JwZDgW8kem9j2kTPPVwXCs5DZ-XREKMRxnWijNvOZj27l3U0hU-R78o1yIbswXIoe0su615oMY6qNu1rttd2FNrHv9vbew31_41y8_oAXotERbQZlOacWhV5qhpg9bw_wfA585z1Qp1Sv85A-f-R9LDPXHkc6_C00e5v09xBiK7pkU6-ZC_LRT__2N54C_AgAA__87sJ1E "DEFEND TRUMP’S CABINET PICKS")

Thanks for all you do for our movement.

- Steve Scalise

I knew they'd come for MAGA Republicans hard and fast... And I knew President Trump's Cabinet would be a prime target for their revenge campaign... But this surprised even me. The Democrat Machine just unleashed a coordinated hatchet job against President Trump's top appointments. "It’s a sweeping political ambush and I need to fill you in immediately. " - Elizabeth Warren fired off a propaganda letter calling PETE HEGSETH a potential 'insider threat' because of his Christian tattoo - Adam Schiff went on ABC to attack KASH PATEL'S nomination to run the FBI - Axios confirmed that Senate Democrats declined an expedited confirmation process for TULSI GABBARD for political purposes - Blue state governors announced they'll defy Trump Border Czar TOM HOMAN 'S mass deportation plan of violent criminals - Democrat Gov. Josh Green is jetting to DC in order to help torpedo the confirmation of ROBERT F. KENNEDY JR. - Nancy Pelosi fired off a press release slamming ELON MUSK as being a 'puppet' It's a national disgrace. That's why I'm rushing to you with an urgent request: "I’m respectfully asking true American Patriots from ALL 50 STATES to join me and stand with President Trump, each of his Cabinet picks, and his allies in the House at this key moment. It’ll take ALL OF US to stand up for what’s right to help see these nominations through." | | "DEFEND TRUMP’S CABINET PICKS" As your House Majority Leader - and as an American - this political ambush against our duly elected 47th President infuriates me to my core. But there's something that brings me comfort and I'll share it with you... The Democrats are desperate. They 're grasping at straws to do ANYTHING in their power to stay relevant and sabotage President Trump's second term. The election was certified. His historic victory is set in stone. And our mandate from the American People is ironclad. Now we need your help to deliver on it. If ONE MILLION true American Patriots can join me right here and right now, we'll have the power and resources to fight back, deliver on his agenda, and support President Trump's vision for our country. I 'm personally asking you to step up and join me in this critical fight. | "DEFEND TRUMP’S CABINET PICKS" Thanks for all you do for our movement. - Steve Scalise | | | "Majority Leader Survey" A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise: I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. clean_body: There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.| | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

What do you think of when you hear the word “oligarchy,” team?
Do you see rich people sitting around a table laughing maniacally? Or Russians wrapped in furs and jewelry worth more than your house?
The reality is kind of boring and much closer to home. **Here’s how the American oligarchy works:**
According to a study by political scientists Martin Gilens and Benjamin Page, the wealthiest 10% of Americans have far more influence over our elected officials than the rest of us.
The ultra-rich pressure Congress to pass laws that favor their small circle instead of benefiting the majority of us.
**That cycle will keep repeating if we don’t do something about it.**
The corruption in our political system is caused by money influencing our elections, lawmakers, and special interest groups. Fortunately, we have a solution, and we want you to be part of it.

Hi there, I’m always seeking solutions to the problems faced by folks in IL-13 and across the nation. **That’s why I’m thrilled to share that last month, I aided in the passage of the single largest expansion of VA long-term care services in decades.** I was proud to cosponsor this bipartisan legislation. It will provide more support for veterans, including home-based care and improvements to educational and employment programs for homeless veterans. As a member of the House Committee on Veterans’ Affairs, I’ll always go to bat for our veterans and support legislation that improves their care. Team, I’m fired up to continue pushing for bipartisan progress and deliver more meaningful results for folks in Central and Southern Illinois — _but I need your help to hit the ground running._ **[Our first fundraising goal of the year is right around the corner, and missing it would put us at a disadvantage. clean_body: | = Hi there, I’m always seeking solutions to the problems faced by folks in IL-13 and across the nation. That’s why I’m thrilled to share that last month, I aided in the passage of the single largest expansion of VA long-term care services in decades. I was proud to cosponsor this bipartisan legislation. It will provide more support for veterans, including home-based care and improvements to educational and employment programs for homeless veterans. As a member of the House Committee on Veterans’ Affairs, I’ll always go to bat for our veterans and support legislation that improves their care. Team, I’m fired up to continue pushing for bipartisan progress and deliver more meaningful results for folks in Central and Southern Illinois — but I need your help to hit the ground running. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Your action today can make a significant difference. From the constant threat of government shutdowns to their failure to address the real issues faced by Americans, we’ve seen just how historically unproductive Congress gets under GOP leadership. We’ve got to send a message that we won’t let it stand, Peter. [That’s why we’re collecting names to demand Congress be held accountable and get back to work for the American people. Will you add your name today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100296637/522295420/-165755077?source=SBD_DPG_EM_ENG_011224_1_1_Hold-Republicans-Accountable_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjA3MzkwOS0yN2QxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=do-pC0veSSm744FrL2Nmm6fY6-OJj93cQzug7bBt0Z0=&emci=664c7d02-27d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=d6073909-27d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=43566853) | | **[SIGN ON TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100296638/522295421/-165755077?source=SBD_DPG_EM_ENG_011224_1_1_Hold-Republicans-Accountable_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjA3MzkwOS0yN2QxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=do-pC0veSSm744FrL2Nmm6fY6-OJj93cQzug7bBt0Z0=&emci=664c7d02-27d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=d6073909-27d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=43566853)**

Their MAGA charades and far-right rhetoric aren’t what Americans need — they need affordable housing, quality healthcare, their fundamental rights protected, and their communities supported.
[We’re circulating a petition to remind House and Senate Republicans who they answer to: the American people. Will you add your name and demand accountability in Congress today? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100296639/522295422/-165755077?source=SBD_DPG_EM_ENG_011224_1_1_Hold-Republicans-Accountable_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjA3MzkwOS0yN2QxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=do-pC0veSSm744FrL2Nmm6fY6-OJj93cQzug7bBt0Z0=&emci=664c7d02-27d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=d6073909-27d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=43566853)

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: did you know?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [#] https://secure.ngpvan.com/JcKdD-Q5sEmr2Bb9s_L8tg2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JcKdD-Q5sEmr2Bb9s_L8tg2]Folks,

Did you know that New Jersey has the second most expensive childcare in the nation? That has to change.

I am laser-focused on making childcare more affordable for hardworking Jersey families. To do that, I want to hear from you about your childcare costs.

Is childcare too expensive?

YES [https://go.josh4jersey.com/a/childcare-2501]
NO [https://go.josh4jersey.com/a/childcare-2501]

I’m running for Governor to make life more affordable. Childcare is just the start. As Governor, I’ll be ready to take on housing, utility costs, healthcare, and more to make life in Jersey less expensive.

Thank you for being with me in this fight,

Josh
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. clean_body: [#] [, Did you know that New Jersey has the second most expensive childcare in the nation? That has to change. YES [] NO [] I’m running for Governor to make life more affordable. Childcare is just the start. As Governor, I’ll be ready to take on housing, utility costs, healthcare, and more to make life in Jersey less expensive. Thank you for being with me in this fight, Josh Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. name: Robert Garcia
subject: Help Wildfire Relief Efforts in Los Angeles
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100297215/522297645/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjVlNGQ2ZC0yY2QxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nO8fdn0_lpic0g4ljjttmxap_y2yGDpJ2TkotF8fHBg=)
Team,
Los Angeles is facing the worst wildfires in recorded history. Tens of thousands have been displaced or evacuated, families have lost everything, and lives have been tragically lost.
Our first responders are working around the clock to contain the fires, while communities across LA County are stepping up to provide relief for those affected. Today, I’m asking you to join me in supporting two remarkable organizations making a real difference on the ground: **United Way of Greater Los Angeles** and **World Central Kitchen**.
These organizations are providing essential assistance:
* **World Central Kitchen** is on the frontlines, delivering nutritious meals and water to displaced families and first responders in Southern California.
* **United Way of Greater Los Angeles** is focused on longer-term recovery, offering housing and support services to thousands of Angelenos who have lost so much.

[Please donate today to help sustain these critical relief efforts. By splitting a donation between these two organizations, you can provide immediate food and housing assistance to those in need.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100297216/522297646/854643184?refcode=lafirerelief&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjVlNGQ2ZC0yY2QxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nO8fdn0_lpic0g4ljjttmxap_y2yGDpJ2TkotF8fHBg=)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100297217/522297647/854643184?refcode2=4f5e4d6d-2cd1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&refcode=lafirerelief&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjVlNGQ2ZC0yY2QxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nO8fdn0_lpic0g4ljjttmxap_y2yGDpJ2TkotF8fHBg=)
For nearly a week, we’ve witnessed the devastating impact of these fires and the extraordinary bravery of our firefighters and first responders. We’ve also seen the resilience of our community as neighbors come together to help one another.
[Please donate today to help displaced families recover and rebuild. Every contribution—no matter the size—makes a meaningful difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100297218/522297648/854643184?refcode=lafirerelief&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjVlNGQ2ZC0yY2QxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nO8fdn0_lpic0g4ljjttmxap_y2yGDpJ2TkotF8fHBg=)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100297219/522297649/854643184?refcode2=4f5e4d6d-2cd1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&refcode=lafirerelief&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjVlNGQ2ZC0yY2QxLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nO8fdn0_lpic0g4ljjttmxap_y2yGDpJ2TkotF8fHBg=)
Thank you for standing with our LA community during this incredibly challenging time. Together, we can provide hope and relief to those who need it most.
Onwards,
Robert Garcia

name: Priority Gold
subject: JD Vance’s Shocking Warning: Your Money’s Next.
body:
JD Vance reveals a hidden threat to your savings—see what’s already happening and how to shield yourself before it’s too late...
# Kamala’s Last-Ditch Move:
Digital Dollar Control BEFORE Trump Takes Office!
This is no joke — your financial freedom is on the line. Kamala and Biden aren’t waiting for Trump to take office in January. They’re shoving **[Executive Order 14067](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)** through right now, with FedNOW already rolling out. **Here's what's at risk:**
* **Your paycheck.**
* **Your savings.**
* **Every dollar you spend.**

Trump calls this a _“dangerous threat to freedom”_... JD Vance echoes the concern, warning that this _“could lead to total government control over your financial life.”_ This isn’t some far-off threat—it’s happening NOW, and they’re accelerating [their plans to cancel your money](https://link.myamericanpatriot.) **before Trump takes office**. Time is running out. If you have cash in a U.S. bank, [**Go here to see why moving your money might be your only way out.**](https://link.myamericanpatriot.) **It’s urgent that you read the full details NOW.**

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100297296/522297958/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjU3YjhhYjYtMmRkMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cpuXf49K-sGnCeDOwxlycqkIqL1LnN0ZEUcBw2xpqcc=)

Team, Once the Arizona legislative session begins this week, a complete fundraising blackout will be in effect for our frontline Democratic lawmakers. **You read that right:** after the legislature is gaveled in, they’ll be legally prohibited from raising a _single cent_ to fuel their campaigns. And while fundraising will be paused, you can bet that the GOP machine won’t stop spreading extremist disinformation and trying to gain ground in Arizona. Republicans are already ramping up their fundraising efforts, and we’re running out of time fast. Arizona Democrats are counting on the help of grassroots donors like you to ensure they’ve got the resources they need to stand up to extremism and secure progress for all Arizonans this session. **[So, before the fundraising walls go up, can you split a donation between us and the Arizona Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee to help power Democratic campaigns across the state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100297298/522297960/663064721?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjU3YjhhYjYtMmRkMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cpuXf49K-sGnCeDOwxlycqkIqL1LnN0ZEUcBw2xpqcc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to the Arizona Democratic Party and the Arizona Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100297300/522297962/663064721?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjU3YjhhYjYtMmRkMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cpuXf49K-sGnCeDOwxlycqkIqL1LnN0ZEUcBw2xpqcc=)

You read that right: after the legislature is gaveled in, they’ll be legally prohibited from raising a single cent to fuel their campaigns. And while fundraising will be paused, you can bet that the GOP machine won’t stop spreading extremist disinformation and trying to gain ground in Arizona. Republicans are already ramping up their fundraising efforts, and we’re running out of time fast. name: Working Families Party
subject: Resources for wildfire victims
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Dear Peter, The wildfires in southern California this week have been devastating and heartbreaking. Thousands of homes, grocery stores, libraries, churches, and schools have been reduced to cinder. As of Sunday, at least 16 people have been pronounced dead. Nearly 180,000 have been ordered to evacuate, watching on in horror as their livelihoods and memories are threatened and destroyed. 36,000 total acres of land and entire neighborhoods — wiped out. And with relief efforts ongoing and more high winds in the forecast, all of these are numbers that may rise. It is already projected to be the most expensive set of fires in United States history.1 California is used to wildfires. But the severity of disasters like these has been increasing dramatically over the past few years, alongside shifts in weather patterns. Scientists have been warning the world about these kinds of disasters for DECADES — disasters that have been increasing in frequency and intensity as a result of climate change, corporate greed, and political inaction.2 Meanwhile, at moments like these when we depend on accurate and reliable information, social media platforms have engineered their algorithms to help right-wing conspiracy theories spread as fast as the fires themselves.3 **We know we are all strongest in moments of crisis when we come together and show up for each other.** [**That’s why we put together a donation page that splits up your contribution between various on-the-ground funds and relief organizations, to help the people who need it the most. Please pitch in today, if you can.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqugw92OTn3eBVs4NDg9Yvc074MKrd3L6bZyRmm9MhvidPjGm-dnB-OfAx1ch1xUqKAGSzftgTyZn0aodG9X60RKCXwEp1WrQFUACEqRGKebKQVFS2r4DCbqg4S79zDvZVeJ8XCxbXye17ymFFCNaVS8esls1KRrCvoaKQ3RPEMaBxP5B0777pXGpg0ME1I_Mi00P4tCN1m1CxP8vhFNwaMcr9ML_0jvYv0REgxWZH-kL8mZHDj9sthFCNKejKHDxCIYKqbT4AiTuyT9vVkf2cieNqdF-Y1cDcx9twnojP8kYcYsO1ZIudjsTBIaAt_XcHiWVA7cN5PbpX6Ls70mGB3mrBsPiV0AEvXpo3nzAZYk5g/4d3/X_OLZm8KQOufHhIJx2A-wg/h0/h001.49rGUmkO4_y6_R72oVyRhN9IvyFcsMqkAhhqm0GaXqc) **[Contribute »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqugw92OTn3eBVs4NDg9Yvc074MKrd3L6bZyRmm9MhvidPjGm-dnB-OfAx1ch1xUqKAGSzftgTyZn0aodG9X60RKAUTvV2KECKiiMdjmJvHYy_bRsaWIPfitT0hX3z8uRKWFBkQe1mgbw2TXjDfEEZ07xsXif2rQaYi7DsodhW2pJUhPUSPZ-ZxyhV6PyPxAlVhPqUtMAxjnOlQkDXnb4E236hmtVMpTnd-UvXHPotzszF0bRqoEVRP1W_yEPBMV4AT7sH-HzxtSn5LnM8jOdRQe6pCZedkR9Niz7o0yy2nf7fR6Bm-oxY4hiLOYhyqiitjGD7Pp0jYzYqSMxQ05gcYorSnk4-8PG2Jwka8jVJiluA/4d3/X_OLZm8KQOufHhIJx2A-wg/h1/h001.fChySL0epqtd8cAk8sFogXJiiH98Lea3hAxV_iTDPfg)** But as we show up for each other in this moment, that doesn’t mean letting go of our righteous anger at the events playing out before us in community after community. Global fossil fuel corporations and the politicians they bankroll have spent decades lying to working people about the increasingly devastating effects of their industry on climate change.4 And even as the scale of disasters like these increase before our eyes, they’re choosing to double down — spewing wild conspiracy theories rather than admit the truth. We know that when climate disaster strikes, it's always working families who take the brunt of it. It’s our job to stand with each other in these moments of crisis, and then to rebuild and keep organizing to build a better future for our families. Please take care of yourselves and loved ones. [**And if you’re in a position to do so, make a donation to help wildfire victims get the help and resources they desperately need.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqugw92OTn3eBVs4NDg9Yvc074MKrd3L6bZyRmm9MhvidPjGm-dnB-OfAx1ch1xUqKAGSzftgTyZn0aodG9X60RK9phUY2JUKuy0bEXFtRSNCmy1OnCBHOKt1igZT53hb1uQ30Q8ZbBWl7WMImoVQ6ZWOe-MQnFS_9kEPcqxEqLgTYvR7wD3Vf-NreesmsCmOoEqTdO0paiUCkYK_mPiyEimdsk5fC1cNTOBKXmKhY6Zdckhr9xL0-bqpR8BTEZUemLVNEDdgzkSuV45Q7xefk98FzqLxrKIKG0FRJtr37qEJ-CMzEzXAby8RsqB1z8zXTLn0tOElb2PzJOBV-a_THhkvGJdekY9GqiCMkNzD4p-3g/4d3/X_OLZm8KQOufHhIJx2A-wg/h2/h001.PEPUTUYoLgO0yn1rpMQd5M_hH-2C8IGTfSSD6xuDrcU) With love and solidarity, Working Families Party Sources: 1\. clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, The wildfires in southern California this week have been devastating and heartbreaking. Thousands of homes, grocery stores, libraries, churches, and schools have been reduced to cinder. As of Sunday, at least 16 people have been pronounced dead. Nearly 180,000 have been ordered to evacuate, watching on in horror as their livelihoods and memories are threatened and destroyed. 36,000 total acres of land and entire neighborhoods — wiped out. And with relief efforts ongoing and more high winds in the forecast, all of these are numbers that may rise. It is already projected to be the most expensive set of fires in United States history.1 California is used to wildfires. But the severity of disasters like these has been increasing dramatically over the past few years, alongside shifts in weather patterns. Scientists have been warning the world about these kinds of disasters for DECADES — disasters that have been increasing in frequency and intensity as a result of climate change, corporate greed, and political inaction.2 Meanwhile, at moments like these when we depend on accurate and reliable information, social media platforms have engineered their algorithms to help right-wing conspiracy theories spread as fast as the fires themselves.3 We know we are all strongest in moments of crisis when we come together and show up for each other. But as we show up for each other in this moment, that doesn’t mean letting go of our righteous anger at the events playing out before us in community after community. Global fossil fuel corporations and the politicians they bankroll have spent decades lying to working people about the increasingly devastating effects of their industry on climate change.4 And even as the scale of disasters like these increase before our eyes, they’re choosing to double down — spewing wild conspiracy theories rather than admit the truth. We know that when climate disaster strikes, it's always working families who take the brunt of it. It’s our job to stand with each other in these moments of crisis, and then to rebuild and keep organizing to build a better future for our families. Please take care of yourselves and loved ones. With love and solidarity, Working Families Party Sources: 1\. , Washington Post, January 10, 2025 2\. , New York Times, January 10, 2025 3\. , The Guardian, January 10, 2025 4\. , Quartz, May 1, 2024 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . Date: Sat, Jan 11, 2025
Subject: Open now: The 2025 NDRC supporter survey Hi Peter, One of the best parts of my role at the NDRC is getting to know the people who make up our community of supporters — people like you who are committed to doing what they can to elect pro-democracy leaders, protect fair maps, and combat ongoing gerrymandering. As national far-right politicians continue trying to divide our communities and erode trust, even among friends and neighbors, I think it’s more important than ever before that we seek out moments to understand each other and build deeper relationships. **When the fight gets tough — and it definitely will — we can find motivation in each other. ** [**With that said: We just launched the 2025 NDRC community survey for our fair maps community, and I hope you’ll take a moment to share more about who you are and why you’re here.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100297637/522299105/1165575651?refcode=eng_ndrc_tier1_email_SurveyLiftnote_email_20250112-NDRC-Tier1-SurveyLiftnote_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20250112-NDRC-Tier1-SurveyLiftnote_&utm_campaign=SurveyLiftnote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1YmVjNmEwLTMwZDEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Z4J7F1WYGY5V2WnH5-HZ8xQgh6NcuQTH7EQbyMybonk=&emci=dab5d4fb-a2cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=95bec6a0-30d1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=8431045) We would love to know why you are in the fight for fair maps and what a truly representative government would mean to you. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: This is the Democrats' first attempt at cutting into our Majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Everything is on the line in 2025, and losing just one seat could spell disaster for passing the America First Agenda into law.
We need CRITICAL reinforcements in NY-21, FL-1, and FL-6.
|
---
| | |
Friend,

You know how slim our House Majority is. _**And it could get even smaller.**_

NY-21, FL-1, and FL-6 are all set for special elections this year, **and we need your help to defend these seats.**

Everything is on the line in 2025, and losing just one seat could spell disaster for passing the America First Agenda into law. **[Can I ask you to rush critical reinforcements to help protect these seats?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ecc4d2f5c5be499eaec039465faf6cca&_e=smwXwvcSM0SRh2ez4013tq52MTAyqWCVNUxuFtB9pB2fS_GnO08CATFfiJospX1F9GgJr2iXC-b1sNUB9Lo7Lrs5AIUFk2dZbtXsAdEe8Bklk4oTEj0uWRVht_cbUmq2nWS6AoQgBpYTVqvpFDeRlN7QUVU_sHnjJi_YSNWEIKIzHimZ71xfQHebRogOej7mmSpAWIRimC8RohwLpA7JqH9cpyz7-q3mDZEdhjSCqjWStUvitjTzizX1RpxqSec5QMwueFkvBOY2kUCxQf4VLFPCOwzqxiVL0U8Ap-q-Vb6RA8YuyM2mWuu3GRuTphK285BOtDVKuyYul6J-G_erPu4Mje-QVPtqWE9qs-X2f_baU-C4GhsUCBns4vVwBfrlNf53LE7XabNhPHhIbdbV4g%3D%3D "Can I ask you to rush critical reinforcements to help protect these seats?")**

I am launching a fundraising blitz to fuel our efforts and keep these seats in Republican hands - NY-21, FL-1, and FL-6.

clean_body: Everything is on the line in 2025, and losing just one seat could spell disaster for passing the America First Agenda into law. We need CRITICAL reinforcements in NY-21, FL-1, and FL-6. | | | | Friend, You know how slim our House Majority is. And it could get even smaller. NY-21, FL-1, and FL-6 are all set for special elections this year, and we need your help to defend these seats. Everything is on the line in 2025, and losing just one seat could spell disaster for passing the America First Agenda into law. "Can I ask you to rush critical reinforcements to help protect these seats?" | | | "Generic Button" | You know the Democrats are pulling out every trick in the book to try to take these seats right out from under us, and that's the last thing this country needs. I am launching a fundraising blitz to fuel our efforts and keep these seats in Republican hands - NY-21, FL-1, and FL-6. "Will you chip in today and help defend these seats? " | | | "Generic Button" We need to hold every seat possible so we can pass the America First agenda into law. This is for all the marbles, Friend, and we really need your help here. | | | "Generic Button" Thank you, and God bless, Speaker Mike Johnson | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Bethany Hamilton
subject: Faith, not fear
body:
I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again.| | | But the biggest reason I kept surfing was my belief that God had my back.
---
| | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c7322650768a44038ab44b2154597dc8&_e=0rL7IZkUvlkrUHTEXEi4JGLDpmFwVsmsKcsT9md01u_HvLWUjfkgf9MEcZfW9NXFwgaHqCLm7psx3iTM1P32dgVRgDIVZkh9J6T_riBEQFrdnlLkz3GdOUi4dL-hnEj1ewpQQFru699NbkCh4rscyNwllyt2Y0JQwlNU4qtcGYXxjfsw3PbrcSxricN3IWWtUDGiTIBKiRY2D9HPS10EImHBp-QWDTHjjd73mhmBAb-uGEr6dxKilru3abNXPI4Lr5zU5oq2fAO_NiZV_08LWAmWPCdHoV0dri2TDpCOCBTwCe6kv7skcVPSdGvw7IYrR_qNSDC8PlIg8FeXJJZNBIU2qglpNHvc-6zYf5YXL0M6deGaBTljMAESaea4sNiQuxJFL9Z613WCbuJ3LUzzzA%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend, I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again.But just 4 weeks later I was back in the water.
---
| | Dear Friend,I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again. But just 4 weeks later I was back in the water.
---
| [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c7322650768a44038ab44b2154597dc8&_e=0rL7IZkUvlkrUHTEXEi4JGLDpmFwVsmsKcsT9md01u_HvLWUjfkgf9MEcZfW9NXFwgaHqCLm7psx3iTM1P32dgVRgDIVZkh9J6T_riBEQFrdnlLkz3GdOUi4dL-hnEj1ewpQQFru699NbkCh4rscyNwllyt2Y0JQwlNU4qtcGYXxjfsw3PbrcSxricN3IWWtUDGiTIBKiRY2D9HPS10EImHBp-QWDTHjjd73mhmBAb-uGEr6dxKilru3abNXPI4LkFAQ7BrMXKjQ-H4sJyg0vI-QDsQd1mJzfi5QimakjR8SoNuFLB4YxOgJFSLwrBglEXI2xyJtwgJQ7q5W55eiMahltDxAs0NcvlF83awWjIGfd91cVk3Ig7TvrrkgxAPLlmTOq5rZm4EPFpTILgLwqg%3D%3D)
---
| | It was partly due to my parents’ unconditional support and my love of the ocean. But the biggest reason I kept surfing was my belief that God had my back. And I want more children to hear that message because too many of them are being trained up in fear, _not_ _faith_. That's why I wrote a children's book called "Surfing Past Fear" with an amazing Christian publisher called **Brave Books**. [**_I hope you'll consider giving a gift of $100 or any amount you can afford to support Brave Books_**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c7322650768a44038ab44b2154597dc8&_e=0rL7IZkUvlkrUHTEXEi4JGLDpmFwVsmsKcsT9md01u_HvLWUjfkgf9MEcZfW9NXFwgaHqCLm7psx3iTM1P32dgVRgDIVZkh9J6T_riBEQFrdnlLkz3GdOUi4dL-hnEj1ewpQQFru699NbkCh4rscyNwllyt2Y0JQwlNU4qtcGYXxjfsw3PbrcSxricN3IWWtUDGiTIBKiRY2D9HPS10EImHBp-QWDTHjjd73mhmBAb-uGEr6dxKilru3abNXPI4LhFpYWV_Ajncod7LU6biSsV82uarCwinC_AkBsHjEtC_yWOy0DUF1gmEzWDO9EpIekC6tWXBEnBRD9vFkE7s0OF83ifQL7m-VhauNca2G2Bl6fKNGfnSSyrCSfwuW6WaNc5Oyx9wu3yMMfM2tCVEd6w%3D%3D) as they help parents raise strong, resilient, God-loving children. In courage,
---
| | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c7322650768a44038ab44b2154597dc8&_e=0rL7IZkUvlkrUHTEXEi4JGLDpmFwVsmsKcsT9md01u_HvLWUjfkgf9MEcZfW9NXFwgaHqCLm7psx3iTM1P32dgVRgDIVZkh9J6T_riBEQFrdnlLkz3GdOUi4dL-hnEj1ewpQQFru699NbkCh4rscyNwllyt2Y0JQwlNU4qtcGYXxjfsw3PbrcSxricN3IWWtUDGiTIBKiRY2D9HPS10EImHBp-QWDTHjjd73mhmBAb-uGEr6dxKilru3abNXPI4LIHOewom27PdGYasLInjbMoUMyo0n5ogCZSTujAIkPTCUakl0g2VXuDCn8OPVBmSNVccWF5wBZfJ64Qnje7DxdLVAJYRj1ZNGQt31QX2NfDfNLH_AWNRZx8S-p82Sc6UpmFp_ifc4PeVRr2jIABvPgA%3D%3D)
---
**Bethany Hamilton** Professional Surfer and Mother
---
|
---
| | P.S. I've set aside a small number of copies of "Surfing Past Fear" just for the friends of **Brave Books**. **[When you support their work today with your gift of $100 or more, it'll be my honor to send you one.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c7322650768a44038ab44b2154597dc8&_e=0rL7IZkUvlkrUHTEXEi4JGLDpmFwVsmsKcsT9md01u_HvLWUjfkgf9MEcZfW9NXFwgaHqCLm7psx3iTM1P32dgVRgDIVZkh9J6T_riBEQFrdnlLkz3GdOUi4dL-hnEj1ewpQQFru699NbkCh4rscyNwllyt2Y0JQwlNU4qtcGYXxjfsw3PbrcSxricN3IWWtUDGiTIBKiRY2D9HPS10EImHBp-QWDTHjjd73mhmBAb-uGEr6dxKilru3abNXPI4LJ8LdzpIaqg8Bs63jGXKOaCpLUX_0AgIaLMvbzEz3G9oPlns3j_DzLFDt869OfoYmpiBpWvtTn-FT3xR80sPimEP2tZiKbUT-Dvmi856coWFz_KpQLpZePtrFQ6emq5YeIuHWo3dLgCRRrUIVF06IJQ%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping America's children learn that God "has not given them a spirit of fear!" (2 Timothy 1:7) -- Bethany
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c7322650768a44038ab44b2154597dc8&_e=0rL7IZkUvlkrUHTEXEi4JGLDpmFwVsmsKcsT9md01u_HvLWUjfkgf9MEcZfW9NXFwgaHqCLm7psx3iTM1P32dgVRgDIVZkh9J6T_riBEQFrdnlLkz3GdOUi4dL-hnEj1ewpQQFru699NbkCh4rscyNwllyt2Y0JQwlNU4qtcGYXxjfsw3PbrcSxricN3IWWtUDGiTIBKiRY2D9HPS10EImHBp-QWDTHjjd73mhmBAb-uGEr6dxKilru3abNXPI4LoemcQ7Ex59YUXQ4eN_26SkQvyWnCm-vYTis4ChCRhaQ-S_oqoGNfOp3ZcVMs09CoajRJu1sUvniXZgeuvIevQpeGrl_EglnnLboTb0e8IzOhV-t1muomMXRe2IGmuhFDBBY-KnEclPjWQCGsr8L5xw%3D%3D)

House conservatives repeatedly pressured previous Speaker Kevin McCarthy to hold a vote to expunge Donald Trump's impeachments. With Speaker "MAGA Mike" Johnson it's likely to come up again, especially as the GOP stays in control of the U.S. House of Representatives.

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011225_1&amount=25]

name: Conservative Direct on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
I’d like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=d67dc2152e4140c0879b44450fb9ccbd&_t=A29FoYtX4Sq4M0wfyyJBSPY8XmTDuoeVsOujImn0ln6N5c7h4x2_B0m5xbC4P5NM8q_fd7mdG3nZwRINNqLuQEVt7jObz6MoR70VdU0jV6WGepO3fIP0Ior867RCXDpa)_
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d67dc2152e4140c0879b44450fb9ccbd&_e=kXFi_7CWGDAB5lxzxL5tKFIj5QO_w-WYf8uncPxYYkSHn6HGWqkQMkhaFvGkr-hKOt94DYozre_FgU4P9swNTsI0KwN-f8n1dJsYEyp8YISeZZsF9JvjDhTLTr3rrnZRSa7Yn9b2V6pEqvnc4jt1P13L4wMkLOI-bH-KgxxpkAZefKMtyk6CDIdx8h0UMwSnXDNe6ZcTpt27G4bL3IJIcK5APZq6cPEAC_FRy9e6RJkpne6-SBMjuCzw8eSVawnQEHRAZRKtGFv06XXM0pNwuZHecsMWv0yY-yMjg1DuFXOUakakiRPXwo3LE8R-7y04W4MLL3RqgbvNkwnAJJNLIi5FiyOcsUwQ5ivYutEVyBm3PCAl92VMIQt7bHIH4dqEOGLxTAf4QpRNpWf22zlKJQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. I'd like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. Both were born in the late 1990s. Both had a very similar upbringing, raised in a two-parent home in a suburban neighborhood. Both went to public elementary and high schools, and both went to college and now have a four-year degree. In most respects, these young women are nearly identical--same background, grew up at the same time, and even had the same tastes in music and books. BUT, there was one significant difference. And that difference is vital to preserving liberty in America. The first young lady learned false narratives about American history in her K-12 education but especially at college. Her teachers and professors cherry-picked "facts" to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. She was taught political correctness and viewed our history through a lens of race, gender, and class. Her teachers gave this young woman a false and dishonest narrative about our nation's history--a narrative that portrays America as essentially and irredeemably unjust. Absent any opposing viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen--echoing what she learned in school. And when she's challenged, she dismisses this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as **invalid** , **hateful** , and even **racist**. Maybe you know someone like her. If so, I'm not surprised--I do too. What about the other young lady? Well, she received a complete and unbiased view of our nation's history. At her schools, especially her college, she received an education that covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. She understands the principles and meaning of the Constitution because she has read and understands the writings of Jefferson, Hamilton, and Lincoln, along with many other primary sources. Her studies allowed her to recognize that America is not a place of "oppression" and "injustice" but an **exceptional nation worth defending**. This young lady is an **_informed citizen_**. She will never be one to go along with the crowd on any issue, and she urges others to consider policies and political debates from a constitutional perspective. **I ask you, which of these young women would YOU prefer in a position of leadership? ** You can tell us your preference by completing Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the State of American Education **using this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/informed-citizen-survey/**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d67dc2152e4140c0879b44450fb9ccbd&_e=kXFi_7CWGDAB5lxzxL5tKFIj5QO_w-WYf8uncPxYYkSHn6HGWqkQMkhaFvGkr-hKOt94DYozre_FgU4P9swNTsI0KwN-f8n1dJsYEyp8YISeZZsF9JvjDhTLTr3rrnZRSa7Yn9b2V6pEqvnc4jt1P13L4wMkLOI-bH-KgxxpkAZefKMtyk6CDIdx8h0UMwSnXDNe6ZcTpt27G4bL3IJIcOQRACj8GlsJ7vUdG1PmDHWqJvGAbUK2TOVYeQEWFbYumrKo2zQcg6vMENV4Fy0rfB0db4CjGbb00WiUmJk6W354gNX4rCz-opXGRSJJ4223JLcc8xTvIjh8iKFg9OM8lTBZTIbdaZw60rEhA02DV_jFtDaFPWmlXma09GgE4YGfC5AmYduQ10NyIYUa8lAW9g%3D%3D) This survey lets you share your views about the state of our country and how to change course before it's too late. By participating, you will give us a glimpse into the "state of knowledge" in your community that can only come from the local level. The survey is part of our **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS. ** The goal of this new campaign we're leading is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand: WHAT the Constitution says; HOW it relates to current issues and events; and WHY we must preserve constitutional principles if liberty is to endure. If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people whom our education system failed. These are young people that "educators" either deliberately deceived or who just didn't receive a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable about the principles of liberty and limited government. ** That's because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to 10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you--YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what's best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **[National Survey on the State of American Education](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d67dc2152e4140c0879b44450fb9ccbd&_e=kXFi_7CWGDAB5lxzxL5tKFIj5QO_w-WYf8uncPxYYkSHn6HGWqkQMkhaFvGkr-hKOt94DYozre_FgU4P9swNTsI0KwN-f8n1dJsYEyp8YISeZZsF9JvjDhTLTr3rrnZRSa7Yn9b2V6pEqvnc4jt1P13L4wMkLOI-bH-KgxxpkAZefKMtyk6CDIdx8h0UMwSnXDNe6ZcTpt27G4bL3IJIcK5APZq6cPEAC_FRy9e6RJkvodzxopY2yKSWYLJDjntJTAklZnk7ZFiPYXbkFnO48-G70G5CIWsYMd9twnYxNxm9P2mTL0z_gkDuyWCH5V-nONqlj_qOOW50Y0p2UkyO9glwnjOTKUOReOj3AyauW_rbz0m33T6oV9sT2jsoaSHhszFuf7lWcV-0XmnaS6GeDA%3D%3D) **today. Thank you for reading my email, and I hope you have a wonderful day. For our children, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---
| | [Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=d67dc2152e4140c0879b44450fb9ccbd&_t=A29FoYtX4Sq4M0wfyyJBSPY8XmTDuoeVsOujImn0ln6N5c7h4x2_B0m5xbC4P5NM8q_fd7mdG3nZwRINNqLuQIStekyDJ-8ksUlxFCvFhtOPIFbRhxlha0F2i73PmZ-39xvCTxDX4yVo1dJ3mXugAYQquO9SIVZROLX1-NTX_T0%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=d67dc2152e4140c0879b44450fb9ccbd&_t=A29FoYtX4Sq4M0wfyyJBSPY8XmTDuoeVsOujImn0ln6N5c7h4x2_B0m5xbC4P5NM8q_fd7mdG3nZwRINNqLuQEVt7jObz6MoR70VdU0jV6WGepO3fIP0Ior867RCXDpa).
---

| |

name: Dan Carr
subject: Freedom Through Forgiveness
body:
Sunday Devotional

| |
---|---|---
|
# Freedom Through Forgiveness
### Sunday Devotional
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
| Jan 12
---
| [](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
Forgiveness is one of the most powerful tools for achieving true freedom. It breaks the chains of bitterness, heals emotional wounds, and brings peace to the soul. In a world filled with anger and unresolved conflicts, forgiveness offers a way to rise above the pain and experience liberation. The Bible presents forgiveness as both a command and a gift, teaching us that freedom is found in letting go of the burdens of resentment.
[CLICK HERE TO FINISH READING:](https://substack.com/redirect/68bb424b-7d95-41f0-ac46-199490fdf076?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I refuse to give up my rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=48b029a487774a20bf3a3d7ab1892f9d&_e=_p8JKy_VdPqs7H5tcT8kK-F_UYtVmMPmtORUp3sO3vTfv2gePfLU4ESoJCdfsHIYCxeLFNvhGbTKSHr1PTn1QXtxPOjioXVPgZObA591O5OcW2XS8jsQFqa3EBP4nGgC8HwP1kQhstPvlwy7qTJHbW_vnmMbJLUoLNYswYOsXD7lCR1i0a1ijeodkud_h1vQvW26IJapka-aEa2kA6plSWnyPpZ4wQHeGqortCVl2wRCYI1rgV0kSo87Q1Ev2WdfdHJxVEes0l7vpoSvxo2dkyIEx6rFc8bXN7HYslp7TZwuOXsXrkdDPXuk4Eucy7waJdnjEeDfx6vws__Gmbvzh15cp4ZcJnQv6IMtKAVk4MVnM1i6GSHrIdl59bTPiZCfv9XGXXZFAocLp5U6wAODNA%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – _my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car_ – _I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice._
---
And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights:
---
**_Newsweek_ : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst**
---
Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, _“Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?”_
---
Here’s what I said: _**“Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.”**_
---
Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. _They want me to pay _$148 MILLION!__
---
It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York.
---
But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored.
---
Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House!
---
_**That’s why I will _KEEP_ _FIGHTING_ for my God-given freedoms and rights.**_
---
If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family!
---
[**If you can, and, seriously, only if you can, please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – as I keep fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats’ Deep State tries to JAIL me for life.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=48b029a487774a20bf3a3d7ab1892f9d&_e=_p8JKy_VdPqs7H5tcT8kK-F_UYtVmMPmtORUp3sO3vTfv2gePfLU4ESoJCdfsHIYCxeLFNvhGbTKSHr1PTn1QXtxPOjioXVPgZObA591O5OcW2XS8jsQFqa3EBP4nGgC8HwP1kQhstPvlwy7qTJHbW_vnmMbJLUoLNYswYOsXD7lCR1i0a1ijeodkud_h1vQvW26IJapka-aEa2kA6plSWnyPpZ4wQHeGqortCVl2wQdv4WRuIHNO-R9Czpi6m8d0nYQ6sRE6G19gca8keE5HZA69ME_JSe0U9gMvlRzSU8k7RCb5CjXO8hXZd7oMcFO6t-XZzNiVs0D1oEVvKcD5K6atJ14sU_cuJTDG47tJ84ajBne-3e0Rufx4GFeIzVZ1_q2nUpYsC2C5gzQcZTz3g%3D%3D)

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: The job’s not done
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND
body:
What should the Senate accomplish in 2025?
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=cf671de3ab534a02b0a7317e6de23e92&_e=PKga15czlRjWic2ioI9UUbtLemQdnYaxDYQ082oWo1kXyyP53EZf_SFbvUR_uUccgBwslQsqKynDVVsWzxjbKvkXfLw9PMy83q9h7znmJmLUv_Y8Uz2sw_LdOCu_upd_bjQ15tl5Td6s39thdxMbZSBUl1hAD1krzHk2qcqBZFUtjCpy1s0aEJUqfqJgXBPkENZrYlvybDMK-X0-3o9mNN0BTMw0faB8sHcc9SzCRpKzxxJiKO-Fz8qj8RuseFsI8Ehd0n7YOh4WbZuAQDrifcoCH72DMqBiNoYMVTFokTuxJKH5CIazKe8TchS_0uyM7F-Ly4QdkzJx8a5P7mj47Q%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

**In 2024, President Trump won a historic election in a landslide as Republicans received a mandate from the American People to fix our country.**

[**There 's no time to waste. We're not a rolling ball of butcher's knives; we must have a plan for 2025 so that we can work with each other to uphold the America-First Mandate.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=cf671de3ab534a02b0a7317e6de23e92&_e=PKga15czlRjWic2ioI9UUbtLemQdnYaxDYQ082oWo1kXyyP53EZf_SFbvUR_uUccgBwslQsqKynDVVsWzxjbKvkXfLw9PMy83q9h7znmJmLUv_Y8Uz2sw_LdOCu_upd_bjQ15tl5Td6s39thdxMbZSBUl1hAD1krzHk2qcqBZFUtjCpy1s0aEJUqfqJgXBPklm6tskcgvdwGou93lgCqeDIW4FhqLYKOk1FePgnfDnxSt5H6mPwdrNGWuXnspiGAhm5T-Ua7rVWyz6pNvJwH7DuJvuhI1fvBJ0fu25_mlU2tgbLLyUuvBI_SvgZgpDVv6aDqUlZZQ7zzHedAMcpZMw%3D%3D)

That's why I'm writing to you today, Peter. You're a TOP Patriot, and I need your advice.

[**I compiled a quick questionnaire in hopes of getting your opinion on what the GOP Senate Majority should focus on in 2025.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=cf671de3ab534a02b0a7317e6de23e92&_e=PKga15czlRjWic2ioI9UUbtLemQdnYaxDYQ082oWo1kXyyP53EZf_SFbvUR_uUccgBwslQsqKynDVVsWzxjbKvkXfLw9PMy83q9h7znmJmLUv_Y8Uz2sw_LdOCu_upd_bjQ15tl5Td6s39thdxMbZSBUl1hAD1krzHk2qcqBZFUtjCpy1s0aEJUqfqJgXBPkGqdUBxRb5lLLszGH9fW702W06t0kMnguZt0kl7J678ckfDoPn7kT6thr-DHZdQwlUvLiNBpf1enfBNQpyPz02SDlOn7WjVhFNW6eR8RAwouLcPL9e-bTdYv_20paydQz9SisJcm7GfcOX1uwpjLdPg%3D%3D)

The job's not finished. Just because President Trump won and we have the majority in both chambers of Congress doesn't mean the country will magically heal itself. We need to be ready so that we can start Making America Great Again on DAY ONE of President Trump's new administration.

[**Can you complete my 2025 Questionnaire before midnight tonight?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=cf671de3ab534a02b0a7317e6de23e92&_e=PKga15czlRjWic2ioI9UUbtLemQdnYaxDYQ082oWo1kXyyP53EZf_SFbvUR_uUccgBwslQsqKynDVVsWzxjbKvkXfLw9PMy83q9h7znmJmLUv_Y8Uz2sw_LdOCu_upd_bjQ15tl5Td6s39thdxMbZSBUl1hAD1krzHk2qcqBZFUtjCpy1s0aEJUqfqJgXBPkvW_sfTcNCMwJALhDJtzPyWRHD7Dg61f2fQ4rzb_C1VTmYxf6qbLzpjzB6zsl-WFFniM3VcRJ8JWOn65OGK7LA_O45R2NkAqofDxNA48JTyKzxBidtg9UdMIqF2XFLpXUF16lAbhC59A-p3d47TA7IQ%3D%3D)

| [ **COMPLETE 2025 AGENDA QUESTIONNAIRE** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=cf671de3ab534a02b0a7317e6de23e92&_e=PKga15czlRjWic2ioI9UUbtLemQdnYaxDYQ082oWo1kXyyP53EZf_SFbvUR_uUccgBwslQsqKynDVVsWzxjbKvkXfLw9PMy83q9h7znmJmLUv_Y8Uz2sw_LdOCu_upd_bjQ15tl5Td6s39thdxMbZSBUl1hAD1krzHk2qcqBZFUtjCpy1s0aEJUqfqJgXBPkfmDTev2mBZo5oImU6-6UuWHEp-VYho3x72cR8lLGZjXJCh0vq2I0os5bwC89Mq1yNA_o0GqXCUdABQi6BtEqDc4CP9nvweupLG7vbdCSBNgWLpGEuEpAGfUP1habFfkWa3RYpDKFZVyH986QUafMDQ%3D%3D)

Thank you,
Coach Tuberville

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=cf671de3ab534a02b0a7317e6de23e92&_e=PKga15czlRjWic2ioI9UUbtLemQdnYaxDYQ082oWo1kXyyP53EZf_SFbvUR_uUccgBwslQsqKynDVVsWzxjbKvkXfLw9PMy83q9h7znmJmLUv_Y8Uz2sw_LdOCu_upd_bjQ15tl5Td6s39thdxMbZSBUl1hAD1krzHk2qcqBZFUtjCpy1s0aEJUqfqJgXBPky7UWQsgAeoNVfTJLLPD_-cLM_YpgfWAbP8vGGuS3Q9skNYG8RB24PKIxqEz3u8E0Pwwy8D-y1skyQijvSo7GmwVBwvSoLCOCzFchlPcbcHFxLRkmP2gumuTvF5duWAa19DYX5OcG4COjFLCeytJ3lA%3D%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=cf671de3ab534a02b0a7317e6de23e92&_e=PKga15czlRjWic2ioI9UUbtLemQdnYaxDYQ082oWo1kXyyP53EZf_SFbvUR_uUccgBwslQsqKynDVVsWzxjbKvkXfLw9PMy83q9h7znmJmLUv_Y8Uz2sw_LdOCu_upd_bjQ15tl5Td6s39thdxMbZSBUl1hAD1krzHk2qcqBZFUtjCpy1s0aEJUqfqJgXBPk5zScy2eZAxpEK2jy3ec29Wv3h712vnF59QpoN4X_3yxdp5EvBMmWKHFVcVTBheHiO77oLeIf4pfNyhPfjAQ4Ta9_HEATFgBhN_bJ3C_BYvECoPAwSWsNojXH_9Rp0wG3AThCWUtezjAuZBObp_tNiw%3D%3D)

---

PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND
PO Box 590012, Birmingham, Alabama 35259

---

[ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=cf671de3ab534a02b0a7317e6de23e92&_e=PKga15czlRjWic2ioI9UUdQbhWAxYQNLYmjZVWrZnCrUkDioZKA_GqYEiFFWysJJjgw5ZEIa_htfGSmC4Uxk3A3Mt_yAbomub_qrj-5xVQbtnLgyukWgLQw5Y4ZbgQV-7bfJcKCgJcaYsErzdNEwZIU6IhJrl8kD5Dn6eRxUsDHV5pTHi0dc7blIMXH01dqQ3dk-RDqUIsfYVSCjMpFLbVzpgMB_58fEqtnWHiuvKwvGlR9Lf3clmvCEWGQY5rjC)

subject: Here’s the situation →
body:

Derek — We're about to ask you to [**donate directly to the DNC.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250112_2514_fr&refcode2=2550_22930333_kFyH_q&akid=2550%2E22930333%2EkFyH_q) If you give us a moment of your time, we’ll explain why your support is so important right now. Here’s the situation: When this month ends, we’ll be legally required to report how much we’ve raised. As they prepare to roll out their Project 2025 agenda, Trump and his allies would love nothing more than to see that Democrats are exhausted and ready to throw in the towel. body:
My campaign needs your help to make sure we can reach voters in every corner of the district.
Hi Peter, it’s Blake. I wanted to take a break from the farm to send you a quick message.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84804?refcode=em20250112-8717&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8717%2E614464%2EovxWzA)
Thanks to folks like you, we’ve been able to start this campaign off strong, but we still have a lot of work to do!
NY-21 is one of the largest districts in the country – spanning 15 counties – so we need to make sure we can reach voters in every corner of the district. Your grassroots support will help us do just that, allowing us to invest in critical campaign resources to spread our message across the North Country.
**[With this in mind, can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84804?refcode=em20250112-8717&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8717%2E614464%2EovxWzA)**

clean_body: My campaign needs your help to make sure we can reach voters in every corner of the district. Hi Peter, it’s Blake. I wanted to take a break from the farm to send you a quick message. Thanks to folks like you, we’ve been able to start this campaign off strong, but we still have a lot of work to do! NY-21 is one of the largest districts in the country – spanning 15 counties – so we need to make sure we can reach voters in every corner of the district. Your grassroots support will help us do just that, allowing us to invest in critical campaign resources to spread our message across the North Country. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: With appreciation, Blake | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots
